I’m ecstatic to tell you that a donor has reached out to me and said because they’re so excited to Take Back the House in 2022, they will 500% match any donation made before **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**.

**I’m running to make sure Democrats NEVER steal Georgia from us again.**

And starting off this new Quarter with a **BANG** is so crucial. That’s why I’m only extending this offer to my most loyal supporters.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: This is Bad News
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_bad_news&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I need to level with you for a minute... **Action 4 Liberty has done exactly what we promised - we've activated the largest pro-liberty, grassroots army in Minnesota. Thousands of us went to precinct caucuses and became delegates to pressure politicians to Stop the Mandates and make sure they Never Happen Again.** Meanwhile, the Republican Establishment has fought us the whole way. They're threatened by people like you and me getting involved in the political process and holding them accountable. They lie about us and slander our great organization in an attempt to derail the one group in Minnesota that is willing to fight against tyranny. While they spend time attacking you and me, Tim Walz just raised $1 Million for his re-election campaign. The COVID Cultists are rushing in their money to protect their favorite tyrant.
## **Don't let them out fundraise us!**
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_bad_news&n=2 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_bad_news&n=2)
---
Tim Walz has been our target this whole time. We have opposed his lockdowns, mandates, rising crime, and socialist spending.
Walz has his allies in St Paul - leftwing Democrats and weak-kneed Republicans \- both are allowing his agenda to move forward.
Spineless politicians cannot **stand** an organization like us that holds them accountable when they vote against our freedoms!
**Party Insiders will target and fight to disengage new activists like you. But if we want to take back our state, new activists are the only hope to advance liberty!**
We won’t back down when the Establishment smears us. We'll stand up and fight even harder!!!
The goals of the Establishment GOP and the Democrats are actually the same: discredit and destroy groups that challenge the status quo.
They attack us because they know we are tapping into patriotic voters that the Elites never wanted to see at the polls!
## **Those voters are you and me!**
Our fight to advance liberty for the next generation in Minnesota becomes more challenging every day.
Despite our growing successes across the state, the Establishment is turning up the heat on us with more attacks and fake news!
We need your help to continue the battle for our country, our state, and the American way of life.
Contribute today to patriots who work around the clock to protect the Constitution and fight tooth and nail against Socialism.
**[With your donation of $25, $50, $100, or EVEN MORE we will have the resources to continue fighting for your rights!](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_bad_news&n=3)**
Consider chipping in today!
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_bad_news&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_bad_news&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_bad_news&n=6), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Beau=20LaFave=20for=20SOS?=
subject: Thank you! Let me introduce myself
body:
Thank you for volunteering your time to attend State Convention in Grand Rapids on April 23rd. You get to decide who we put-up against SOS Benson

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/73e2f970bf80/thank-you-let-me-introduce-myself?e=2f092d4a69)
Thank you for volunteering your time to attend State Convention in Grand Rapids to decide Michigan's Republican nominee for Secretary of State!

My name is State Representative Beau LaFave, and I am going to beat incumbent Democrat Secretary of State Jocelyn Benson.

You have three choices to be the GOP nominee for Secretary of State. Any of the three of us would be better than Jocelyn Benson. But being a better option means nothing if you cannot beat Benson in November.

I ask you to consider what kind of fight you think the Dems will put up for this race. Do you think they’re mildly interested in the outcome, or do you think they will bring out the heavy artillery?

Of all three candidates, I’m the only one who ever took on the full force of the Democrat Party and walked away a winner.

Since I announced my campaign for SOS in October, I have personally:
driven 37,000 miles, cold-called 2500 delegates, and attended countless amazing Republican events from Marquette to Monroe telling my story. It proves I am the fighter and winner we need to take the Democrats on in November and deliver the Office of Secretary of State back to the Republicans

Fighting and winning against the odds

I was born and raised in Iron Mountain, MI (cross the Mighty Mac, turn left, drive 3 more hours). I was air-lifted and spent my first six weeks at Milwaukee Children’s Hospital. But, I was a fighter, and I beat the odds.

At eighteen months, my left leg was amputated. I was not given a lot of hope for walking. I beat those odds too.

I graduated from Michigan State University and entered Wayne State University Law School, but I kept my eye on my hometown happenings – particularly the politics. A very popular Democrat Sheriff declared for State Representative in an area that ALWAYS alternates between a Democrat and Republican State Rep. It was the Dem’s turn that year.

I spent a year searching for a candidate who could beat this popular Sheriff. I realized that person was me, a 23-year-old law student. So, I passed my finals, packed up, and went back home. After winning a primary I wasn’t supposed to (beat those odds too!), I suddenly found myself one-on-one against that very popular Sheriff. The Sheriff had LOTS of help. The Dems needed that seat to take majority. So they spent $600,000 in the cheapest media market this side of the Mississippi to make certain their man won.

I couldn’t outspend the Sheriff, so I outworked him instead. I knocked on 15,000 doors, going through three pairs of shoes and two prosthetic legs. Against all odds, I WON THAT ELECTION!

Since then, I’ve been fighting for the people on the Upper Peninsula. Jocelyn Benson tried to legalize ballot-harvesting, I sued her and WON. She tried accepting ballots that arrived ten days after the election, I sued her and WON. When she violated the 2nd Amendment to suppress the vote, I sued her and WON. I fought the Governor, the Attorney General, the lobbyists, the media, and other legislators time and time again. I never stop fighting until I win.

This election, the odds are stacked against us. I'm going to beat the odds again. I'm going to fight like I've been doing my entire life.

FIGHT FOR ME on April 23rd, and together WE WILL WIN IN NOVEMBER!

| Peter, did you see our team’s email?

In March, the House passed a bill that would cap the price of insulin at $35.

Though this proposal is incredibly important to working families and seniors, the pharmaceutical lobbyists are working overtime to make sure it doesn’t pass the Senate. The special interests are buying political influence to write laws that are good for their bottom lines – not yours.

This legislation will save money and, more importantly, save lives, so it is more important than ever for leaders to step up and put this bill on President Biden’s desk.

In Congress, I plan on fighting hard to ensure the cost of insulin and other life-saving medication is capped at an affordable cost. **But until I get there, we need to make our voices heard.**

name: Joe Arpaio for Mayor
subject: Will you help me ?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor
body:
I really need you on this. |
No longer want to receive emails from Joe? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_s=9fa269730921402f88d5cfcfa7e4e11f&_t=q44sMLbELYZoOB260jgHMZUIiHjJq1iEi84Tpnpw1TRKhjWLyLqE94_ONO7kCY3QdG7_r6rRavl2CCBHWtei62xADMPXtwiSTsrh73dbjesjbLoBbBXkuX8_b7m50B2kfe0u2YvAkO9Djg6rBlBzneq2OA9VXPYzD7aaWxDIZ-U%3D).

Fellow American,

I know I’ve said this before, but this race is about what small-town America is fighting against, big-government liberals pushing radical left-wing policies on small businesses and everyday Americans.

There is no compromise for them, you are wrong if you don’t agree with their out of touch policies, and they’ll continue to treat everyone else like we’re less than them because of it.

[**The voices of everyday Americans deserve to be heard, and I need your help to do that.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=9fa269730921402f88d5cfcfa7e4e11f&_e=0Owieaox8y0gWHwnb9WC4Mg9Vy4_FjOoG43inBbCqb37Sj4-f1oWqWkKaGN_Rp-Y1rhFDS1MgoGIgJICsa9gssjbDeacFXrj4rGm93bjUrlyf7g8FY9Qzmi3sbBEYjg-IcLU7m2q3Q47hbwjO6BOGEbZ03ZCKqiZccoMrx8fQLdFfjz8lMs_ml9-oxLx93TNp1vpXRsxO5oXQd0s3wRm2F9KGYLZTJfrc3z2fyfl9YWNDvZFxjIj5T2j72bkemNwkYo1exWdIKmqTX_n9ajHdeV4N8-usWTIYOPQ9WNpgORsG0zvBsWk_TesZ5eNd3w0ivz1Df8t02WQk2wd8-0JOmIjGrPP2qaxmBVBgI933mKQUHpZN8GvpEWyLuM6-VNmjvdJst3nu9VGmtztjPEDh4o9sWNtZj1pvG77UX18vSc%3D)

[**STAND WITH JOE ARPAIO >> FIGHT AGAINST THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=9fa269730921402f88d5cfcfa7e4e11f&_e=0Owieaox8y0gWHwnb9WC4Mg9Vy4_FjOoG43inBbCqb37Sj4-f1oWqWkKaGN_Rp-Y1rhFDS1MgoGIgJICsa9gssjbDeacFXrj4rGm93bjUrlyf7g8FY9Qzmi3sbBEYjg-IcLU7m2q3Q47hbwjO6BOGEbZ03ZCKqiZccoMrx8fQLdFfjz8lMs_ml9-oxLx93TNp1vpXRsxO5oXQd0s3wRm2N02iEENRXv1K5Pt1S_xlC8Bcqz1dJxaPPpVwckfR7uNvBX48BhwEqsrGO8lOWjw9vugSJYnikmZJJEV3QTVKrjWNwhN45phqMQiVCDHv9HRQx4BJvQZxJSe-BZ8WsX7w1PKnHz9NShJlyTFGchUbfg4vGoUn1RUUOGPY861NDk2Lh4XYUIuZr5BgpdItrkSU9sSGuQAGxWTHiHE68j3oqw%3D)

**I hate that it has to come down to "Us vs. Them" but at the end of the day it’s either we allow indoctrination and radicalism, or we fight for freedom and prosperity.**

Fellow American, I know I’ve said this before, but this race is about what small-town America is fighting against, big-government liberals pushing radical left-wing policies on small businesses and everyday Americans. There is no compromise for them, you are wrong if you don’t agree with their out of touch policies, and they’ll continue to treat everyone else like we’re less than them because of it. I hate that it has to come down to "Us vs. Them" but at the end of the day it’s either we allow indoctrination and radicalism, or we fight for freedom and prosperity. Thank you, Joe Arpaio Experience. Principles. Leadership. | | Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor. Authorized by Joe Arpaio.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: Election Day is less than 7 months away.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
Become a member of our Monthly Sustainers Club with your recurring donation today. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ebf2d052f9b8/i-am-running-for-congress-8930593?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=ec3e521e49&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Folks,

The upcoming November election is going to be an uphill battle. We know the odds aren’t in our favor, and with the recent gerrymander on our congressional district maps, the odds only became more challenging.

**But I’ve always believed that the power of organizing, of people exercising their right to free speech and right to vote, we can overcome even the worst of odds. **

I’m running for Congress to fight for the foundation of our country. I’m running because we deserve a representative who will put in the work of listening and helping solve problems faced by our country — not contribute even more to the extreme polarization that’s already paralyzed our government.

**Scott Fitzgerald has been the opposite of all of those things.** The 5th Congressional District — and Wisconsin as a whole — deserves better.

[**With only seven months left until the election, I’m asking you to become part of our Monthly Sustainers Club by setting up a monthly donation of $25, $10, or even just $5, less than the cost of two cups of coffee. **](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=0fad6811a2&e=356c0699dd)
---
| [DONATE](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=d8414c0b70&e=356c0699dd "DONATE")
---
| **[By setting up a monthly recurring contribution,](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=4d07f0e1b4&e=356c0699dd) you become a member of this campaign’s best supporters, and allow us to make critically important financial decisions by knowing we can count on your continued support. **

Thank you so much for considering this unique opportunity to join our campaign’s Monthly Sustainers Club and rising to the next level in your dedication to fixing the broken system in Washington.

With much gratitude,

Mike

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: Election Integrity At Risk
body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-r/) Friends, You already know that our elections are not secure. That's no secret to those of us that are paying attention.But our fight for election integrity is very much at risk right now. I've been fighting with Mike Lindell - who has endorsed my campaign from the very start - to secure our elections.[**But we have a huge financial deadline tomorrow, and we 're still $5,210 short of funding the budget we need to keep up the fight. **](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-y/)That's why I'm reaching out personally.We can't afford to have to close up our campaign at this critical moment in the fight. If we come up short, it might not just mean budget cuts, it could mean the whole project is derailed.I refuse to let that happen! So, please, will you chip in ASAP to help us fight for secure elections? [DONATE $10](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-j/) [DONATE $25](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-t/) [DONATE $100](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-i/) [DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-d/) Thank you in advance,Mark McCloskey [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-h/) | [McCloskeyforM](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-o/)[issouri](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-b/) | 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335, Saint Louis, MO 63108[Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-n/) [Preferences](https://markmccloskeyformissouri.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyjrjhyd-9A790A88-bjututkitk-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyjrjhyd-bjututkitk-m/)
---

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf&Schofield From the Trail 04/14/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_14_from_the_trail&n=1)
---
Friend, This week's "From the Trail" update is a little early because we are taking a short break to celebrate Easter with our families.
Our campaign continues to grow. This week we were excited to announce our first list of endorsements. You can view our list of endorsements by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/endorsements?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_14_from_the_trail&n=2).
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Our volunteer to highlight this week is our DeKalb County Director, Leslie Doran. Leslie has arranged radio interviews for both Paul and Carolyn. This week she put together an extremely successful meet and greet for us at Hobnobbers in Sycamore. Thank you, Leslie, for your hard work, dedication, and--most importantly--your friendship!

****[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_14_from_the_trail&n=3)
* * *
**Media Spotlight** One week ago, Carolyn appeared on Jim Mason's "Inconvenient Truth" radio program. You can listen to her interview by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfJqaS0NpwusAgKPfdnWGR4trK2g8ZUK_d03wUzpin-auT3vhPV-SehwCPqW230wOHM-HsPnRjmFZuGj8kd9G4mP7QjpkShA4y-ICBY0LSTckiTjkK4-tWlGkJPc9ERPygp3MgJmH8KB1lIXgT7Jc4Z1g5CNABflcq5glokc16yie&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_14_from_the_trail&n=4). Earlier this morning, I discussed our "New Start for Illinois" policy proposal and its six points on WHCO's The People Speak. You can listen to my interview by clicking [HERE](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=954wJVfXJnGDSMt_j90vIl2I9Mts3vNP7Yqes3Kf2OOFx5ld7XwDtvilxGrOcUV9-qLnjKhE9rVwE5VvOclcbw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_14_from_the_trail&n=5).
* * *
**Issue Discussion: Legislative Transparency
** "The truth is not afraid of transparency and a solution does not require silence." Once again, the Illinois legislature failed the people of Illinois by passing a budget without providing time for meaningful review. Senators and representatives voted on a budget with only a few hours to review bills that were over 3,000 pages in length. This rushed process was completely unacceptable and unnecessary.
As your Illinois Governor, I will VETO any legislation that is not passed in a transparent manner--even if it happens to be legislation that I agree with. Restoring trust in the legislative process is that important! Once again, thank you for reading this e-blast. If you celebrate Easter, we hope you have a safe, blessed, peaceful holiday. Paul
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_14_from_the_trail&n=6).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_14_from_the_trail&n=7) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_14_from_the_trail&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4_14_from_the_trail&n=9), software for leaders.

body:

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7f85q10bdba7rc7tel5n7lj3dddmm9g08f1cj70_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5hmjh3aohic5i79o3k6ppr8o74mmr32dpm6pobfdtjcjh3appn69rrbcjmmorrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p30phkcipm6ptnc9j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4d09civrimv936mcoovkrcms1jhon2bubom4d0o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z69brndtvu6viu4uj3493v20vmhuic9f9sbgq88o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zibi920dt3c5i7h522utdl8abhvo3f6ir86ft120_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9g60ll03e3pv2qg6huqv64ni19lovnof88aoing_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqi73v59f47om7fqe42n33fif0neiqfd25tgjlk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze5m3jm7iplp32f1502v836t75vr4694ic2ng8d0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoet2adj8u9a499dv9an703vp46j87itcodbdmg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ddtjbeabu0tr1hem8vi0nb29tb1m5etg6tlh1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuariu98cnm03e9odh7a653sfk9iafba39euoito_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1c45ihcl1de4orik8qvvqq05cl9bsg7u7sc4q6g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o72cph2bs)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zspr9fq94vfn33figncuk1o2djsei50p11203250_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2umprcttgspgndd3mccrr6ctnc6p76t5kc1j74ttk6uq34dbgm1imcotjchi38tpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shgcoq69cr3curm2pjhm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c1g68or0sjim49fg)

---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpmaalgil98i5c5keqbdaoobj5t6dbsvqe4ok260_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o74slh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcn3gb98e2k35f1qvf2ft8pjetolo47plu8nqtqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o74slh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Mary Vought
subject: This Race Will Determine Senate Control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Senate Conservatives Fund is proud to endorse Herschel Walker for U.S. Senate in Georgia.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2bcdt6vdrum0o2ildnbfpqn7deshc19fe75ppa0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o76cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr0pdmmlq6asrgc8oj6o32mth6ap9ic9rm6ob6cmr6acjkc1j3attkmsp60sdgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i61j38p5jcdjreor664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
| | |
---
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Senate Conservatives Fund is proud to endorse **Herschel Walker** for U.S. Senate in Georgia.
You may remember Walker as a star running back for the University of Georgia Bulldogs and then in the NFL. But your kids and grandkids will remember him as a stalwart conservative patriot who helped make America great again.
Walker is one of the top conservative Senate candidates of this election cycle. The media wants to portray him as a celebrity candidate, but it's his ideas and toughness they really fear.
Walker is running on the conservative issues that matter most:
▶︎ Border security
▶︎ Energy independence
▶︎ Backing the Blue
▶︎ The 2nd Amendment
▶︎ Pro-family values
**[Please make a generous contribution to his campaign.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpk8nptdaa3kqqls70bfaeiaeaprcnq3bgf2ihm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o76cdh2bs)**
Walker is a pro-life, pro-gun, pro-constitution, America-First leader. He won the full endorsement of President Donald Trump, and Senate Conservatives Fund is putting all our strength behind him, too.
**Georgia is a critical battleground state for Senate control.** The incumbent Democrat, Raphael Warnock, is a left-wing radical – extreme for any state, but especially for Georgia.
Warnock is one of the woke, socialist Democrats who helped unleash Biden-flation, open our borders, and put teachers' unions ahead of parents and children in our schools.
Replacing him with a conservative star like Herschel Walker is like winning two elections in one. And SCF's support is crucial – to show conservatives around the country that THIS is the race, and HERSCHEL WALKER is the candidate.
**[Please do your part today and send $10, $25, $50, or more to help Herschel Walker run to Washington!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrbt2e2iulgajatfgn1go7s31ncft03s6ig9qdqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1i66o76cdh2bs)**
_SCF will pay all processing fees so Herschel can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact._
Let's work together to win this race so we can take control of the Senate away from the Democrats AND build a conservative Senate controlled by leaders who will fight for our future.
Thank you for considering this request and for being part of our team. Sincerely,
---
---
Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER
---
---
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH** **COUNTDOWN**

|

|

name: Charity Barry
subject: The First Official Step to Retiring Mark Pocan Is Getting on The Ballot!
body:
And I need your help!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ajm9FEJXifzxMUf1x9Q0uj8fK0CBOMc-PacHBSWvHi9S6QNgDPNvkYIPwVdJKL53MWnM2Q8i5Vm2cPKMA8Q9a8HlFH6vfsiHC9a7sgNZir3dFbdxMEyt7c3GCvl_gMdfmSg18t_kh1bHJDgkOjDKAPXvCJ5xQqJ8&c=oh1X9w1OJXxgvPqjKGWTb4bk0-Gj9hJpu5NNCVraPsee7RCuzXIorw==&ch=kGIlHWnkiVM8tY3vkw6rN5Zs83wMw7boxRqkjMwltleRW47NHHajMA==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Fellow Patriots,

The first official step to retiring Mark Pocan is Getting on the Ballot! And I need your help!

I must collect a minimum of 1,000 signatures to get on the ballot. While 1,000 is the minimum, we aim to get at least 2,000 signatures to ensure that they will not be able to invalidate our work and send a clear message that we have the support, backing, and manpower to get this done!
A signature on a nomination form is not an endorsement, nor a promise to vote for a candidate. It only means the signer wants the candidate to be on the ballot. That means that even those who may not be sure yet who they will vote for can still sign the papers to keep their options open. Many voters in our district may be considering giving their support to a more conservative candidate because they are seeing what is happening under the leadership of the Left. Remind them that Pocan is in lockstep with Biden, and use this as an introduction to a reasonable, Patriotic alternative.

* Review the sample form ([link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ajm9FEJXifzxMUf1x9Q0uj8fK0CBOMc-PacHBSWvHi9S6QNgDPNvkWj7ZqxyPx0E6BTNUZ47InxR1JdCPNbvrbjvSA7DgkLUzltybYSU_aq5Tn0oIJKXIjakovqSVz5K_2Ufutf4tysjppZu70gtK0jc1o2R4aigeXdhFgD-mKQz7rk73UPubQOB4Z84wi9RmJv3YtCHpfvle7CCJaamfQ6NTHlA_ggbQnGMGik5AAkf_yFx7RJgVg==&c=oh1X9w1OJXxgvPqjKGWTb4bk0-Gj9hJpu5NNCVraPsee7RCuzXIorw==&ch=kGIlHWnkiVM8tY3vkw6rN5Zs83wMw7boxRqkjMwltleRW47NHHajMA==)) to prevent common mistakes.

name: Katie Pavlich
subject: They Tried to Silence Me
body:
Time is running out for us to fight the lifetime of indoctrination forced upon our college age students.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | If you've seen me on conservative news shows, or are familiar with my work at TownHall or PJ Media, you know I don't apologize for my conservative values, and I'll defend my constitutional rights to the hilt.

I'm proud of America... **NOT ASHAMED!**

**And, I know since you are reading this, that you aren't ashamed of America or our values either.**

**But there are millions of young people who aren't provided with the truth about your conservative ideas...**

[**Will you help give these young people the opportunity to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._EpbshRL0nEuww_JKpcfPQ)

It's easy to see why young people are impressionable to liberal indoctrination.

They're high school and college students in schools where free speech is under constant assault and where political correctness and socialism is pushed in the classroom.

Liberals bully students showing interest in your conservative ideas.

I should know-just ten years ago I was a young, impressionable student at the University of Arizona.

**It didn't take me long to realize that my teachers didn't just dislike the conservative values my parents had instilled in me..._they hated them._**

My professors relied on MSNBC and CNN as the "gold standard" when it came to presenting the "truth" in their classes.

But I had no idea they'd try to silence my voice until I got involved with a national conservative organization called **Young America's Foundation (YAF).**

With YAF's support and access to their campus lecture program, I decided to invite conservative author and activist **David Horowitz** to speak on our campus.

He had just written a book about "how radical professors at America's top colleges indoctrinate students and undermine our democracy. "

And I was just about to discover just how right he was.

Just two days before the lecture, the school threatened to shut David Horowitz's lecture down unless our campus group coughed up cash to pay for "security" because administrators had deemed the lecture "controversial."

Meanwhile, leftist activists tore down our signs and posters advertising the event so students wouldn't know about it.

Then, just three hours before the start of the event, the school moved the lecture to a hidden-away classroom in the hopes that no one would show up.

Yet, despite every roadblock they threw at us, **the event was a HUGE success.**

University of Arizona students got to hear David Horowitz explain why free enterprise and conservatism are the true roots of freedom.

**And I learned a valuable lesson:**

**The Left will do anything to prevent young people from hearing conservatives because they know that students who hear the truth about our values will reject socialism.**

Oh, you won't hear much about the threats, violence, and intimidation pointed at conservatives in schools from the mainstream media.

But I've witnessed it firsthand.

[**And despite the fear and intimidation tactics these radical leftists use in schools, I want you to know YOU can play a pivotal part to ensure more young Americans hear the truth about our conservative values by joining YAF today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

**You see, YAF had such an impact on my life that today I'm one of their speakers.**

And I personally know how enraged the Left can get when we speak up for commonsense values that used to be taken for granted - such as border security, free enterprise, and traditional family values.

For example:
* When I spoke at the university of Wisconsin, radical campus activists protested my speech by committing an obscene act that should have been treated as sexual harassment. Instead, the university ignored protestors, labeled me as "controversial" and imposed a "security fee" on the local YAF chapter.
* And later, at Kennesaw State University in Georgia, campus administrators tried to prevent me from speaking. They claimed I was "controversial," and campus administrators tried to force the local YAF chapter to pay a heavy handed "security fee" in a clear effort to stifle free speech.

But I'm not the only YAF speaker who's had to deal with this kind of intimidation. Many other YAF speakers have been disrupted... **and even seriously endangered.**

**Ben Shapiro was threatened by a violent Antifa terrorist demonstration, after U.C. Berkeley was forced to allow him to speak after a lawsuit filed by YAF.**

The First Amendment says every American deserves to have their voice heard in the public square. Everyone deserves a chance to share their opinion and defend their viewpoints.

_**But the Left is terrified of your ideas.**_

That's why the Left seeks to SILENCE our voices, instead of debating us.

I've heard many good people say it's too late...there's nothing we can do to stop the Left from indoctrinating young people on college campuses with socialism.

_**But it's simply not true - YAF is living proof we CAN stop them.**_

Time and time again, _**YAF has sued campuses who sought to censor conservative speakers and WON**_ \- ensuring young Americans can hear our shared conservative values and ideas.

**Let's face it - with the far Left firmly in control of our public school system and most colleges, young Americans won't hear these basic truths unless YAF is there to tell them.**

And time is running out for us to fight the lifetime of indoctrination forced upon our college age students.

[**If you want to help recruit the largest audiences of young people into the Conservative Movement, I hope you will make a tax-deductible gift to Young America's Foundation today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

Remember, the Left is determined to silence voices like ours in schools across the country.

In fact, they tried their best to stop YAF...

_Your support of YAF is so important because without your help, they'll succeed and your conservative values WILL BE SILENCED._

**This is simply not a battle we can afford to lose.**

We must decide whether our country remains a bastion of freedom or it will be twisted and transformed into a socialist dystopia.

The next generation is the key in ensuring that our nation doesn't make the wrong choice.

Thank you in advance for you support of this crucial mission.

Gratefully,
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._FNgV8HxCUvyMflvBDeQ)
**Katie Pavlich**
_Fox News Contributor
New York Times Bestselling Author
Editor, Townhall.com
Young America's Foundation Speaker_

---

[DONATE](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
1-800-USA-1776

Young America's Foundation

National Headquarters
11480 Commerce Park Drive, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

The Reagan Ranch Center
217 State Street
Santa Barbara, CA 93101

The Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home
816 S. Hennepin Avenue
Dixon, IL 61021

Copyright © 2021 Young America's Foundation
---

P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTA1LWE1MjAwZTJjNjEyZjQ2N2FhODFmZTZkZWI5OWRlNWZlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/uSR3mzpVstHTJSiHPU2HuA) to unsubscribe.

I've heard many good people say it's too late...there's nothing we can do to stop the Left from indoctrinating young people on college campuses with socialism. But it's simply not true - YAF is living proof we CAN stop them. Time and time again, YAF has sued campuses who sought to censor conservative speakers and WON \- ensuring young Americans can hear our shared conservative values and ideas. Let's face it - with the far Left firmly in control of our public school system and most colleges, young Americans won't hear these basic truths unless YAF is there to tell them. And time is running out for us to fight the lifetime of indoctrination forced upon our college age students. Remember, the Left is determined to silence voices like ours in schools across the country. In fact, they tried their best to stop YAF... Your support of YAF is so important because without your help, they'll succeed and your conservative values WILL BE SILENCED. This is simply not a battle we can afford to lose. We must decide whether our country remains a bastion of freedom or it will be twisted and transformed into a socialist dystopia. The next generation is the key in ensuring that our nation doesn't make the wrong choice. Thank you in advance for you support of this crucial mission. Gratefully, Katie Pavlich Fox News Contributor New York Times Bestselling Author Editor, Townhall.com Young America's Foundation Speaker_ | 1-800-USA-1776 Young America's Foundation National Headquarters 11480 Commerce Park Drive, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 The Reagan Ranch Center 217 State Street Santa Barbara, CA 93101 The Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home 816 S. name: Marco Rubio
subject: $5 goes a long way, I know.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I really, really don’t like asking for money.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z243kpvqu5ri5k6uhkae5l7csj97cning6d76cgg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpr2cj163ieactichh71ctjedj7apbjcqpm1chnmhqraddke3in3d31cpib0tj0sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666rj6o37maq6cd34mmr3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clg60oj1c1imcoh5u)
I really, really don’t like asking for money.
|
---
| | | Friend,

I really, really don't like asking for money. I know that even something as small as a few dollars can be hard to find these days. $5 in today's economy can be an extra gallon of gas or an extra pound or two of chicken.

It was a lot for my parents, too. As immigrants who left Cuba and escaped a socialist regime, they worked day and night (as a bartender and a maid) to make ends meet. To them, $5 - especially to help their children live a better life - meant everything.

**I understand the value of $5, which is why it 's so hard for me to ask.**

You know me to be an earnest man, so believe me when I say that asking you to donate $5 to my campaign is a decision I don't take lightly.

**[With that being said, I'm humbly asking you for just $5 to help me defend the American Dream and restore our economy to greatness.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkqm59lmso5lh6s2guiskt85o3hq9baknesnhelg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h62o35cph2bs)**
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0a4onhhnuujtbbfva6lj1k4qdgckdv92stkp56g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h62o35cph2bs)
---
It would mean the world to me if you could help me out today. I really want to stay in this fight for America's middle class, but unfortunately, I have to keep reaching my goals to do so. And your help decides if I succeed or fail.

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8l5ilpun9prtrop8kmn4gegf7n181o7k5t00a5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h62o35cph2bs)
---

Marco
---
| | | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z78otfv8bvhtu0l58eqc4b4e17osjnjlv75lgkeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h62o35cph2bs)
---
I talk to folks every day who say they haven't donated because they think they need to write a big check or they think my race isn't close.

clean_body: I really, really don’t like asking for money. I really, really don’t like asking for money. | | | | Friend, I really, really don't like asking for money. I know that even something as small as a few dollars can be hard to find these days. $5 in today's economy can be an extra gallon of gas or an extra pound or two of chicken. It was a lot for my parents, too. As immigrants who left Cuba and escaped a socialist regime, they worked day and night (as a bartender and a maid) to make ends meet. To them, $5 - especially to help their children live a better life - meant everything. I understand the value of $5, which is why it 's so hard for me to ask. You know me to be an earnest man, so believe me when I say that asking you to donate $5 to my campaign is a decision I don't take lightly. | | | It would mean the world to me if you could help me out today. I really want to stay in this fight for America's middle class, but unfortunately, I have to keep reaching my goals to do so. body:
I am furious.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7npoureel24gg6r80ugnn4j89j9f8v9s022p4p0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h62o32clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sbiemqe6pbhcgrb1p3m6crjad326cr62srgm1g66cj1cgqb2pbnmdij6dtle5jjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dpjc1jr5d366hgb6p1nm2qmash5u)
I am furious.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgj2b42oioaj89pt5b35pddrjoe5bu3th2pll1ro_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h62o32clh2bs)
I am furious.
After TWO ENTIRE YEARS, radical Democrats in blue states are "suddenly" coming around to ending lockdowns, mandates, and masking kids in schools. They claimed the science changed...
**But let me say this loud and clear: the science didn 't change -- THE POLITICS DID!**
Democrats are panicking as Joe Biden's approval ratings hit all-time lows. The polls are against them. And free states like Florida are thriving while lockdown states are still masking their kindergarteners.
_But I know you -- the American People -- see right through their lies. _
**If Democrats win in November, they will re-establish lockdowns, mandates and masks. **
I won't let them get away with it. They must be punished at the ballot box in November.
[**That 's why I'm rushing to you now. I need at least 2,500 Patriots to help hold these Democrats accountable for playing political games with our freedoms, our businesses, AND our children.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zspbgif9u7bmd83m7qbcvlss3m7uo3n0jmqd479o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h62o32clh2bs)

This is the most important thing any of us will ever do.
If these radical Democrats get away scot-free, they'll know they can walk all over the American People without suffering any political consequences.
**But today, you have the power to be their judge and jury.**
[**Will you join my mission to hold these radical Democrats to account, or will you give them a free pass?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z28a3gqojbdjol69j706dvbab2qmq3k8ahbttqdg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h62o32clh2bs)
I hope you're with me on this.

name: Jim Obergefell
subject: Ron DeSantis wants to roll back decades of progress on LGBTQ+ rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
he’s failed in his first duty to protect Floridians |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44153853/340344930/-119460887?&amount=5&refcode=20220415_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjJhYjMyOS1iOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ai0Z_6EUelsK83xXTOR_waTU4_itkZGEguqloaWbUo=)
---
Hi friend,

I’m reaching out today to talk to you about Ron DeSantis and the recent anti-LGBTQ+ legislation in Florida.

If my name seems familiar to you, that’s because I was the lead plaintiff in _Obergefell v. Hodges_ , the 2015 Supreme Court case that _finally_ legalized same-sex marriage across America.

We’ve made undeniable progress on LGBTQ+ rights in the past few decades, but there are many people who want to send our country back to the days where you couldn’t admit you were gay. Where you couldn’t even say the word “gay.”

One of those people is Ron DeSantis. Recently, he signed the hateful “Don’t Say Gay” bill into law, which banned all discussions of LGBTQ+ issues and people from Florida’s classrooms.

And now, my home state of Ohio is making national headlines for introducing a nearly identical bill.

Hateful rhetoric like this is contagious, friend, and we need to stop it wherever we see it.

**It’s exactly why I’m running for the Ohio state legislature, and it’s exactly why I need your help to elect Charlie Crist in Florida.[_Right now, I’m humbly asking you: Will you split a donation of any amount between my campaign and Charlie Crist’s?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44153854/340344931/-119460887?refcode=20220408_f_1&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjJhYjMyOS1iOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ai0Z_6EUelsK83xXTOR_waTU4_itkZGEguqloaWbUo=)**

When he’s elected in November, Charlie will return something to Tallahasseee that’s been missing for years: **_compassion._**

These “Don’t Say Gay” bills are the polar opposite of compassion. They’re terrible, horrific, and harmful, and they create a hostile environment for teachers, students, and school staffers.

**_[I know Florida and Ohio are both better than these horrible laws — and we’re ready for new leadership. Please, split a donation between my campaign and Charlie Crist’s so we can fight for real leadership.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44153855/340344932/-119460887?refcode=20220408_f_1&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjJhYjMyOS1iOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ai0Z_6EUelsK83xXTOR_waTU4_itkZGEguqloaWbUo=)_**

Thank you,

Jim Obergefell

Oh, and one last thing. Ron DeSantis doesn’t want people to say “gay”? Well, here’s what I have to say about that: Gay. Gay. Gay.

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44153856/340344933/-119460887?&amount=5&refcode=20220415_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjJhYjMyOS1iOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ai0Z_6EUelsK83xXTOR_waTU4_itkZGEguqloaWbUo=)
---

Hello,
When you’re up against Chuck Grassley and Senate control is on the line, you need to raise a lot of money in order to run a winning campaign against Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs. That’s exactly the spot I find myself in.
**But with just 16 hours until our most important mid-month deadline of the campaign, it’s looking like we might fall short of our $250,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.**
**This couldn’t be more important.** [**Please, will you give $5 or whatever you can afford now – before our critical mid-month deadline at midnight tonight – to help me hit our goal, defeat Chuck Grassley, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44154165/340346997/-42398318?refcode=em20220415am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTRlM2JmNy1iYmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i41mwYp7ZPtV3bpzkIAEI9ulPzmNW6paOGqWRW3UgOs=)
Control of the Senate will be decided here in Iowa. The Republicans only need to pick up one seat to put McConnell back in charge, but if we’re able to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue, we can put a stop to their sinister plans.
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2020. It’ll be even closer this time. According to a brand-new Des Moines Register poll, Chuck Grassley’s approval ratings are now the lowest they’ve ever been!
**If we’re going to win, though, we need to hit our goal before our critical mid-month deadline at midnight tonight – and right now, we’re still coming up short.**
[**I’m not taking money from corporate PACs so I’m relying on you. Can I count on you to give $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before our critical mid-month deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44154167/340346999/-42398318?refcode=em20220415am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTRlM2JmNy1iYmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i41mwYp7ZPtV3bpzkIAEI9ulPzmNW6paOGqWRW3UgOs=)

name: Katie Hobbs
subject: A quick update, and a request

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]

Friends,
This is Arizona Secretary of State Katie Hobbs, and I have an important message for you about our work here at DASS.

But the Big Lie brings in big money for the extremists trying to control your vote. For us to succeed in the midterms, we need to counter their massive spending. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B1_AC_30D]

subject: Reminder: You Want Me to Keep Going? Good. I Will.
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TG97GyhH84rfb2f3VS6wSa1-WkqS165toyvPj6rFIWrGkae9okgA_XhuLw2zfg2UXxjTVWCZAERvrpvcE5K_MRgGezJH0yN1lpZz5V9hRF-SFCui69-AM77ZMiONvVQGQ13pof5JBmqCD3_rTroj3Ww-hUQcShNXmc7AYUpTjAHLfvg55cU8Nw==&c=1FFO0qOIoJw2KmsDjKlansq-mvEXnomMUMsiqTKlK1omvxtjH4-RMQ==&ch=10TjxA46S-VYYRa6ph-CLEJLbMW9wOLtvYTZEkWnQGiuVE24kPmyRQ==)
---
| Peter \-
As I'm sure you've heard, President Trump publicly endorsed Mehmet Oz. However, YOU have made it clear that this campaign must continue to move forward!
In the days since Trump's endorsement, the numbers have been working out FOR us -- FOR YOU (because this is OUR campaign). Our presence on social media more than DOUBLED over the weekend. The messages and emails we received are absolutely amazing and your support fuels me to keep fighting.
So thank you for your continued support, because we need your help now more than ever.
Pennsylvania CAN go red, but we can't elect a RINO. RINOs do nothing but take up a seat that could be a vote in favor of legislation that aims to actually conserve the American way of life. Oz is a Liberal in a Republican's clothing -- but you already know that. And we also have a hedge fund billionaire to contend with -- one who's built a career on strengthening his Chinese investments while sidelining the wants and needs of the American people.
The choice is clear. With less than 35 days left in this race, it is critical that we do all we can to push and reach our fundraising goals. There is no doubt that with YOUR help we can win this Primary in an overwhelming victory! But I need you But I need you [to chip in whatever you can right now!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TG97GyhH84rfb2f3VS6wSa1-WkqS165toyvPj6rFIWrGkae9okgA_XhuLw2zfg2UXxjTVWCZAERvrpvcE5K_MRgGezJH0yN1lpZz5V9hRF-SFCui69-AM77ZMiONvVQGQ13pof5JBmqCD3_rTroj3Ww-hUQcShNXmc7AYUpTjAHLfvg55cU8Nw==&c=1FFO0qOIoJw2KmsDjKlansq-mvEXnomMUMsiqTKlK1omvxtjH4-RMQ==&ch=10TjxA46S-VYYRa6ph-CLEJLbMW9wOLtvYTZEkWnQGiuVE24kPmyRQ==)
Please rush in a donation today for Pennsylvania and America.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: FWD: our ad could go dark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend: I'm feeling grateful. Thousands of grassroots folks have stepped up to fuel our reelection campaign and defend our critical Senate majority. **But we can't afford to slow down yet.**
---
GOP donors are flooding my potential opponent's campaign with millions to defeat me. So the ONLY way we can fight back and keep Georgia blue is by hitting every single grassroots goal between now and Election Day.
**With time running out before our crucial mid-month deadline, we need to raise another $4,538 by midnight to keep our ad on the air – so please, friend, I'm counting on your immediate grassroots support.**
**[Will you give $5 or more before our midnight deadline – split between me and Jacky Rosen – so we can keep up our momentum, win in Georgia, and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44155320/340351612/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1754-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmRmM2FhOC1iY2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DnX-kRdI6C_VMVlD4juEeis-trnPczqacAIlaKFyLc=)**
Thank you for your incredible support. We wouldn't have gotten this far without you. Let's keep going.

– Sen. Raphael Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Rev. Warnock**
Date: Wed, Apr 13, 2022
Subject: our ad could go dark
| | |
---
This is important, friend, so I’ll get straight to it:
**Donald Trump just came to Georgia for the _second_ time in six months to rally the GOP base for my potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R). They know Senate control could be decided by our race, so they're pulling out all the stops to defeat me.**
The good news is that we just launched a TV ad to fight back against GOP attacks and reach millions of Georgians with our people-powered message. **But if we fall short of our critical midnight goal, our ad could go dark – and we could end up ceding the airwaves to the GOP.**
**This means I'm fully relying on grassroots folks like you to power our movement to victory – and with polls showing me 1 point down, we have zero room for error.**
**[That’s why I'm urgently asking for your support by midnight: Please, w ill you chip in $5 or more now – split between our campaign and Jacky Rosen's – to keep our TV ads live, win in Georgia, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44155323/340351614/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1754-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmRmM2FhOC1iY2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6DnX-kRdI6C_VMVlD4juEeis-trnPczqacAIlaKFyLc=)**

The good news is that we just launched a TV ad to fight back against GOP attacks and reach millions of Georgians with our people-powered message. **But if we fall short of our critical midnight deadline, our ad could go dark, and we could end up ceding the airwaves to the GOP.**
I'm running this campaign the right way, without a dime from corporate PACs. But that means I'm fully relying on grassroots folks like you to power our movement to victory – and with polls showing me 1 point down, we have zero room for error.

Friend, It’s no secret that crime is up around our country. Defunding the police failed, and now we’re all facing the consequences. Cities like Philadelphia are unrecognizable, and lifelong Pennsylvanians don’t feel safe in our own homes.
---
| [ **End The Crime Wave** ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VVpWjg7v1Pv9W6FdMhR46kbN7W13cSCp4HWQbHN6hnppQ3q90pV1-WJV7CgTbwN91JGmx-QHGbW2Y-m0k5MZ2ChW53RyHv54kPXhW4hcnK916Pl4ZW3tpsNY2gtFjFN3Nllcc67hPFW8lX5DS2rZS9PW8jlFF-4Crv66W5dnkhc5h5nZpW1rHWRg8DzDytW7vLzfP90ZZX6W26MtsS73_GfqW8jGRxT54NfCqW2qFWPD6j1vdsW7LmZ4X1KBgYqW9fz8yH2Nkpb7W2Jb81w3r2V3FW4qtB7J9h7g9tW49Lp874MdR6MW5zbnr699_ZNKW6cnkj898QpwTN6QVsmjNtjKJN58bDpsfLf9jW84xt0T3g9T0PW6Bh9wB3N5_jvN94xGXtSTY__34mn1)
---
We need leaders who will address this epidemic, not make excuses. Our citizens need to feel safe in their homes. They need to feel comfortable walking to their cars at night or letting their children play in the park. **Our safety is paramount to our quality of life, and it has to be protected.** In Congress, I’ll support legislation that is tough on crime. I’ll take our safety seriously, make sure we re-fund and re-staff our police departments, and work to increase responsible policing tactics across our country. Can I count on you to stand with me and support cracking down on crime?
---
| [ **Donate Today** ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VVpWjg7v1Pv9W6FdMhR46kbN7W13cSCp4HWQbHN6hnppQ3q90pV1-WJV7CgN7LW3PQbhT658rkWVv3_vz6XGmLzW3r6plz9fxV-pW4mZv7S5JfPQWW42hGHn97V_sZW2zC9bL6WPmxMW7Pb1sf2x9RQ4W30wMwg42lG5sW8rxphX5SmT7CW80JFmz78MrkwW8SM70478s6RSW4w8TG15t_RznW7cMJBW2vHh_VW1B1_Tw3djXSxVCb7WN6YCXWWW8C4Gzc6Rj0JNW64zYHP52kygbW2hSxZT5r5KkVW5GqDvL4Gt80mW5BFCcf4LwxtHW7w1S7k5Pyj-4W7CfTgf4XQV37N3-0RscvdZQMW6xcSfb4k1w-XW5V5cQz4XwVSqVYrk3z4FBzRh39ps1)

| | Friend, When I fought for America as a tank commander in the U.S. Army, acting dishonorably could cost you your life. Joe Biden’s foreign policy failures prove he and his administration have gone from incompetent to dishonorable.

| | My friend, like you, I know we must stop Joe Biden and hold him accountable for his failures. It earns me no friends in the Democrat bought and paid for press to call out Biden and the reckless radical democrats, but I promise you, I will never back down. Not now, not ever!

| | My campaign for Arizona’s 2nd district is heating up. The midterms are right around the corner and we’re going to kick Nancy Pelosi and the radical Democrats out of power -- and out of Washington -- for good!****_**But I can’t win without you.**_

name: Markwayne Mullin
subject: The Biden administration tried to kill me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullin for America
body:
But I'm still here, and my fight isn't over.

| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60138178:JyVBAEo2N:m:1:3299561967:BA14E28F272D71868AEE64C7939D4842:r)
When the Biden administration left Americans behind in Afghanistan, the team and I went to get Americans out. And what did the Biden administration do in response?

**Without question, they tried to kill me. **

They released information about my location while I was in Afghanistan. They didn't care if I got killed. They just didn't want anyone to know that they left Americans behind.

To be quite frank, I didn't do it for political clout or popularity. I didn't even intend for it to get out. Despite the media outing us and putting the mission in jeopardy we were ultimately successful.

**I did this because I care deeply about every single American. It angered me that they got left behind in harm 's way. I care that we have a President who not only left them in a warzone, but that he tried to kill a United States Congressman who went to save them. **

I saw an opportunity to help. As a Christian, helping others is what God intended me to do. I saw a need and I went to it.

Now, I see another need. I'm running for the United States Senate to continue to fight for the American people like I've done my whole life. As the next Senator for Oklahoma, **I will never stop fighting.**

**Even if a corrupt administration tries to stop me.

[It would be my honor if you could join me in this battle today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60138178:JyVBAEo2N:m:1:3299561967:BA14E28F272D71868AEE64C7939D4842:r)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM MULLIN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60138178:JyVBAEo2N:m:1:3299561967:BA14E28F272D71868AEE64C7939D4842:r)
[**FIGHT FOR AMERICA**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60138178:JyVBAEo2N:m:1:3299561967:BA14E28F272D71868AEE64C7939D4842:r)
God bless America.
Markwayne Mullin

Candidate for US Senate

| |

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: It's time to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Peter,

Joe Biden is hoping I fall short of my mid-month fundraising deadline.

**That's because I am leading the fight in Congress to:**
---
*** ELECT Donald J. Trump as the next Speaker of the House. *** IMPEACH Joe Biden for allowing an illegal alien invasion at our southern border. *** INVESTIGATE Hunter Biden's "laptop from hell" and bring down the Biden crime family. *** EXPOSE Hillary Clinton's treason in spying on Donald Trump during the 2016 election. *** BAN critical race theory and other poisonous woke ideologies from our nation's military.
**I have until midnight to reach my campaign's emergency goal of raising another $7,647.**

The fake news media, Never Trumpers, and the Biden regime will be watching to see if I fall short.

**[So please chip in an emergency contribution of $10, $25, or $50 before the midnight deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59974219:sRsKR4HNR:m:1:2365227053:78A77BEA5AEA6039969827B045656DD1:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59974219:sRsKR4HNR:m:1:2365227053:78A77BEA5AEA6039969827B045656DD1:r) [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN BEFORE TONIGHT'S DEADLINE!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59974219:sRsKR4HNR:m:1:2365227053:78A77BEA5AEA6039969827B045656DD1:r) I must show our America First movement is stronger than ever and ready to take out country back this November.

**And Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the hacks in the fake news media are hunting around for any sign of weakness.**

I'm facing attacks from left-wing Super PACs.

The fake news media lies about me every day.

And Joe Biden's Justice Department smeared me.

**All in an effort to take me out because I fought for President Trump.**

Now I need your help to show the America First movement is ready to fight back and win.

**[That's why it's vital you chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250 before the midnight deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59974219:sRsKR4HNR:m:1:2365227053:78A77BEA5AEA6039969827B045656DD1:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59974219:sRsKR4HNR:m:1:2365227053:78A77BEA5AEA6039969827B045656DD1:r) [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK
DONATE TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59974219:sRsKR4HNR:m:1:2365227053:78A77BEA5AEA6039969827B045656DD1:r) Your contribution will send a message to the Biden regime that I took their best and shot.

**Now I stand ready to lead the fight to elect a pro-Trump America First majority this November.**

The polls show that a RED TSUNAMI is forming as Americans revolt against Joe Biden's socialist, open borders agenda.

But as the political environment deteriorates, the Biden regime and the fake news media will only grow more desperate.

**I must marshal all the resources necessary to fight back.**

And I'm counting on you to **[chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 before the midnight deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59974219:sRsKR4HNR:m:1:2365227053:78A77BEA5AEA6039969827B045656DD1:r).**

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59974219:sRsKR4HNR:m:1:2365227053:78A77BEA5AEA6039969827B045656DD1:r)

name: Maggie Hassan HQ
subject: Sorry to bother you on a Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
This race just heated up
| | |
---
Sorry to bug you on a Friday, and we’ll make this quick, but this is just too important: Our mid-month deadline is TONIGHT at midnight, and we're $11,198 short of our $35,000 goal.
**And this race just heated up: Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just reported that they have over $72.3 million in the bank, and they’re getting ready to make “major investments” attacking Maggie in New Hampshire. **
There's so much on the line in this race. Maggie's vote in the Senate is crucial to progress on critical issues — from health care to climate change to voting rights to infrastructure. The last thing we want to do right now is fall behind in our fundraising, especially when we've had so much momentum lately!

Maggie asked us to give her a fundraising update tomorrow morning after our mid-month deadline, and we really want to give her good news.

**[_Will you please rush a $3 donation right now — or whatever you can spare — to help close this fundraising gap and hit our mid-month goal? Your support makes all the difference in keeping New Hampshire and the Senate blue._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44159362/340367965/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk885-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDJmYjZkYS1jMGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IlFe7EqdwjGbRW_NmGZ7WWuv9GJjBQv7BNKVmSAmBS0=)**

clean_body: This race just heated up | | | Sorry to bug you on a Friday, and we’ll make this quick, but this is just too important: Our mid-month deadline is TONIGHT at midnight, and we're $11,198 short of our $35,000 goal. And this race just heated up: Mitch McConnell’s super PAC just reported that they have over $72.3 million in the bank, and they’re getting ready to make “major investments” attacking Maggie in New Hampshire. There's so much on the line in this race. Maggie's vote in the Senate is crucial to progress on critical issues — from health care to climate change to voting rights to infrastructure. The last thing we want to do right now is fall behind in our fundraising, especially when we've had so much momentum lately! Maggie asked us to give her a fundraising update tomorrow morning after our mid-month deadline, and we really want to give her good news. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for coming through. | Peter, This election, we have a historic opportunity to elect Maryland’s first Black governor after a long line of 62 white men. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44159632/340369383/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220415-b1_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220415-b1_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220415&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=fda93ad5-c1bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE5M2FkNS1jMWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QbyX0bpNbdRZCGsZSmtrCxF5wcRULMbsPb-cB-XVh50=) All across the state we are hearing from voters that they are tired of more of the same from Annapolis, and it’s time to seize the moment. John King is a lifelong educator, public school parent, and was President Obama’s Secretary of Education – he deeply understands the challenges Marylanders face and has the leadership experience to usher our state into a new era of progress. That’s why we’re reaching out today, Peter. Look, we know we don’t have the power to change what’s in the past. But we do have the power to determine what’s next for our state. We have the opportunity to make real change where it matters most — in our schools, in our criminal justice system, in our environment — and it’s up to all of us to see it through. John is the leader with the vision and the experience to do it, but he simply can’t do it without your support. _**[So please, help us seize this historic moment and steer our state toward a more just and prosperous future by chipping in what you can before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44159641/340369392/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220415-b1_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220415-b1_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220415&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=fda93ad5-c1bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE5M2FkNS1jMWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QbyX0bpNbdRZCGsZSmtrCxF5wcRULMbsPb-cB-XVh50=)**_ | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44159642/340369393/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220415-b1_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220415-b1_fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220415&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=fda93ad5-c1bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGE5M2FkNS1jMWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QbyX0bpNbdRZCGsZSmtrCxF5wcRULMbsPb-cB-XVh50=)

clean_body: This election, we have a historic opportunity to elect Maryland’s first Black governor after a long line of 62 white men. | = | Peter, This election, we have a historic opportunity to elect Maryland’s first Black governor after a long line of 62 white men. = All across the state we are hearing from voters that they are tired of more of the same from Annapolis, and it’s time to seize the moment. John King is a lifelong educator, public school parent, and was President Obama’s Secretary of Education – he deeply understands the challenges Marylanders face and has the leadership experience to usher our state into a new era of progress. That’s why we’re reaching out today, Peter. Tonight at midnight we have a crucial mid-month deadline , and we’re counting on a surge of small-dollar donations to show just how strong our coalition is. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Look, we know we don’t have the power to change what’s in the past. But we do have the power to determine what’s next for our state. We have the opportunity to make real change where it matters most — in our schools, in our criminal justice system, in our environment — and it’s up to all of us to see it through. John is the leader with the vision and the experience to do it, but he simply can’t do it without your support. = | | = With gratitude, Team King * | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our _.
