name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
ou may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zirtvs4msriqit03f6hdgnkgu8bkbggoqtmc83o8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uti3ctllcdgm4slkceo6ctdh65rj2ctkmjg62t72eurj4ctlmhir6cr5c3gjfdtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shgcoq61cr561p72pjhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5c1g64pr7cjjm49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb8n0dhu5nov4r5a6c2h4hi6bh44dm3v3f4leuu8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57b8li7t2i2r905vct900n0lb3m2u3pidon7m38_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkr2167c6j32n43ps8p4oqfnrdtoapacu1db7bro_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk64cleaqgtkf0nv3bl46tcsu1s5c1d0n72alnlo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg6sc2dh85tkron8k81lrratinksav45ch5n7tng_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zitqqmg9vo0o6pqib7g4mdpbhrlkrg0mjqer3ee0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd9l2s2s6fp8khfh81k4jtfljnibas09h9nb8c78_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2t5tgc3ue0etmaugjfn0il4bik42tdo12khnaoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhecvjuakt99lplqrfh44vtm8nrklm7nnu8jguno_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znqd87jvf1s3lgu1msnq0ic0t4iulgn91hh37thg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z992ocj15f6j8iebiuuhgrig7p7rnoq9oejfcdq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1h6epr4sth2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z53l941v0rdf1kkn85o781du3b0ehmjcn1ja0038_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c1g64pr7cjjm49fg)

name: Survey (via LBR for Congress)
subject: Is it time for billionaires to pay their fair share?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
President Biden's budget plan is responsible and forward-thinking.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44161540/340377780/-1281563454?refcode=em_pet_220415poll_n_surv_actives_5_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjFjNjk1Ni1jNGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6W2KBgOrjAHPhgW3IdeUNOaOBHij6Rs-kz7_Nxv5wE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44161543/340377781/-1281563454?refcode=em_pet_220415poll_n_surv_actives_5_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjFjNjk1Ni1jNGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6W2KBgOrjAHPhgW3IdeUNOaOBHij6Rs-kz7_Nxv5wE=) President Biden recently put forth a budget plan to increase economic opportunity for all, reduce the deficit, and advance measures to address the climate crisis.

It's a responsible and forward-thinking agenda – and it's covered by making billionaires pay their fair share of taxes.

**We want to know your thoughts. Please take our one-click poll and tell us if you think billionaires should pay their fair share to finance a budget plan that lifts up working families:** | | **[Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44161549/340377788/1812314851?refcode=em_pet_220415poll_n_surv_actives_5_ng_n_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjFjNjk1Ni1jNGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6W2KBgOrjAHPhgW3IdeUNOaOBHij6Rs-kz7_Nxv5wE=)**
---
| **[No](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44161550/340377792/1812314851?refcode=em_pet_220415poll_n_surv_actives_5_ng_n_b2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjFjNjk1Ni1jNGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6W2KBgOrjAHPhgW3IdeUNOaOBHij6Rs-kz7_Nxv5wE=)**
---
It's time we leveled the playing field. The last time Republicans were in power, they passed a tax cut to help out special interests and the top 1% — while leaving other Americans behind.

We have a chance to correct this. But the far-right is doing everything it can to muddle the messages that people hear. So we need to hear from you.

Thank you,

The Team at LBR for Congress
** **
**Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44161551/340377820/-1281563454?refcode=em_pet_220415poll_n_surv_actives_5_ng_n_bio&refcode2=biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjFjNjk1Ni1jNGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S6W2KBgOrjAHPhgW3IdeUNOaOBHij6Rs-kz7_Nxv5wE=)****

It's a responsible and forward-thinking agenda – and it's covered by making billionaires pay their fair share of taxes. We want to know your thoughts. Please take our one-click poll and tell us if you think billionaires should pay their fair share to finance a budget plan that lifts up working families: | | = | = It's time we leveled the playing field. The last time Republicans were in power, they passed a tax cut to help out special interests and the top 1% — while leaving other Americans behind. We have a chance to correct this. But the far-right is doing everything it can to muddle the messages that people hear. So we need to hear from you. Thank you, The Team at LBR for Congress Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers. **= Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. **

**I'm not joking: According to a new report, the Senate GOP campaign arm raised $43 million in Q1!!!**
Republicans are raising money hand over fist, and Democrats simply CANNOT afford to fall behind these bozos. That's why we urgently need 1,000 donations today to make sure we can go toe-to-toe with the Republican Senate campaign arm.** [So, will you make a contribution right away to help us get 1,000 donations before midnight and give us the boost we need to protect our _very_ slim Senate majority?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44163208/340384548/628857336?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk729-fr-aai-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyNTcwMmJkLWM1YmMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HAKmlWtlHECH8rBmPq_Iyn0AFlHObIyVsAvcVB_donA=)**

Vernon Jones Surges to First Place in GA-10 Republican Primary, New Poll Shows
---
| |
---
|
---
| Watkinsville, Georgia (April 15, 2022) In a new poll conducted by Remington Research Group, former State Representative and Trump endorsed candidate Vernon Jones emerged as the clear frontrunner in the open race for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. According to the poll, Jones leads the eight candidate field with 20% of the vote and a four point lead over his nearest competitor Mike Collins at 16%, Paul Broun at 15%, Timothy Barr at 7%, David Curry at 5%, Alan Sims at 5%, Mitchell Swan at 4%, Marc McMain at 3%, and undecideds at 25%.
"What this poll shows is clear: the momentum in this race is on our side. The people of the 10th Congressional District want a Congressman who has earned the trust of President Trump, isn't afraid to fight against the Radical Left, and won't back down to the GOP Establishment. Despite every attack from the Fake News media and GOP Establishment, our campaign continues to connect with more and more Georgians every single day," said Vernon Jones
This poll was conducted from April 10th-11th. It included a sample size of 703 likely GOP primary voters, with a margin of error of 3.7% with a 95% level of confidence. Since entering the race, Rep. Jones has surged nearly 20 points while previous frontrunner Mike Collins has shed nearly more than the same amount after previously polling at 35.1%.
The Vernon Jones campaign is the only campaign in this race to have been endorsed by former President Trump, in addition to Mayor Rudy Giuliani, General Michael Flynn, and former GA-10 congressional candidate Patrick Whitt.
To view the results of the Remington poll, visit here:

About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Vernon Jones Surges to First Place in GA-10 Republican Primary, New Poll Shows | | | | Watkinsville, Georgia (April 15, 2022) In a new poll conducted by Remington Research Group, former State Representative and Trump endorsed candidate Vernon Jones emerged as the clear frontrunner in the open race for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. According to the poll, Jones leads the eight candidate field with 20% of the vote and a four point lead over his nearest competitor Mike Collins at 16%, Paul Broun at 15%, Timothy Barr at 7%, David Curry at 5%, Alan Sims at 5%, Mitchell Swan at 4%, Marc McMain at 3%, and undecideds at 25%. "What this poll shows is clear: the momentum in this race is on our side. The people of the 10th Congressional District want a Congressman who has earned the trust of President Trump, isn't afraid to fight against the Radical Left, and won't back down to the GOP Establishment. Despite every attack from the Fake News media and GOP Establishment, our campaign continues to connect with more and more Georgians every single day," said Vernon Jones This poll was conducted from April 10th-11th. It included a sample size of 703 likely GOP primary voters, with a margin of error of 3.7% with a 95% level of confidence. Since entering the race, Rep. Jones has surged nearly 20 points while previous frontrunner Mike Collins has shed nearly more than the same amount after previously polling at 35.1%. The Vernon Jones campaign is the only campaign in this race to have been endorsed by former President Trump, in addition to Mayor Rudy Giuliani, General Michael Flynn, and former GA-10 congressional candidate Patrick Whitt. To view the results of the Remington poll, visit here: == To learn more about the Remington Research Group, visit here: == == | | | == | | About Vernon Jones | | Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First. | | | | | == == | Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia.com | | Vernon Jones for Congress | PO Box 581, Watkinsville, GA 30677 | | Sent by mailto:vernonjonespress@jonesforgeorgia.com powered by

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: A Tennessee for you, no matter how you pray
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Good morning, Peter.
As we enter into this holy time of year for many Tennesseans, I am reflecting on the importance of building cooperative, constructive, and positive interactions between people of different faiths in our state. At a time when the concept of religious liberty is so frequently used to steer our public policy, it seems to disappear when it comes to upholding rights and respect for our state’s religious minorities. From TN’s largest newspaper running an anti-Muslim ad to state-funded foster programs refusing potential parents because of their Jewish faith, it’s clear Tennessee has a lot of work to do in order to create a safe, welcoming future for all.

Whether this month represents to you a time of reflection and empathy, redemption and unity, or rebirth and sacrifice — all of us deserve to practice our faith without threat of oppression or violence. That is why we fight every day to elect Democratic candidates who believe that all Tennesseans deserve a better future, no matter how you pray.

We wish a kosher and joyous Passover, Ramadan Mubarak, and Happy Easter to all who celebrate.

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

--

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Toby Anderson
subject: Are you celebrating this weekend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Toby Anderson for Congress Inc
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/9fdcdd8929a60608/d3b9dae7e028b14cc3d6b838967d376c/38863)

Peter, I just wanted to take a moment to wish all those who celebrate Easter and/or Passover a wonderful Holy Weekend. This is time for family and friends, and I hope that you are celebrating with your loved ones. We have a lot of work to do to flip this district and take back the House this November, but this is a much-needed break for many. Please enjoy the celebrations this weekend, and know that my family and I are wishing you well. Sincerely,
Toby Anderson

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We need to catch up
body:
Help me continue the fight to protect freedom in Florida.
To view this email as a web page, go [here.](https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5b53cd4fc08fdd3a9db5888ce46d86f087ec51e768543d5a285fb68d97f19ff5c79d04cac1fb383e13bf5b67db79ca87a3a8ebed22ff1825dced18842dbef401e04ef2f75ef6dfec)
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fcfe1818fd852b63c3458f13c31bd4b6e6b0b49eea442d20e015f2543a88a8c7a243b5bbccb2e04ba88dd8796caff6bfc6b7d9c2eca160ed)
---
I'll be brief.

# Peter,

Despite the radical left's threats and desperate attempts to stop our campaign any way they can — We officially filed for US Senate. As the Proven Republican Fighter in this race, I have an obligation to take our America-First movement to Washington... and that's exactly what I plan to do. I told you from the beginning of this campaign that we would face an uphill battle, Peter. The woke mob, the corrupt Washington establishment, the Hollywood elites — they all want to see us fail. They didn't expect us to make it this far... My fight to protect and expand our Second Amendment rights in Oklahoma made them hate us... but my bill to ban abortion starting at conception made us the radical left's #1 enemy. clean_body: Peter, as the Proven Republican Fighter in this race, I have an obligation to take our America-First movement to Washington... and that's exactly | Peter, Despite the radical left's threats and desperate attempts to stop our campaign any way they can — We officially filed for US Senate. As the Proven Republican Fighter in this race, I have an obligation to take our America-First movement to Washington... and that's exactly what I plan to do. I told you from the beginning of this campaign that we would face an uphill battle, Peter. The woke mob, the corrupt Washington establishment, the Hollywood elites — they all want to see us fail. They didn't expect us to make it this far... My fight to protect and expand our Second Amendment rights in Oklahoma made them hate us... but my bill to ban abortion starting at conception made us the radical left's #1 enemy. Our movement for limited government and individual liberty is resonating with voters in Oklahoma and all across the country because they are currently experiencing the alternative: Unaffordable prices everywhere we go Food shortages Supply chain issues Mask mandates for children Men playing girls' sports Lack of trust in our electoral process Constant threats to our Second Amendment rights Radical ideologies and hypersexual content taught to our children in classrooms * And a crazy guy in the White House telling us this is "better" We have a real opportunity to take our country back from these radical socialists and Make America Great Again. We are 74 days away from the primary election, Peter, and I'd be honored to have your vote on June 28th. Support our America-First movement by selecting an option below to make an URGENT contribution to our campaign today. It has been a blessing serving the people of Oklahoma in the legislature. We have achieved a great deal, and, with your support, we will take our fight to the US Senate. Thank you, Senator Nathan Dahm Candidate for United States Senate Personal cell number: (918) 615-2335 | | Nathan Dahm, PO Box 2323, Broken Arrow, Oklahoma 74013

name: Team Diehl
subject: ICYMI: Chris Doughty's company fined by the state for environmental violations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010EOqOyIEqpEs1bYd2Cjw5mNj25ASl7eU8TRekLKMTgPEzDVtWBDQMXFnQJy3pjPK_vUkX770ZRsXQhFjUkwdOOvjcmcjW_x11g_gvqNykCeFIp5wItvpxBvgWDBaJ_Z_LJb4xLIljzdeNa9zFhsab1uv65LEFTXGIFHoEZtivvICUjHkYioMcJ3FSD4rtyk8NmCqZi1_I8MUhD8sPe2mEpJ_iwbvrMcPeU0pegeCJ6WgNil3YV7wnjIP7X6goDhZmHfqi5waedaKBZlI0cYiMKOtYtFlhaw5b8BkeQTkf__nmigOJZv48XS-fEynZczEeWgOzR1_Ss1Dyyou45xdyWcITXBFdWQ2&c=H8lmXJWTsJE1e8NpJt9zkK5iPHT5SBVOoVXLPzFc5iDP5woipBHLxw==&ch=EstUAO5SAF57Hk3TlGG0hYl4P5qiVZHc_HJZy8VNdNHmr2PgRUp7cg==)
---
---
Did you catch today's Attleboro Sun Chronicle story about Capstan Atlantic, Chris Doughty's company, being fined by the Massachusetts Department of Environmental Protection for violations at its manufacturing facility?
---
---
| [Read the Full Story](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010EOqOyIEqpEs1bYd2Cjw5mNj25ASl7eU8TRekLKMTgPEzDVtWBDQMXFnQJy3pjPK_vUkX770ZRsXQhFjUkwdOOvjcmcjW_x11g_gvqNykCeFIp5wItvpxBvgWDBaJ_Z_LJb4xLIljzdeNa9zFhsab1uv65LEFTXGIFHoEZtivvICUjHkYioMcJ3FSD4rtyk8NmCqZi1_I8MUhD8sPe2mEpJ_iwbvrMcPeU0pegeCJ6WgNil3YV7wnjIP7X6goDhZmHfqi5waedaKBZlI0cYiMKOtYtFlhaw5b8BkeQTkf__nmigOJZv48XS-fEynZczEeWgOzR1_Ss1Dyyou45xdyWcITXBFdWQ2&c=H8lmXJWTsJE1e8NpJt9zkK5iPHT5SBVOoVXLPzFc5iDP5woipBHLxw==&ch=EstUAO5SAF57Hk3TlGG0hYl4P5qiVZHc_HJZy8VNdNHmr2PgRUp7cg==)
---
---
| "A local company whose president is a candidate for the Republican gubernatorial nomination has been cited by state officials for more than a dozen environmental violations... The company was also in violation of air pollution control rules, the DEP said."
---
|
---
| According to the Sun Chronicle story, the violations occurred while Doughty was still President of the company last year, and he personally signed an Administrative Consent Order in which the company promised to correct issues and pay a fine.
It's not the first time Doughty's Capstan Atlantic has run afoul of state law. According to [data from the Office of the Attorney General](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010EOqOyIEqpEs1bYd2Cjw5mNj25ASl7eU8TRekLKMTgPEzDVtWBDQMXFnQJy3pjPK_Px0gTXooi6iGCdQZcHUxxTHXiMvYQI1l9sm-fqVfzAcmKaeFDzVB4BgvDg3kadmDMRbHutkfYbFnrVMMA8g-TLAKvqaPb33oWkg_F3FMyKVOQZoUIzYzCqWfxxK_7FnMQ-gVVCFLh2Wokx-4-1p8Q==&c=H8lmXJWTsJE1e8NpJt9zkK5iPHT5SBVOoVXLPzFc5iDP5woipBHLxw==&ch=EstUAO5SAF57Hk3TlGG0hYl4P5qiVZHc_HJZy8VNdNHmr2PgRUp7cg==), Capstan Atlantic reportedly paid a fine in 2015 for failing to pay wages to 18 employees as required by law.
Doughty consistently touts his business record as the main reason voters should support him to be Governor.
Make sure you know who you're really dealing with.
---
|
---
| |
---
| PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS

|

name: Team Holly
subject: Picking a fight with Jimmy Kimmel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress**
body:
Members of Congress should not be picking fights with comedians

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44168572/340408877/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220415JimmyKimmel_N_TeamHolly_90do_8_N_TESTA_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ3NTk5My1kM2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clWBPo7c2qeIzH9Lnklc_y04jYW2Xu8ds91SONTsD6Y=)
Peter,
Instead of working, Marjorie is tweeting.
Marge, who has a track record of spewing violent and threatening speech, expressing support for the execution of prominent Democratic politicians, disguising her hate as “jokes”, endorsing countless fringe conspiracy theories, and flat out supporting dangerous groups such as white nationalists, insurrectionists, and the people behind them — saw a recent joke by Jimmy Kimmel as a threat.
Her hypocritical meltdown at a late-night comedian’s joke is just another reason she shouldn't be a member of Congress — especially not one who represents our beloved state.
**[Peter, Congress is no place for Marge’s hypocrisy or hate. With a donation of $5 or more, you can help send someone who focuses on solving problems, not getting into Twitter fights with comedians.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44168573/340408878/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220415JimmyKimmel_N_TeamHolly_90do_8_N_TESTA_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ3NTk5My1kM2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clWBPo7c2qeIzH9Lnklc_y04jYW2Xu8ds91SONTsD6Y=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44168574/340408879/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220415JimmyKimmel_N_TeamHolly_90do_8_N_TESTA_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ3NTk5My1kM2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clWBPo7c2qeIzH9Lnklc_y04jYW2Xu8ds91SONTsD6Y=)
In response to Kimmel, Marjorie called the same federal law enforcement officials who she believed, just months prior, were unjustified and unworthy of recognition for their attempts to protect the Capitol against violent insurrectionists.
Insurrectionists who she called patriots and who she had a part in organizing and inciting on January 6th.
This woman is dripping with hypocrisy. As Jimmy Kimmel himself said, **“she’s a snowflake and a sociopath at the same time.”**
**[We cannot allow such an unhinged, unfair, and unprofessional candidate continue to represent us in Congress. Can you donate $5 or more to help send her home in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44168575/340408880/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220415JimmyKimmel_N_TeamHolly_90do_8_N_TESTA_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ3NTk5My1kM2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clWBPo7c2qeIzH9Lnklc_y04jYW2Xu8ds91SONTsD6Y=)**

body:
| | | | [ ](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=f275e2d880&e=544bb4cd89)

| | |
---
| Peter,
Our pro-democracy campaign to unseat extremist and Putin apologist Warren Davidson is firing on all cylinders!
We had a very successful “Meet Phil” event last night (thanks to all who attended!) in Cincinnati. I explained to my Republican and Democratic friends that keeping politicians like Davidson in office — who have refused to stand firmly against Russia and with Ukraine — makes America look weak and undermines America’s values. The [national](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=c5befba02d&e=544bb4cd89) media is taking note, and [this WLWT profile](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=cd1eed3281&e=544bb4cd89) that just came out gives an overview of what sets Davidson and me apart. **Namely, I’ve got a law-and-order resume as a former prosecutor and county commissioner. I stand 100% with Ukraine during this time of war. I oppose blowing up the national debt and support fighting climate change.** Here’s some really big news about Congressional District 8: For the first time, part of it stretches into Hamilton County — actually a large part on the west side. _These are the folks that know me and have never seen Davidson on the ballot_. I’ve really been enjoying reconnecting with voters there! I so appreciate the support you’ve given but we must keep up the momentum. [Please contribute to my campaign](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=44c1b337bd&e=544bb4cd89) as soon as you can and connect with me on social media. I look forward to seeing you at the next event! All the best,
---
|
---
| | | | OUTRAGE OF THE WEEK
---
| My opponent now has the dubious distinction of being identified by national media as a member of the “[Pro-Russian-War Crimes-Caucus](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=a0f7037ea7&e=544bb4cd89)” along with such luminaries as Marjorie Taylor Greene and Paul Gosar. Davidson voted against NATO and opposed collecting and preserving evidence of Russian war crimes in Ukraine. Let’s not let him turn the GOP into the POP (Party of Putin)! **Davidson. Must. Go.**
---
|
---
| **Do you know that early voting has already started . . . and _the election is just over two weeks away!_** Please chip in whatever you can to my campaign — $5, $10, $100, $1000 — so we can continue to get the word out to voters. **Your donation can help defend our democracy** from Putin apologists like my opponent who risk making our country look weak and vulnerable. Please share information about [my campaign](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=930f2ea589&e=544bb4cd89) and find me on [Facebook](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=b1dca46541&e=544bb4cd89) and [Twitter](https://heimlichforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93d2b220a5efc44f0b96119a2&id=da4a08affa&e=544bb4cd89). body:
| | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg-uhbR2_FA90ohoKeup5yfpOue4NfQOhIk_9f0fBrwbxKwTZVZQpIQmFaxkTmYiDJWV0Rywh05jYKmWYwwm2V-fHBrE2E-dRewMHQup5pkdX9HUc7lOzkXN5yMr1Q_Zxy7439M37bf7OPq4kQJitRzePd-YLzs3qnHqfLxxJ0FfINZIc_s-9tjsemFuVJptKuw/3l8/6ugqvSVJR2abeAb6yH17lg/h0/k-nJLPVxHxSYUnQe7spTrdDM8AWccotHYMP1T0U-89I) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6U--QmQ8EZU-MvA5b0GNz4X4ukj-sJRpQ9KG1hnvTR8OHuqtpWdE1qZuBhRDYTIGp6knVLWHAnXsJ1X6MNtTyKvpDVHhKH2_qjueSz_Zf5WhQKGVjoGOTTn6SoDdG-jvsNiCWB_gYK6TJYc_hlJSNjQjjeVjc-Wo8QZN0If2qNoUgyS2H4jILz6u4FpJo07sPqD5tI9R6oxYdCmio3v1HGvRkZ1db8J2lkmTQDjIN-7B9btt4D5wINiLB5YvS6837KnN6t0_1xHEXWrirUQw7BdeB7ruS-CRqaB9gh0SaWxxjJ1gnTZbiqIM1n6BOdp63Se8NFmFGZ6nUXNJoSlwWunmnW6-IuEjagmoA83Z3uXuTRMvIac9YIS9zA02YftXNjqNRz_Mw4LJyRfsnYL4xwmTZc8wXS4EPAALLtgX0IPPI0SOoctyTmHOm6mKB9SLy5/3l8/6ugqvSVJR2abeAb6yH17lg/h1/1UkQwV0SdrmIsa223RJraPLkcrfBqDZmC1HbSdIEqRA)
This is NOT the kind of email I wanted to send you:

My campaign has a strict mid-month deadline coming up in a few hours and still falling $4,133 short of reaching our $7,831 goal.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. This is NOT the kind of email I wanted to send you: My campaign has a strict mid-month deadline coming up in a few hours and still falling $4,133 short of reaching our $7,831 goal. I won’t sugarcoat this: if we FAIL to hit this goal, Republicans could win my seat and our entire House Majority. | | | | | | | We really don’t have much time left. Our mid-month fundraising numbers LOCK will lock at midnight. And if we don’t hit our goal, Republicans will use that to their advantage. | | | | | | I'm counting on you, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: Roy Cooper
subject: Your support is essential to our mission for North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We’re working hard to deliver the progress North Carolinians deserve. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44169003/340412157/823540626?refcode=ea.e071331c-d5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e071331c-d5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDcxMzMxYy1kNWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ccWBskLqatczQmDAotIRF3Iwdt_tslRgAAleWoQIZLI=&emci=08bcd130-c3bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e071331c-d5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter, I know that between our team and other political campaigns, your inbox is probably full of folks asking you to donate. Trust me — I get the emails too. So I want to lay out just a few reasons why we are asking for your continued support — and why I hope you’ll donate before our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight. **[If you’re already with us in the work to continue moving North Carolina forward, please, contribute any amount you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44169004/340412162/863163525?refcode=ea.e071331c-d5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e071331c-d5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDcxMzMxYy1kNWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ccWBskLqatczQmDAotIRF3Iwdt_tslRgAAleWoQIZLI=)**
* GOP lawmakers gerrymandered our legislative maps to try to guarantee supermajorities for their party in Raleigh — and it’s up to committed Democrats like us to stop them.

* If Republicans gain those supermajorities, they’d be able to push through a radical agenda that’s wrong for our state. Just look at states like Texas, Oklahoma, and Florida to see some of the bad legislation they will try to enact. The GOP has been overrun by far-right activists who are more concerned with attacking women, LGBTQ Americans, and immigrants and taking us backward than with solving the real problems facing our communities.

* From the rising cost of living to attacks on voting rights to the threats posed by climate change, there are so many legitimate concerns that need to be addressed. My administration is hard at work delivering for North Carolinians, and we cannot risk Republicans blocking our progress.

**Peter, your support is essential to our mission for North Carolina. My team and I are committed to backing strong Democratic legislative candidates, and we’re relying on you to make it possible.** **[We’re just $3,085 away from our mid-month fundraising goal. Please, chip in anything you can right now to help close the gap>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44169005/340412163/863163525?refcode=ea.e071331c-d5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e071331c-d5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDcxMzMxYy1kNWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ccWBskLqatczQmDAotIRF3Iwdt_tslRgAAleWoQIZLI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44169007/340412164/863163525?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=ea.e071331c-d5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.e071331c-d5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDcxMzMxYy1kNWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ccWBskLqatczQmDAotIRF3Iwdt_tslRgAAleWoQIZLI=)

clean_body: We’re working hard to deliver the progress North Carolinians deserve. | Peter, I know that between our team and other political campaigns, your inbox is probably full of folks asking you to donate. Trust me — I get the emails too. So I want to lay out just a few reasons why we are asking for your continued support — and why I hope you’ll donate before our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight. = GOP lawmakers gerrymandered our legislative maps to try to guarantee supermajorities for their party in Raleigh — and it’s up to committed Democrats like us to stop them. If Republicans gain those supermajorities, they’d be able to push through a radical agenda that’s wrong for our state. Just look at states like Texas, Oklahoma, and Florida to see some of the bad legislation they will try to enact. The GOP has been overrun by far-right activists who are more concerned with attacking women, LGBTQ Americans, and immigrants and taking us backward than with solving the real problems facing our communities. From the rising cost of living to attacks on voting rights to the threats posed by climate change, there are so many legitimate concerns that need to be addressed. My administration is hard at work delivering for North Carolinians, and we cannot risk Republicans blocking our progress. Peter, your support is essential to our mission for North Carolina. My team and I are committed to backing strong Democratic legislative candidates, and we’re relying on you to make it possible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you very much, Roy = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am writing to ask you to contribute $27 to Nina Turner's campaign for Congress. She is up against an enormous amount of outside spending, and she needs our help. So please, chip in today to send a member of our movement to Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
With only a few weeks left in her primary, Nina is counting on our movement's support to help win her election.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to support Nina Turner, one of our movement’s most committed leaders. But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why your contribution is so important – especially today.
Nina Turner has been on the front lines of the fight for higher wages, Medicare for All, climate justice, racial justice and a world of peace. She is standing with workers organizing at Starbucks, with seniors who cannot afford their prescription drugs and people – young and not so young – who are saddled with student debt.
That’s why I am supporting her run for the U.S. House in Ohio’s 11th Congressional District.
With the primary election coming right up on May 3rd, Nina Turner needs our help. There are super PACs and powerful special interest groups that are spending a huge amount of money trying to defeat her. Just this week, a super PAC spent more than $1 million on ads in support of Nina's opponent.
Why are they so afraid of Nina?
The answer is clear: Nina is a different kind of Democrat — a progressive, grassroots activist who knows that real change never takes place from the top on down, but always from the bottom on up. She has spent her political life trying to build a multi-generational, multi-racial political movement which is prepared to take on the big-money interests that have so much economic and political power in our country.
So with only a few weeks left in this primary, she is counting on a lot of donations today to take on the enormous amounts of spending that outside groups have poured into her race.
That is why I am asking:
**[Can you please contribute $27 today to stand with Nina Turner before her primary election? Every donation will go directly to her campaign for Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170652/340418928/413031954?refcode2=c1d305f6-d6bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220415-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQzMDVmNi1kNmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VmdTDvHJ8AW9cgpjYpIGQDkEljmzY11KJV4YCN-sgjs=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170653/340418929/413031954?refcode2=c1d305f6-d6bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220415-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQzMDVmNi1kNmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VmdTDvHJ8AW9cgpjYpIGQDkEljmzY11KJV4YCN-sgjs=)**
Nina is running her campaign the right way, powered by grassroots organizing and reaching out directly to working people.
Her campaign is knocking on doors across the district talking to people one-on-one about the need to fight for a progressive agenda that creates a government that works for all of our people, not just the one percent. Nina is focused on taking on the powerful corporate interests that are gouging people at the gas pump, the grocery store, the pharmacy counter and just about everywhere else.
Nina’s team has already knocked on tens of thousands of doors, but they need our help to keep the effort up until the primary on May 3rd. Because if she has the resources to turn out her supporters, she can win this election.
But no single person can win an election and transform this country alone. It is going to require all of us.
**[Please make a $27 contribution to Nina Turner's campaign for Congress. With the primary election coming up very soon on May 3rd, there has never been a more important time to show you stand with Nina.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170654/340418930/413031954?refcode2=c1d305f6-d6bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220415-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQzMDVmNi1kNmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VmdTDvHJ8AW9cgpjYpIGQDkEljmzY11KJV4YCN-sgjs=)**
Right now Nina is relying on our movement to continue running the kind of grassroots campaign that can win this election.
Thank you for adding your contribution today to help keep Nina's local canvassers knocking on doors, and calling and texting voters right up until the primary.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

clean_body: With only a few weeks left in her primary, Nina is counting on our movement's support to help win her election. Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to support Nina Turner, one of our movement’s most committed leaders. But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why your contribution is so important – especially today. Nina Turner has been on the front lines of the fight for higher wages, Medicare for All, climate justice, racial justice and a world of peace. She is standing with workers organizing at Starbucks, with seniors who cannot afford their prescription drugs and people – young and not so young – who are saddled with student debt. That’s why I am supporting her run for the U.S. House in Ohio’s 11th Congressional District. With the primary election coming right up on May 3rd, Nina Turner needs our help. There are super PACs and powerful special interest groups that are spending a huge amount of money trying to defeat her. Just this week, a super PAC spent more than $1 million on ads in support of Nina's opponent. Why are they so afraid of Nina? The answer is clear: Nina is a different kind of Democrat — a progressive, grassroots activist who knows that real change never takes place from the top on down, but always from the bottom on up. She has spent her political life trying to build a multi-generational, multi-racial political movement which is prepared to take on the big-money interests that have so much economic and political power in our country. So with only a few weeks left in this primary, she is counting on a lot of donations today to take on the enormous amounts of spending that outside groups have poured into her race. That is why I am asking: = = Nina is running her campaign the right way, powered by grassroots organizing and reaching out directly to working people. Her campaign is knocking on doors across the district talking to people one-on-one about the need to fight for a progressive agenda that creates a government that works for all of our people, not just the one percent. Nina is focused on taking on the powerful corporate interests that are gouging people at the gas pump, the grocery store, the pharmacy counter and just about everywhere else. Nina’s team has already knocked on tens of thousands of doors, but they need our help to keep the effort up until the primary on May 3rd. Because if she has the resources to turn out her supporters, she can win this election. But no single person can win an election and transform this country alone. It is going to require all of us. = Right now Nina is relying on our movement to continue running the kind of grassroots campaign that can win this election. Thank you for adding your contribution today to help keep Nina's local canvassers knocking on doors, and calling and texting voters right up until the primary. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders = * Paid for by Nina Turner for Us Nina Turner for Us PO Box 91956 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe.

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170704/340419366/1026678351?refcode=can_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=)

| | Doyle Canning here.

I wanted to reach out to tell you the story about how a group of concerned citizens rallied together to stop the massive Jordan Cove Fracked Gas Pipeline here on the Oregon Coast.

But, first, I have to ask for your support. [ Our May 17th primary is only 32 days away and our opponent takes big checks from billionaires and fossil fuel companies, including Jordan Cove LNG!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170705/340419372/558575031?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=) [ Can you please chip in $5 to our grassroots campaign to send a true climate champion to Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170706/340419373/558575031?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170707/340419374/558575031?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=) This is Jordan Cove. You might not know it, but just a few months ago this was going to be the site of a fracked natural gas pipeline.

[The company would have seized all of this](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170708/340419375/558575031?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=) – private land, public land, tribal land — to build a pipeline that would carry dangerous, polluting fossil fuels over 220 miles and 5 major rivers, including some of the best salmon fisheries anywhere in the world. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170712/340419377/558575031?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=) Proposed Export Facility But — faced with fossil fuel destruction — Oregonians of all stripes rallied together to STOP this project. Organizers, activists, students, landowners, scientists, and concerned citizens united in opposition to take on billionaire fossil fuel interests. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170718/340419383/558575031?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=) [We came together – we faced down a giant corporation – and we WON!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170722/340419388/558575031?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=) Thanks to the collective efforts of hundreds of folks, we did it! That strength and solidarity and hope for the future are what this campaign is built on.

[But now — the voters of Oregon’s 4th District have a choice:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170725/340419394/558575031?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=) to either embrace a bold climate agenda or settle for a status-quo politician who supported Jordan Cove LNG and accepts big campaign donations from billionaires and fossil fuel companies.

Unlike my opponent, I will always stand up for our environment and never take a dime from billionaires, massive corporations, or their lobbyists.

I know big things can happen when we come together, so I’m asking for your help. [ Can you please support our people-powered movement by chipping in $5, $10, or even $25 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170726/340419395/558575031?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=) | | | [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44170727/340419396/306376849?refcode=EM_BS_CANNING_220415_FR_JORDANCOVE_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDgyMGEzMS1kN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sKbTfya4wDaIbyLm37n83FQe5wzvcbL8EKxrJ5RDXAA=)

clean_body: | = | | Doyle Canning here. I wanted to reach out to tell you the story about how a group of concerned citizens rallied together to stop the massive Jordan Cove Fracked Gas Pipeline here on the Oregon Coast. But, first, I have to ask for your support. = = = This is Jordan Cove. You might not know it, but just a few months ago this was going to be the site of a fracked natural gas pipeline. = – private land, public land, tribal land — to build a pipeline that would carry dangerous, polluting fossil fuels over 220 miles and 5 major rivers, including some of the best salmon fisheries anywhere in the world. = Proposed Export Facility But — faced with fossil fuel destruction — Oregonians of all stripes rallied together to STOP this project. Organizers, activists, students, landowners, scientists, and concerned citizens united in opposition to take on billionaire fossil fuel interests. = = Thanks to the collective efforts of hundreds of folks, we did it! That strength and solidarity and hope for the future are what this campaign is built on. = to either embrace a bold climate agenda or settle for a status-quo politician who supported Jordan Cove LNG and accepts big campaign donations from billionaires and fossil fuel companies. Unlike my opponent, I will always stand up for our environment and never take a dime from billionaires, massive corporations, or their lobbyists. I know big things can happen when we come together, so I’m asking for your help. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I know we can do this. Doyle Canning | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. subject: A government that works for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44153400/340343900/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGQ3NjZjNS1iN2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7fo9hICGLEhvO6-PwGSYaaTusesRWX4ThEqhZgXolo=&emci=f5bb126f-41bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=50d766c5-b7bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=17773801)
---

| | It's been a tough week for New York, Peter. First, Lieutenant Governor Brian Benjamin was arraigned in federal court on bribery charges. And earlier today, former Nassau County Executive Ed Mangano was sentenced to 12 years in jail in his own bribery case. **We have a long way to go to restore people's trust in government, and the first step is making sure that no one is above the law.** While I'm obviously disappointed in these two men, I'm encouraged to see our justice system holding powerful people accountable. New York was home of the old Tammany Hall Machine, which was infamous for government corruption. Politicians took bribes and gave kickbacks routinely and shamelessly. _And no one ever had to answer for it._ That's not the case today, Peter. When politicians involve themselves in pay-for-play schemes, they get caught, arrested, and jailed. This week's news on government corruption, no matter how concerning, is proof that the system works. **But there is so much more work to do to clean up government. And politicians must have the courage and urgency to act.** In the Nassau Legislature, I'm fighting for increased transparency from our elected officials and an increase in staffing for the Inspector General's office that holds them accountable. As a member of Congress, I'll push for that same transparency, and will also support banning members of Congress from selling stocks. And, as I always have, I support term limits for members of Congress, so that power won't become entrenched. **Our government only works when the people have faith in their institutions and lawmakers.** Those reforms are key first steps in restoring that trust. More to come, _Josh_ PS- Happy Easter and Happy Passover to all who celebrate. clean_body: | | | It's been a tough week for New York, Peter. First, Lieutenant Governor Brian Benjamin was arraigned in federal court on bribery charges. And earlier today, former Nassau County Executive Ed Mangano was sentenced to 12 years in jail in his own bribery case. We have a long way to go to restore people's trust in government, and the first step is making sure that no one is above the law. While I'm obviously disappointed in these two men, I'm encouraged to see our justice system holding powerful people accountable. New York was home of the old Tammany Hall Machine, which was infamous for government corruption. Politicians took bribes and gave kickbacks routinely and shamelessly. And no one ever had to answer for it. That's not the case today, Peter. When politicians involve themselves in pay-for-play schemes, they get caught, arrested, and jailed. This week's news on government corruption, no matter how concerning, is proof that the system works. But there is so much more work to do to clean up government. And politicians must have the courage and urgency to act. In the Nassau Legislature, I'm fighting for increased transparency from our elected officials and an increase in staffing for the Inspector General's office that holds them accountable. As a member of Congress, I'll push for that same transparency, and will also support banning members of Congress from selling stocks. And, as I always have, I support term limits for members of Congress, so that power won't become entrenched. Our government only works when the people have faith in their institutions and lawmakers. Those reforms are key first steps in restoring that trust. More to come, Josh PS- Happy Easter and Happy Passover to all who celebrate. subject: What Hemingway said
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name. It's The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn by Mark Twain.
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os2-kQ5H9N)
_Please see a special message from our sponsor:_
---
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59968309:s2-kQ5H9N:m:1:2532013465:D9D002046557F1503B17E899FEE33D88:r)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.
Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name. It's _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain.
**Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.**
But here at Hillsdale College, we're working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America 's greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, "****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** "](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59968309:s2-kQ5H9N:m:1:2532013465:D9D002046557F1503B17E899FEE33D88:r)
Twain's realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever.
Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I 'd like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59968309:s2-kQ5H9N:m:1:2532013465:D9D002046557F1503B17E899FEE33D88:r).
---
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59968309:s2-kQ5H9N:m:1:2532013465:D9D002046557F1503B17E899FEE33D88:r)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone (or removed from your local library!).
You can use this secure link to get your copy of **" Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories "** on DVD:
[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59968309:s2-kQ5H9N:m:1:2532013465:D9D002046557F1503B17E899FEE33D88:r)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, "All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ " Don't let this classic disappear forever.
Get your DVD box set of **" Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories " **right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link:
[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59968309:s2-kQ5H9N:m:1:2532013465:D9D002046557F1503B17E899FEE33D88:r)

---

Friend,

I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump.

He fought to put America First for four years as our President, and I plan to do the same for Alaska as your next Member of Congress.

I'm ready to get to Washington to FIGHT for our values, but I can only do that with YOUR support, Friend.

While this race is just beginning, we only have about two months until the election. I have President Trump's support, and now I need yours.

_**[Please rush in a donation of ANY AMOUNT to publicly stand with President Trump and me as I fight to put ALASKA FIRST.>>](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=dfdc076333da4127bcf32373daf6bbbc&_e=t1Kc3kQr_nV1sQVVGdK9odyIe0cqFU0SvNo5QJg2rh7emiGSVfBSdfKfzg3vcRdiAnphy1Ep61FuaTswXklnDeDmtqzZ7XbW9FXmFhWXmhz3Se4r8OYSNv2SQF3CsLmU4q4zRJEPWBwQDVbS-nwezrVu-1ScJ6mgqxhAEq7lgSPeeyMBf00B1NmTJbTymHDAJEqKIZjX4RN71EGQEK_s2HFPLeeou9sb7igeJ8wLnkThbcx5KGw5nuIih2HUZdwiNyRQE-HtJX3MzpVUTrGLdY6DsZBuZl7zeVTC_RV89zRiSpGT8qHQNCBwvk2eqcon1AtuPngdyTshNzid3b-vtaWsP4y5L053wjrVEyQXnsef0XjN4snDGbn3hZZBxjBlYmCQxn9C-j-lpaKIgx-hnqNW7dUgX8xhGJ-3Gnhq6gRoFyIrA0KXZsRohs2vTh5zcJNzFazMOqfjlwyQp4Keg1tFORg7U14W_sEVP3OSUx5xi5xb0YzJqNtlOwgjI5UEPUrYaHeru3iFAdXD_4zzCrwYHu0P-2qWM1AnM9TdeTx26M51WvKzrxBfO8F7C4o7ShG9gLGULO09RlMov3_6aikjTA-Qdt4_MXFZll1X55o%3D)**_

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=dfdc076333da4127bcf32373daf6bbbc&_e=t1Kc3kQr_nV1sQVVGdK9odyIe0cqFU0SvNo5QJg2rh7emiGSVfBSdfKfzg3vcRdiAnphy1Ep61FuaTswXklnDeDmtqzZ7XbW9FXmFhWXmhz3Se4r8OYSNv2SQF3CsLmU4q4zRJEPWBwQDVbS-nwezrVu-1ScJ6mgqxhAEq7lgSPeeyMBf00B1NmTJbTymHDAJEqKIZjX4RN71EGQEK_s2HFPLeeou9sb7igeJ8wLnkThbcx5KGw5nuIih2HUZdwiNyRQE-HtJX3MzpVUTrGLdY6DsZBuZl7zeVTC_RV89zRiSpGT8qHQNCBwvk2eqcon1AtuPngdyTshNzid3b-vtaWsP4y5L053wjrVEyQXnsef0XjN4snDGbn3hZZBxjBlYmCQxn9C-j-lpaKIgx-hnr5UHdaWnu_gLUZZjDBXHSwYiIXti4d0nmOppL0HewK2C0-kM_vuSqroAywnt_dfzWkHBIASteeyupMOlNpkU75d4Mb_nH_f8zA_rWxwEknXRLUxq39d2mX5AgGcEROKCCh_6sFkD_JAsaAuf0lD1D3_oMjJNtC4-1R4FZETCqbsz6fCfGM10mubbbq98eRnWxpBNT54gbtk-XspI8JqN4U%3D)

Your support is critical right now, Friend.

_Personally, I've got nothing to lose, but Alaska and our nation do._ Public service is a calling, and I would be honored to represent the men and women of Alaska in Congress, just as Congressman Young did for 49 years.

This is your chance to be one of my first supporters. I know you won't let me down.

I'm excited to share my first advertisement with you this morning! I'm proud of my record defending our conservative values, and I'm ready to take the | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/18761eb8b4ec/new-ad?e=fc83fb200d)

---
|
,

I'm excited to share my first ad with you this morning!

I have a long record of defending our conservative values on the Board of Supervisors, and I'm ready to take the fight to Congress.

I've opposed illegal immigration in Prince William County. I've stood for the lives of the unborn. I've fought Critical Race Theory. I've opposed costly tax hikes that burden hard-working families. I've even defended the Second Amendment.

Jennifer Wexton and the rest of the radical left have already come after me for it, but I beat them when I won re-election in 2019. Now I'm ready to beat them again.

Take a look here:
---
| [ ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=20d0b6e03f&e=fc83fb200d)

|
I'm excited to take the fight to Jennifer Wexton this November, but I'm going to need your help to do it.

Advertising is expensive, and it is critical that we get our message out. [Will you make a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help keep our ads on air and get our message to the voters of Virginia's 10th district?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=1091919ade&e=fc83fb200d)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: Getting on the Ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
We’ve got a month and some change in order to collect 2,000 nomination signatures. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6b89f4cf6f61/i-am-running-for-congress-8930657?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=fab0b52c99&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hi there,

We’ve come such a long way and built a strong campaign to bring real, common sense leadership to Washington. I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished so far, but if I don’t collect the signatures needed to get on the ballot in November, all of that progress will be lost.

That’s why I need your help to collect the 2,000 nomination signatures we need to submit to make sure we’re safely over the number needed to place my name on the ballot.

**I’m asking you to help us continue this important work by signing my nomination forms and collecting signatures from your friends, family, neighbors, and colleagues.**

Circulating nomination forms is easy and painless. [You can download and print nomination forms to collect signatures, and access our simple instructions on how to help us with this massive task by clicking here.](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=2639380819&e=356c0699dd)

Even if you only send us just your own signature, or the signature of just you and a few neighbors, every single signature helps us reach 2,000.
---
| [Mike's Nomination Forms](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=e9c346364d&e=356c0699dd "Mike's Nomination Forms")
---
| Our team will also be out and about next weekend collecting signatures if you’d like to swing by one of these locations:
**Saturday, 04/23 9-11AM**
_Inclusion Coffee Company_
3152 Village Square Dr
Hartland, WI 53029

**Saturday, 04/23 12-1PM**
_Fiddleheads Coffee_
N88 W16621, Appleton Ave
Menomonee Falls, WI 53051
I sincerely appreciate your ongoing support, and I’d like to thank you in advance for your help in getting my name on the ballot in November.

Let’s do this,
Mike Van Someren
---
| [COLLECT SIGNATURES](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=da0eabe787&e=356c0699dd "COLLECT SIGNATURES")

I’m proud of the work we’ve accomplished so far, but if I don’t collect the signatures needed to get on the ballot in November, all of that progress will be lost. That’s why I need your help to collect the 2,000 nomination signatures we need to submit to make sure we’re safely over the number needed to place my name on the ballot. I’m asking you to help us continue this important work by signing my nomination forms and collecting signatures from your friends, family, neighbors, and colleagues. Circulating nomination forms is easy and painless. Even if you only send us just your own signature, or the signature of just you and a few neighbors, every single signature helps us reach 2,000. | "Mike's Nomination Forms" | Our team will also be out and about next weekend collecting signatures if you’d like to swing by one of these locations: Saturday, 04/23 9-11AM Inclusion Coffee Company 3152 Village Square Dr Hartland, WI 53029 Saturday, 04/23 12-1PM Fiddleheads Coffee N88 W16621, Appleton Ave Menomonee Falls, WI 53051 I sincerely appreciate your ongoing support, and I’d like to thank you in advance for your help in getting my name on the ballot in November. Let’s do this, Mike Van Someren | "COLLECT SIGNATURES" | | | Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI | | | | | | | | | | www.MikeVanSomeren.com | | Copyright © 2022 Mike Van Someren for WI, All rights reserved.

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: The ONLY America First Choice
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVuO6k06gRJ126yxhQF65ioZ_n1PFQIN2l_nHOTxZ0PLXLL4dzye0fmMR7fc4R3LOlIgsmXZCoLx4sqcVrGqJdIt-oDCNzY8Zb6Lr4kQVONN86sn-lsnabbRYrOoDlXBvY5N13Ri5C7SiVNwi-Srzu6PPobAp5FvFWW8QeczUyyjPhzA31QDsA==&c=GIlKuZ6gN9GOQIIe0UOjsYwUl3sKEZERy60p7mWy5VpsaNfMzj6q6Q==&ch=3xNPXeRMiNRXkXPJISeW1mQURaLYywtWAgThcIo3tuz5Sn5mdtSnAQ==)
---
| Peter \-
Democrats will have you believing that they're the party of the people, the working family party, the party of equality and equity -- but history tells us that they're the party who brought us Jim Crow, founded the KKK, and anti-American dogma.
A common Marxist move is to redefine the world as you know it, leaving you weak and powerless so the almighty government can fill the void for you in Orwellian fashion.
WE refuse to allow that to happen.
This campaign is fueled by the Constitution -- I believe in smaller government, individual rights and personal freedoms. I aim to CONSERVE American ideals, values and traditions. I prioritize the Christian values our country was founded on, the strength of the nuclear family and one's right to the pursuit of happiness.
Do you see Mehmet Oz or David McCormick fighting for those values? I sure don't. That's why I am the ONLY America First choice in this race.
I'm running because I am you, and YOU need a voice in Washington. This is YOUR campaign, and you can win! With 32 days left until the Primary, the time for action is NOW! We need all the help we can get to spread the word of OUR movement. I appreciate any contribution you can afford at the link below, and want you to know that your donations directly fuel this campaign.
WE are the new Republican Party, now we just need to let Washington know. I need you to click on that link below and send [$32.00](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVuO6k06gRJ126yxhQF65ioZ_n1PFQIN2l_nHOTxZ0PLXLL4dzye0fmMR7fc4R3LOlIgsmXZCoLx4sqcVrGqJdIt-oDCNzY8Zb6Lr4kQVONN86sn-lsnabbRYrOoDlXBvY5N13Ri5C7SiVNwi-Srzu6PPobAp5FvFWW8QeczUyyjPhzA31QDsA==&c=GIlKuZ6gN9GOQIIe0UOjsYwUl3sKEZERy60p7mWy5VpsaNfMzj6q6Q==&ch=3xNPXeRMiNRXkXPJISeW1mQURaLYywtWAgThcIo3tuz5Sn5mdtSnAQ==) to this campaign. We are RISING in the polls while Oz & McCormick slip. They're two new faces of the same old establishment dynasty. Let's CHANGE politics and WIN this race. WE CAN DO THIS!
---
| |
---
| | [Click here to support Kathy TODAY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVuO6k06gRJ126yxhQF65ioZ_n1PFQIN2l_nHOTxZ0PLXLL4dzye0fmMR7fc4R3LOlIgsmXZCoLx4sqcVrGqJdIt-oDCNzY8Zb6Lr4kQVONN86sn-lsnabbRYrOoDlXBvY5N13Ri5C7SiVNwi-Srzu6PPobAp5FvFWW8QeczUyyjPhzA31QDsA==&c=GIlKuZ6gN9GOQIIe0UOjsYwUl3sKEZERy60p7mWy5VpsaNfMzj6q6Q==&ch=3xNPXeRMiNRXkXPJISeW1mQURaLYywtWAgThcIo3tuz5Sn5mdtSnAQ==)

| Blessings, Kathy Barnette

subject: FWD: I haven't heard from you yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| |
---
Peter, I’m just making sure you saw my last message.
When I became attorney general, I made it one of my top priorities to provide my people with a platform to freely share their thoughts and concerns – so I need you to make your voice heard.
I set a goal to hear from 1,000 fearless fighters before MIDNIGHT, and I’m only 73 responses short of this goal. It looks like you haven’t had a chance to take my priorities survey and make your voice heard yet, so please: **Will you take a minute now to answer these quick questions?**
