body:
I've decided to run for reelection in 2022. The Republican Primary is on May 3rd and we're asking for you to personally endorse
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2n1nufpaqhrta2jm0bikb68n6q4id1u2icv8jk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gm4o32c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onncooe8p32cgqn9phiesob5cbge2qn8pr3ehpm5d726hi7apr36ioj5cr16pjj1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74c366hjjbcb7mph6cdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziepv9s9jaj0ih8mkjcho3gkdplpqip1p7cp9quo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gm4o32c5h2bs)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuiu3lujhkqqs8l4rv5q8kvsat6kv2rccalehp4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gm4o32c5h2bs)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zavha18ua6qmcikn9de0vclutnkvienfmv2mpt0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gm4o32c5h2bs)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zemvtr9kccmukim8eq16691vagq5q6hjf5ftc2ro_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gm4o32c5h2bs)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z131m94qpmkbt6a88ui7rq2qlc3q96obfgkne9j8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gm4o32c5h2bs)**.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zurpeur98vichlq258kb316so4mlrtekqalueg9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gm4o32c5h2bs)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcemg65g7d2uqj78jjkev2jcqd4fss2teldkfhk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gm4o32c5h2bs)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z0ega2gd9u508p8620r48g3uasa8fe7d84dmos0o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm56v51ieakqnc2qvdanp675a67o6cqglb2uuifo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c1g62oj0c9gm49fg)

subject: ABC News: “'Big lie' still a big deal inside GOP grassroots”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Team –
This headline from ABC News has us worried:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B2_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B2_AC_30D] We can’t emphasize enough how dangerous this is. Unless we elect and re-elect Democratic Secretaries of State across the country, our democracy will be in even more danger than it is now.
Should Kristina Karamo, Mark Finchem, and the rest of the ‘big lie’ Secretary of State candidates win next year, they’ll be in a position to overturn or delegitimize the 2024 election results. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B2_AC_30D]
Thankfully, we can STOP this dangerous plan right in its tracks. But it’s not going to be easy, friend. We’ll need supporters like you across the country to step up and pitch in to help defeat the far-right.
They’re heading into next year with an unprecedented amount of momentum and fundraising behind them, and right now we’re at risk of being totally swamped by their dark money. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B2_AC_30D]

clean_body: Come On, Pat! | Friends, In light of Pat’s latest attack ad, I reworked a familiar favorite to share with you. That’s right, the fact-checkers (even the liberal ones) agree, Pat McCrory is lying about me. There’s not much more I can say. North Carolina does not need a Senator who runs a campaign based on lies. Come on, Pat! | Stay tuned for my next work. And stay tuned for when we take back the Senate in November. For North Carolina, Ted Budd Check out | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. name: Gary Black
subject: Wishing you and your family a Happy Easter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body: 96Friend — It is Good — Very Good. It is Good Friday. How could anything “good” come out of such a day filled with betrayal, unmatched violence, deceit, greed, jealousy, and a hundred other tentacles of evil? Over 2000 years ago today, Jesus, the sinless Son of God, stretched from earth to heaven on a criminal’s cross to make things “good” for me and you. From noon until 3:00 pm, darkness struck the earth as God the Father turned His back on His only begotten Son. No one has ever been more alone. He was humiliated, beaten unmercifully, and hung on a criminal’s cross by spikes driven through His hands and feet. But why? God spoke through Isaiah 700 years before it all happened, telling us all that “good” would come out of this tragedy. “Surely he hath borne our griefs, and carried our sorrows: yet we did esteem him stricken, smitten of God, and afflicted. But he was wounded for our transgressions, he was bruised for our iniquities: the chastisement of our peace was upon him; and with his stripes we are healed. All we like sheep have gone astray; we have turned every one to his own way; and the LORD hath laid on him the iniquity of us all.” Isaiah 53:4-6 Matthew also recorded the “good” news, “And about the ninth hour (3:00 pm), Jesus cried with a loud voice, saying, ‘Eli, Eli, lama sabachthani?’ that is to say, My God, my God, why hast thou forsaken me? Some of them that stood there, when they heard that, said, This man calleth for Elias. And straightway one of them ran, and took a spunge, and filled it with vinegar, and put it on a reed, and gave him to drink. The rest said, Let be, let us see whether Elias will come to save him. Jesus, when he had cried again with a loud voice, yielded up the ghost. And, behold, the veil of the temple was rent in twain from the top to the bottom; and the earth did quake, and the rocks rent;” Matthew 27:45-51 KJV God’s “good,” redemptive work was done. Jesus said, “It is finished.” John 19:30 KJV But for His sacrifice, we’d all remain in darkness, separated from the Father in a literal and physical Hell. The “good news” of Good Friday is that the “veil” is gone. All can come directly to the Father for forgiveness and healing for our sin-sick souls. “For all have sinned, and come short of the glory of God;” Romans 3:23 KJV “For the wages of sin is death; but the gift of God is eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.” Romans 6:23 KJV “For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life.” John 3:16 KJV Jesus was placed in a borrowed tomb before 6:00 pm. Borrowed, in a sense that He had no family burial plot. Borrowed, literally, because He would not need it very long. “In the end of the sabbath, as it began to dawn toward the first day of the week, came Mary Magdalene and the other Mary to see the sepulchre. And, behold, there was a great earthquake: for the angel of the Lord descended from heaven, and came and rolled back the stone from the door, and sat upon it. His countenance was like lightning, and his raiment white as snow: and for fear of him the keepers did shake, and became as dead men. And the angel answered and said unto the women, Fear not ye: for I know that ye seek Jesus, which was crucified. He is not here: for he is risen, as he said. Come, see the place where the Lord lay. And go quickly, and tell his disciples that he is risen from the dead; and, behold, he goeth before you into Galilee; there shall ye see him: lo, I have told you.” Matthew 28:1-7 KJV See, all of this is Good. Very Good. I pray that your Good Friday is good and that your Easter Sunday will be victorious, safe, and healthy. God Bless, Gary Black Unsubscribe This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by: Gary Black for Senate P.O. Box 6501 Athens, GA 30604 PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC. To unsubscribe visit: http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=fe334c10677a600c

His countenance was like lightning, and his raiment white as snow: and for fear of him the keepers did shake, and became as dead men. And the angel answered and said unto the women, Fear not ye: for I know that ye seek Jesus, which was crucified. He is not here: for he is risen, as he said. Come, see the place where the Lord lay. And go quickly, and tell his disciples that he is risen from the dead; and, behold, he goeth before you into Galilee; there shall ye see him: lo, I have told you.” Matthew 28:1-7 KJV See, all of this is Good. Very Good. I pray that your Good Friday is good and that your Easter Sunday will be victorious, safe, and healthy. God Bless, Gary Black Unsubscribe

| Peter,

In two weeks, _**our campaign will reach its first monthly fundraising deadline of the second quarter.**_ Last quarter, we sent a resounding message to our opposition that we have strong grassroots support, and we must continue building that momentum as Election Day approaches.

Your investments ensure we can defend against Republican attacks, hire staff, and campaign robustly across VA-07.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/L8A_N1Z9F89CbnmhsmDjW3lbOLS6V_X6lv1Lz9En-1U=/OKt7zy8tWr-RsEcX2FbcC0PNEZA9ll7nENuajCGJG5I=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220415-1-EM)

I'm working hard in Congress to improve life in our community - from strengthening our telehealth services to reaching across the aisle to deliver results - and I need your support to ensure I can continue that work next year.

Abigail Spanberger

subject: I'm concerned friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173475/340431339/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWRiYjU2MS1lMmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4V7_eMzwxHuJ3yieXSJ3bSoSgk4N3ULHwmVKuC2m6v4=)
---
Friend, our mid-month deadline is right around the corner, which means it's more important than ever for our grassroots fundraising to be strong. But I just popped in to ActBlue, and what I saw is NOT good.
**We expected this movement to ramp up its support as the stakes got higher – but the OPPOSITE has happened. We're just hours away from our mid-month deadline, and ActBlue shows our online fundraising is dramatically slowing _down._ Take a look for yourself:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173476/340431340/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWRiYjU2MS1lMmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4V7_eMzwxHuJ3yieXSJ3bSoSgk4N3ULHwmVKuC2m6v4=)
This is the political fight of our lives, and we cannot go into it halfheartedly. Experts at The Washington Post have made it clear: Replacing GOP extremists with Democratic governors is _the_ way to protect voting rights, education, health care and more. **Marco Lopez (D-AZ)_is_ the governor we need: He's an Obama administration alum, voting rights champion and small business owner – and he's ready to flip Arizona's governorship blue and defend our democracy.**
**But unless we turn our fundraising trends around before our mid-month deadline, we won't have the resources we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win this race. Politico has called this the _most_ competitive open-seat race of 2022, so we can't afford to fall short.**
**[So please, friend, with our deadline rapidly approaching, will you rush a donation to close our budget gap, flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173477/340431341/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWRiYjU2MS1lMmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4V7_eMzwxHuJ3yieXSJ3bSoSgk4N3ULHwmVKuC2m6v4=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173478/340431342/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWRiYjU2MS1lMmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4V7_eMzwxHuJ3yieXSJ3bSoSgk4N3ULHwmVKuC2m6v4=)

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173482/340431346/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWRiYjU2MS1lMmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4V7_eMzwxHuJ3yieXSJ3bSoSgk4N3ULHwmVKuC2m6v4=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173483/340431347/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk612-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWRiYjU2MS1lMmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4V7_eMzwxHuJ3yieXSJ3bSoSgk4N3ULHwmVKuC2m6v4=)

Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | © 2022 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: SENATE UPDATE: Defending Justice for All
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501158433%2501100579%2b-%2b04-15-2022%2beNewsletter%250115530.32844260.5712869.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501158433%2501100579%2b-%2b04-15-2022%2beNewsletter%250115530.32844260.5712869.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **April 15, 2022** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
### Ensuring Equal Justice Under Law
Over the past few weeks, Americans across Maryland and throughout the nation have gotten to know Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson, President Biden's nominee to the Supreme Court. President Biden pledged to appoint a justice with extraordinary qualifications, character, experience, and integrity. Judge Jackson fits that description perfectly. She approached every moment of her confirmation hearing with grace, wisdom, and brilliance. I had the privilege of [meeting with Judge Jackson one-on-one earlier this month](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1511699680916353027&redir_log=99933154901373). Our meeting reinforced what I already knew to be true: [she is an outstanding choice and has the judgment and the background necessary to sit on our nation's highest court](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-meets-with-supreme-court-nominee-judge-ketanji-brown-jackson&redir_log=081902563817876).

In our meeting, we also talked about Judge Jackson's connection to Maryland. Her brother, Ketajh, served with the Baltimore Police Department for seven years and served two tours of duty as a member of the Maryland Army National Guard. During our conversation, I invited Judge Jackson to join me at P.S. 103 in West Baltimore, where Supreme Court Justice Thurgood Marshall learned to read and write. I am currently working with community partners to turn that building - which has been in a state of disrepair for nearly two decades - into a community center and memorial to Justice Marshall. It would be a great honor to bring the first Black woman on the Court to the place where the first Black man on the Court grew up and went to school.

[With last week's vote](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-the-senate-confirmation-of-ketanji-brown-jackson&redir_log=179403522798882), both Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson and the United States Senate made history. I was proud to vote in favor of her confirmation and participate in this historic moment in our democracy. Like Marylander Thurgood Marshall before her, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is a trailblazer, and I know she will uphold the injunction emblazoned on the entrance to the Supreme Court building: "Equal Justice Under Law."
---
### Holding Putin Accountable
Vladimir Putin has continued his brutal and [unprovoked war against Ukraine](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-russian-invasion-of-ukraine&redir_log=502885262352736). With each passing day, the world witnesses more horrifying images of Putin's war crimes. Vladimir Putin thinks he can snuff out democracy and freedom by brute force, and he's doing everything in his power to achieve that evil goal. But he will fail.

The Ukrainian people have inspired the world as they defend their sovereignty, their freedom, and their democracy. And the United States and our allies have been with them every step of the way. We have worked together to unleash sweeping, punishing sanctions on Russia at a speed the world has never seen, and these sanctions are aimed right at the heart of Russia's economy, at Vladimir Putin, and at his cronies. Our global alliance is supplying Ukrainians with the weapons they need to fight Putin's army. We are delivering crucial humanitarian assistance to millions of refugees displaced within Ukraine itself and in surrounding countries.

The United States Senate joined in this chorus of support for Ukraine by passing bipartisan legislation securing [$14 billion in emergency funds to aid the people of Ukraine](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-passage-of-2022-funding-legislation-including-ukraine-support-and-vawa-reauthorization&redir_log=190532969121148) in their fight to protect their homeland. That legislation has been signed into law and is delivering military and humanitarian assistance to Ukraine at this very moment. I am also glad that the Senate passed and the President signed legislation to strip Russia of its "Most Favored Nation" trading status and banned Russian energy imports. The Senate has also passed a bill to accelerate the rate at which the United States can send weapons and supplies to Ukraine, and I urge the House to act on it quickly.

We must also do everything in our power to isolate Putin on the world stage and hold him accountable. That's why, last week, I teamed up with my Republican Senate colleague Joni Ernst from Iowa to craft [bipartisan legislation](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-ernst-lead-bipartisan-push-to-suspend-russia-from-un-human-rights-council-interpol-g-20-and-deter-world-bank-imf-investments&redir_log=902700126681312) that would kick Russia out of the UN Human Rights Council, the G20, and INTERPOL. Then on Thursday, the United Nations - led by our own Ambassador to the UN, Linda Thomas Greenfield - took action along these lines. But we can't stop there. The U.S. must work with others to hold Putin responsible for his war crimes. We cannot let up. Putin will rue the day he unleashed this unprovoked violence in the heart of Europe.
### Investing in Maryland
My top priority has always been to fight for the things that matter most to Marylanders. Last month, I joined my colleagues on the Senate Appropriations Committee to [craft and pass a government funding package that meets that test.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-passage-of-2022-funding-legislation-including-ukraine-support-and-vawa-reauthorization&redir_log=190532969121148) It includes important funds to support and grow everything from access to affordable, quality health care to public education - in addition to funds for local community-driven projects - and I'm excited to see those investments begin to flow into Maryland. Working together with local leaders across our communities, I identified and secured federal funds for [key projects](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcommunity-funding-projects&redir_log=808329317988423) that will help drive job growth, improve public safety, modernize our infrastructure, bolster educational and health care resources, and more.

Those dollars are already being delivered to our communities, and I have been traveling across Maryland to meet with the talented leaders spearheading these initiatives. Earlier this month, [I was in West Baltimore](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1509979218796593154&redir_log=265905724344375) with the retired Senior Pastor of Union Baptist Church, Reverend Alvin Hathaway, at the site of P.S. 103 - the place where Justice Thurgood Marshall once studied. I partnered with Senator Ben Cardin to bring a $1 million federal investment directly to Reverend Hathaway's initiative to turn the school into a community center and living memorial to Thurgood Marshall. I visited Baltimore again last week at the [Reginald F. Lewis Museum of Maryland African American History and Culture](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1513547654290104325&redir_log=940343753664372) to announce $650,000 in federal funding that will help create a permanent exhibition and memorial to the victims of the horrific history of lynching in Maryland. It was an honor to join community leaders from the museum, the Maryland Lynching Truth and Reconciliation Commission, and other partnering organizations to highlight this important initiative. It's a long, hard struggle toward building a more perfect union. But in order to achieve that ultimate goal, we first have to shed a light on our past: the good, the bad, and the ugly. This new exhibit will help us confront the darkest parts of our history with honesty - and guide us toward a brighter future.

The funds for P.S. 103 and the Reginald F. Lewis Museum go hand-in-hand with [nearly $50 million in additional federal investments coming to the Baltimore region this year](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-cardin-secure-nearly-50-million-in-direct-investments-for-baltimore-region-community-projects-in-fy2022-funding-bill&redir_log=674278716281251). Funding for projects stretching from [Western Maryland](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-cardin-announce-nearly-9-million-in-direct-investments-for-western-maryland-community-projects-in-fy2022-funding-bill&redir_log=334147521931262) to the [Eastern Shore](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fcardin-van-hollen-secure-over-95-million-in-direct-investments-for-eastern-shore-community-projects-in-fy2022-funding-bill&redir_log=094363114931216) and everywhere in between is also on its way. This past week, I presented other federal funds to leaders at the [Salisbury Regional Airport](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1513964531776643083&redir_log=047456880951374), at the [University of Maryland Eastern Shore](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1514031986167455748&redir_log=406864252124374), in [Prince George's County](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1514669932230983682&redir_log=421553865571374), and in Baltimore City - where I hosted a [roundtable discussion on workforce training](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1514355372240293892&redir_log=640870354281373). Over the course of the next few weeks, I look forward to additional visits to counties and towns across our state to talk about these federal investments and highlight the great progress happening on the ground to expand opportunity for all. You can visit [my website](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcommunity-funding-projects&redir_log=808329317988423) to see the full list of projects we were able to fund in this year's federal spending package. I have always been committed to using my position on the Senate Appropriations Committee to bring more opportunity into our state, and I will continue to collaborate with partners in Washington and across Maryland to do just that.
### Addressing Rising Prices
Thanks to the passage of the [American Rescue Plan](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-american-rescue-plan-delivers-bold-urgent-relief-to-maryland&redir_log=788920644526872), the passage of the [infrastructure modernization law](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-passage-of-the-bipartisan-infrastructure-bill-including-key-maryland-priorities&redir_log=119460582231107), and the resilience of the American people, our economy is bouncing back from the COVID-19 pandemic. America's recovery is gaining speed, but many Marylanders are feeling the squeeze of rising prices due to Putin's war, constricted supply chains, and high consumer demand for goods and services. Meanwhile, Big Oil is using this moment to line its pockets at the expense of hard working American families and compounding the price hikes brought on by Putin's invasion of Ukraine. Every day, oil companies are [gouging consumers and driving up the price of gas at the pump for hard working Americans](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1509563869013884933&redir_log=691206193993374). The windfalls aren't going into more production. Instead, they're mostly for stock buybacks that enrich corporate executives and shareholders, many of whom live overseas.

No one should be profiting from Putin's war. We are all in this together, and our shared mission must be to ease the strain on Americans' pocketbooks. President Joe Biden's action last month to [release millions of barrels of oil from America's strategic petroleum reserve](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1509614991212699652&redir_log=438913574843374) will help increase the supply of domestic oil as we work to [strengthen American energy independence, bring back domestic manufacturing jobs, accelerate the deployment of clean energy, and provide consumers the relief they need](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1501657952586981377%3fref_src%3dtwsrc%255Etfw%257Ctwcamp%255Etweetembed%257Ctwterm%255E1501657952586981377%257Ctwgr%255E%257Ctwcon%255Es1_%26ref_url%3dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.bgov.com%252Fnext%252Ftwitter_search%252F%253FniReferrerLink%253Dtopnav-ga&redir_log=459954267361657). I applaud the White House's leadership, and I am working with colleagues in Congress to back up those efforts with additional legislation to cut the costs of prescription drugs, make child care more affordable, and ensure that older Americans can receive the care they need without breaking the bank. Senate Democrats must also use the reconciliation process to enact the climate change plan that has already been passed by the House of Representatives. The war in Ukraine is a clear lesson that accelerating the transition to clean energy is not only an environmental imperative, but also a national security one. We must make the U.S. and our allies less vulnerable to global oil prices set by authoritarian regimes.

Taken together, all of these efforts will help address the serious financial challenges many Marylanders are facing as a result of added upward pressure on prices from Vladimir Putin's war. We must continue working together to make it through this period of uncertainty. It's in that spirit that [I hope you will continue to stay engaged.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285)
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285)
Chris Van Hollen
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15530.32844260.5712869.7517223)

name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Will you volunteer to help elect Beto?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
In order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.
#
Right now, we’re building one of the biggest organizing programs Texas has ever seen so we can make history and elect Beto as our next Governor.

Team Beto volunteers have already accomplished some amazing things. **But in order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.**

We’re reaching out to you because our campaign needs your help to make direct, personal contact with as many Texans as we can.
[**Will you sign up today to make calls to Texans and help build support for Beto?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52814?utm_source=ema20220415-184853&t=1&akid=184853%2E444211%2EUxkpQF) You'll have the opportunity to meet other supporters after a brief training. Plus, our phone banks are hosted virtually, so you can join us from anywhere.
**[Make calls for Beto »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52814?utm_source=ema20220415-184853&t=2&akid=184853%2E444211%2EUxkpQF)**
Winning in Texas won't be easy, especially with the extreme voter suppression happening right in front of our eyes. But we know that we're capable of generating once-in-a-lifetime voter turnout if we put in the work right now.
Thank you for being part of this,
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Why we need universal preschool in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
There’s an exciting opportunity to bring universal pre-k to every Ohio student, regardless of where their families live or how much they earn.

Team,
The first five years of a child’s life are a crucial period to learn and develop skills that will be used throughout life. It’s why I fought for universal pre-k as Mayor of Dayton, one of my proudest accomplishments.
There’s an exciting opportunity to bring universal pre-k to every Ohio student, regardless of where their families live or how much they earn.
**[I brought high-quality universal pre-k to Dayton. Now, I’m ready to bring it statewide. As governor, I’ll fight for every student to have the opportunities they need. If you want to help me in this fight, pitch in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173935/340432833/-404025325?refcode=nw_em_220415_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWJlNjNiZi1lNGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zk5GT0Kw1odrcuw_u5eUVYSZsRyAABMWOk5rSLs4EqU=)**
In Dayton, our students started coming to school more prepared. But we also saw our economy grow too – especially among Black- and women-owned businesses. It’s one reason why people nationwide look to us as a model.
Two million women have opted out of the workforce because they can’t afford childcare. Initiatives like universal pre-k are essential in creating equal opportunities across demographics. Women should be able to decide if they want to stay home or work independently – not be forced into a decision for financial reasons.
**[I’ve been saying Ohio deserves better throughout this race, and that includes our children too. Will you help me build a stronger Ohio for our families? Donate $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173936/340432834/-404025325?refcode=nw_em_220415_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWJlNjNiZi1lNGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zk5GT0Kw1odrcuw_u5eUVYSZsRyAABMWOk5rSLs4EqU=)**

Nan Whaley

| | LANSING, Mich. — Hundreds of volunteers and petition canvassers successfully mobilized in the effort to get Dr. Bob Lorinser on the primary ballot for U.S. Congress in Michigan's 1st District. The effort followed a technical issue with a previous set of unfiled petitions, all over the prefix “Dr." Although "Dr." is clearly not allowed on the ballot or the affidavit of identity, **_no law or statute prohibits it_** on the petition. "The campaign got word that we would be challenged on our petitions," said Dr. Lorinser. "With no desire to litigate the issue, we recirculated new petitions and successfully recaptured over 3,500 internally-validated signatures in just a few weeks. The mobilization was an extraordinary and unprecedented effort by everyone involved." In record time, volunteers helped the campaign accomplish the ambitious goal by hosting over 30 petition outlets, a dozen pop-up events, several drive-thru signings and hundreds of people canvassing door-to-door to meet with voters. Voters across the political spectrum — Democrats, Republicans and Independents — came out in droves. “The people decide elections, and the people deserve the opportunity to vote for the better candidate," said Dr. Lorinser. "Voters in this district are tired of being discounted. Using a technicality to block a candidate from the ballot shows fear and weakness and would've been a disservice to democracy.” **“We weren't going to take any chances.” — Dr. Bob** Dr. Lorinser says he's excited to be officially filed as a primary candidate and eager to take on Jack Bergman in the General Election this November. "Overcoming the technicality was a distraction," said Dr. Lorinser. "But, the effort proved our campaign is a threat, our volunteers and staff are remarkably capable, and we can win in August and November. I feel energized. **I wasn't going to let anyone or anything keep me off that ballot.** This election is too important. "It's time to get back to the issues. I am officially challenging Jack Bergman to a televised debate. Voters need to hear from both of us, side by side, and decide who is the best candidate for the job. Especially after this outpouring of support, I'm confident I can earn the votes necessary to serve the people." # # # _Dr. Bob Lorinser has been a licensed, practicing physician in the State of Michigan for over 30 years. He is unopposed in the Democratic primary election on Aug. 2, 2022, and will carry the election to face incumbent Jack Bergman this November._

Hundreds of volunteers — and over 3,500 signers — stepped up to get me on the ballot.| | | Hi - We did it! This morning, I officially filed for candidacy with the Bureau of Elections submitting the maximum amount of required verified signatures. Hundreds of volunteers — and over 3,500 signers — stepped up to get me on the ballot. Dr. Bob Lorinser files for candidacy with maximum amount of required signatures = One thousand signatures are required for any Congressional candidate to appear on the primary ballot. In just a few weeks, the Lorinser campaign captured over 3,500 signatures, and he officially filed with the maximum of 2,000 Friday morning. = | | = | = | | LANSING, Mich. — Hundreds of volunteers and petition canvassers successfully mobilized in the effort to get Dr. Bob Lorinser on the primary ballot for U.S. Congress in Michigan's 1st District. The effort followed a technical issue with a previous set of unfiled petitions, all over the prefix “Dr." Although "Dr." is clearly not allowed on the ballot or the affidavit of identity, no law or statute prohibits it on the petition. "The campaign got word that we would be challenged on our petitions," said Dr. Lorinser. "With no desire to litigate the issue, we recirculated new petitions and successfully recaptured over 3,500 internally-validated signatures in just a few weeks. The mobilization was an extraordinary and unprecedented effort by everyone involved." In record time, volunteers helped the campaign accomplish the ambitious goal by hosting over 30 petition outlets, a dozen pop-up events, several drive-thru signings and hundreds of people canvassing door-to-door to meet with voters. Voters across the political spectrum — Democrats, Republicans and Independents — came out in droves. “The people decide elections, and the people deserve the opportunity to vote for the better candidate," said Dr. Lorinser. "Voters in this district are tired of being discounted. Using a technicality to block a candidate from the ballot shows fear and weakness and would've been a disservice to democracy.” “We weren't going to take any chances.” — Dr. Bob Dr. Lorinser says he's excited to be officially filed as a primary candidate and eager to take on Jack Bergman in the General Election this November. "Overcoming the technicality was a distraction," said Dr. Lorinser. "But, the effort proved our campaign is a threat, our volunteers and staff are remarkably capable, and we can win in August and November. I feel energized. I wasn't going to let anyone or anything keep me off that ballot. This election is too important. "It's time to get back to the issues. I am officially challenging Jack Bergman to a televised debate. Friends,

I have been overseas in nations where changes in leadership come only with violence, where democracy takes hold only until the next violent upheaval.

**_America is exceptional because our constitutional system guards against that._** At the heart of our republic is a commitment to the peaceful transfer of power among political rivals in accordance with the law. President Ronald Reagan described this as our American “miracle.”

**History is watching. Our children are watching.** We must be brave enough to defend the basic principles that underpin and protect our freedom and our democratic process.

**[I am committed to doing that. I am asking for you to do the same, and I hope that you will consider contributing to my reelection campaign.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=94bd42a2dcc141e982bceaf6a91fd846&_e=wHgqH_swAHX-ptjQd_RWr974jXJUJwN_OdkhPMVzao0WD_gwIly_Nb7smWzw8KoViH6DzreY2Ctl9xTCWxkCIqXgqqGa7s5U8OfWZPk5zDObTSw7_zrJvZh08CkM92-h31UgNsoQkWvjdMal6COpJsr32RU1WjBs-iKb43cNYmsAt86ZO5dPEFVOlIqdtaLj2Tus3Zn3dQGzwZ3t0R_y6lT8gyMCl6zcVtt5XyB09GOP6_H-8NPQApg9DC4nbf98R4zQ5D7_n4E0gmOccobA607AI1bvaqEWyzHvitnwbgmedOUB0Yb6Ijnc38_FF-g3d866u7n8hLpCeK2eMFgVBcxbzh_EB4AbqRZb1G8K1K4yxm4zpM_9ZtFhIB-R3rO7Bc5MCeJ6Cz6TdTyFK70i8qouWMns5yLHi6upPksSIhsYbcI5Y0Ph5Zojq8kR_ZInLFp-vcMh2ZAoMyT5gYG_P_uPFHvFzT99uLiyKP9z6h85xalDLsrxWNLiBTndbfPHV9BUs33rUVmfDPZbFtbXyP-dp9Sm24KxFReNWmFwkVqfx1Q97eWLq2RbpPAsM_rM)**

**For Republicans, the path forward is clear._For me, the path forward is clear._ **

Liz Cheney

[Privacy Policy](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=94bd42a2dcc141e982bceaf6a91fd846&_e=rGIkEH_phMWv4gIhWWJTh77A-AyThp1P5Zi8jyymxAQ5gzd_R4c8Wazy4EA1lqf6I0QSVSelVf4uaigjHJXsJDzIf0zOuebPBq3l3b44p1Xr1rN7ip4wO2V1tu9YTtV7MjX2C4RJM1lMyU01NKmn8jvKfoE9eEB56zjqoGgp1WrYUzdZOFid8zODvLiUkb0vKK0LWIhiEVdTIPPRN3JfWfzslTDljHfuFMqE1shDgz9-0Ap3ks1wzw6j3HG-ih0YbEO8nR3Ul8CiXkPZfJjMz7A3u9NKCIsbtknRz0SbcMGayai9Mtbwur7enx8amARV)
clean_body: No matter what the short-term political consequences might be | | Friends, I have been overseas in nations where changes in leadership come only with violence, where democracy takes hold only until the next violent upheaval. America is exceptional because our constitutional system guards against that. At the heart of our republic is a commitment to the peaceful transfer of power among political rivals in accordance with the law. President Ronald Reagan described this as our American “miracle.” History is watching. Our children are watching. We must be brave enough to defend the basic principles that underpin and protect our freedom and our democratic process. For Republicans, the path forward is clear.For me, the path forward is clear. Liz Cheney Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming Our mailing address is: PO Box 3167 Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: No scandals. Nothing edgy about me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I don’t have a famous last name, I’m not a minority candidate and the craziest thing I’ve done in my life before is to run for Congress. In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuDvKK8LRsglDCBBPdqtyl2XOIze4z81s5Cw46kjhMX5VX3K0QQS8EaqiJHbMb74BpGRPlaoXeSyxFFi-q3UgNatDEqG4bBSIGyp1rBq5aqjmheiSfy2BQekC0WvC2I2RNN77oYbDyc10UD2kI_xEKJdYLEPBC1_4I3UQRbmU-2P7CLVuWziwwmNOI7UJZR2OMauLGDmMkq4heoB_dHpMD6L)

---
Peter,

When I joined the Marine Corps in 2011, it became apparent that my calling in life was service: _Service to my country, service to my family, service to all Americans._

I decided there and then that my purpose was to do something that mattered – beyond myself. Something that would help people.

So, I did just that. I served nine years in the Marine Corps, four overseas tours, and remain in the reserves – ready to help if I’m needed.

Before you click out of this email, allow me to persuade you not to; My name is Tyler Kistner and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time today. **As a favor to a veteran, please read this entire email.**

The year that I joined the marines was coincidentally the same time that I became increasingly concerned about the direction our country was headed towards.

_Politicians that only served themselves._

_A currency that was becoming meaningless due to inflation._

_Restrictions enforced by unelected bureaucrats._

I’m 34 years old; a husband and a father to two beautiful children. I don’t have a famous last name, I’m not a minority candidate and the craziest thing I’ve done in my life before is to run for Congress. In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s **because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes** in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election.

[**When I decided to run for Congress the first time, I knew things would be tough.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuDt1EhGb-1Z9HqBbeVx8eZVAz8zwWaSZ44Y76c01_tCz3G8OX0LRcq8mD1gj8k-SrHigRaTN8FBTmU_jyl3F-0zgQu5le8b9NpU5059cVdZhrQ2_S725IgUn2ktUAVPiMoRD7oGvE7IJueh1jeCg9wM_6IFBNSFqPDBootRjdaZdgp_UEZxfeEfzh8kFsYOab1bouNKgHVw7fgKAXHPSvrl) I didn’t have the resources, knowledge, or background in politics. Heck! I didn’t even have a campaign manager. But as it turns out, other Americans were on the same page as me – we didn’t need another self-serving politician in Washington! My message resonated with people, and we ran a historic campaign, losing to a well-funded Democrat by just 2%.

I’m running to unseat the same Democrat once again – and like last time, she’s very well-funded. In fact, [**her latest report to the Federal Elections Commission indicated she has more than $3 million to use in attacks against my campaign.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuB_ArC-PvJUXgW1gzWkbj2yCeoWCMpOw6GS80kWo2gWo2h1Sjn_pUcSk4q1bgeqofQSfMERA6y002tRd2edocBwPrK3aO-09PIOFMaQHJ_rlB_1b2Y1X9cpafJlL_thFRJZXU_qmWdidrEvEq8EfKAVDGvmLwZJbMx555fbVMfcZgsCe1lhvFqECspjT--UK9ubhUBpiOwGhXtwdmYq1v4_)

[**In a district with as many Republican voters as Democrats, this race could go either way. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. Will you join my team via contribution of $2, maybe $3 today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuCFcniCvEFIt_NoxJIL2UxJ3WgSWmgT6dX-9bFqweofxlQarnOodfiOpnCuRZlWEK2bo2Pr0JGFdCqesA6w-fcdExLUqLSwiMAzTmtzapH49UeXChIt19R8AGDX_AEFIZkETpXRm8kZXoJa49AfpcqdXREV7klwpa3cpKiwbenDIGhfYPUFOVGbBUwvtI3Wv2rENoXFzy8SsaDszbubBovA)

[** ****Help me flip this tossup House Seat ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuC3-8qBGMBi0je6KP5vCO9RjQC8Imr4EN3kVqoNQmfReKlVomQ482YQ6Pxi07mf0pc1RFf2PRmZgSTjBP3HJnZe5kRMFCKqVn_iQI_1SxE0Dc5u_Ci4CbTyYucflWAwtuzHSB5gmNk8iS1zh58KbwTp-TwApIoeFP0zp4mweXPXtntHCk9tHE6jG-SQENqD0MwvCQhsS6VSOifR3u6JOEPh)
The Marines taught me to never give up and that everything is achievable if one works hard enough for it. Over the past two years I’ve laid in bed wondering what might have been if I had an adequately funded campaign. I’ll never know. I do know that I’m running against the same Democrat who beat me in 2020 and this race is likely going to be even closer than the one from two years ago. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today: **I’d hate to get so close to victory again and run out of money just before Election Day.**

[**I’m running for Congress for one reason:_to serve the American people._**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuC7kfiC6jFajW_m-4gWPRwslZU1axgE-MhmwZZpp1SpQY8z39NBhQtR32yDS99DWQ8F5lAvJsh3zWdnMJGsYAWx46_LJWSTGOD_QlrwVR1H0VAUyQj48t2XYIG6lnxlqEAHUkO0wu_EQSv8LRb4vpaTAVuLl9nwR8_QgKjOT9kNCIYuv5ehZdz9gwuw6gnAN05A4c1_POe2tUbpHyJ4CnV8)

I don’t trust the current politicians leading this country to do what is best for my children, or yours. Here’s what I do trust: [**that a service-minded marine like myself will always stand up for you, and your family.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuAehboMusopEePJvZlYs-ZWlJtNjbmXti3tSRI5JtNaSTMD_Fqk9-9edN7AlaNZYxL0ekxIybaLPy8f2YUOQCJ_KmRd4aRMB6mmIWHGaDLtxhBxL-zObiOqco4_iXIXVRAvx0MWwE9OaFTMrLZj2vLmaqox04OauQBHgBOgpXpdc49YzfFiIwBsVysr94oEfSIv6xgl5QQ14zDnKT4RB4qi)

Today, I’m asking for your help – because I know that this mission will take a strong team, and that no man can win alone. [**Will you support me today to send a marine to congress, so I can serve you?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuC5CvtYQSeyODSjLnfRA0JuGy_M6Y5_IXRM3qbTiVEmeGgONEPhdcXzjnQCT9kpYlcAtOPV7wMjMSYODMzXtXggiwoN3CAbyWir8xJ9emsQaaDy7zUWhE3YUPX6L6LPuHWGRYaXBy-znvoCKehlF58F9HbM8qtUXKXBgaokvC10XvM9mm8N3k6KOedxw1iBw76D4kgdh-_RNCfxPX2USlht)

I’m never going to be the loudest conservative in the House – nor the most colorful – but I’ll put my head down and work diligently to get the work of the people done. **Isn’t that worth something anymore?**

[** ****HELP TYLER SAVE AMERICA ➞
* * *
_SEND IN THE MARINE_ ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuBNa9641H22Zn5PCo24TROXnD-SqDLB9D3ypq8gohpbZxUany1n9lctUrt5smLQwHF0waxKIf3hKwjws4BGsttJ35eiHIW21qj2JysldXcbxss76A19JUlTiadsWGj7X-jRo0EYR4KgG_5kl5mZOKHCb3kJHllr0V3sr4O8EABDFwB7zMIVbsjU5XwvhyyHuaLXbgNrWLXhLJWsAIkXsNj8)
I know that service starts with protecting our nation and putting law-abiding citizens first – not opening our border, defending criminals, and defunding the police. **In 2011, I took an oath to defend our nation, and I intend to keep that promise.**

[**I hope I can count on your support today, so that I can serve you in the future.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1611dec5f0e5458388f0d4e1cbf58547&_e=zCxhySsOCjrN3zjO8V9snf5blcfGOhZKqwwSdhURTIko7C7dnQKXm_BFkIlZJrKIJsVLkNYKGBkyMoOfQQELBeE8Kb60IEDkIsiQDVAy-v6rdQTLL3yt9VlfMIAw2pGq8ShNOeok2eXoT1pTFjegNl0hkf9BbL-OYmTuwCF0cuBjvA8GTXRutLBRA3MWdNA5ehEpbNTtpy6kodeKP6Hsoy6IJeK_MyZUW8ROVGVUJGC5GWoBFnyKw4dMwm5KvHuHDXRAIeudv0aR2905f50JeIeDtVsWIJT5f4yyU8de8pG3WU8NN42UlemJtHl-K5LvICDbw_VgIXY1je4CHWyChVgzlBBaiKGpRgu-5A_RkLNaTR7ePZWK2ozx0d09xv1c)

In Service,

Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. clean_body: I don’t have a famous last name, I’m not a minority candidate and the craziest thing I’ve done in my life before is to run for Congress. In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election. | Peter, When I joined the Marine Corps in 2011, it became apparent that my calling in life was service: Service to my country, service to my family, service to all Americans. I decided there and then that my purpose was to do something that mattered – beyond myself. Something that would help people. So, I did just that. I served nine years in the Marine Corps, four overseas tours, and remain in the reserves – ready to help if I’m needed. Before you click out of this email, allow me to persuade you not to; My name is Tyler Kistner and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time today. As a favor to a veteran, please read this entire email. The year that I joined the marines was coincidentally the same time that I became increasingly concerned about the direction our country was headed towards. Politicians that only served themselves. A currency that was becoming meaningless due to inflation. Restrictions enforced by unelected bureaucrats. I’m 34 years old; a husband and a father to two beautiful children. I don’t have a famous last name, I’m not a minority candidate and the craziest thing I’ve done in my life before is to run for Congress. In case you were wondering why you may not have heard from me before now, it’s because I lost in 2020 by less than 11,000 votes in what became one of the closest congressional races in the 2020 election. I didn’t have the resources, knowledge, or background in politics. Heck! I didn’t even have a campaign manager. But as it turns out, other Americans were on the same page as me – we didn’t need another self-serving politician in Washington! My message resonated with people, and we ran a historic campaign, losing to a well-funded Democrat by just 2%. I’m running to unseat the same Democrat once again – and like last time, she’s very well-funded. In fact, The Marines taught me to never give up and that everything is achievable if one works hard enough for it. Over the past two years I’ve laid in bed wondering what might have been if I had an adequately funded campaign. I’ll never know. I do know that I’m running against the same Democrat who beat me in 2020 and this race is likely going to be even closer than the one from two years ago. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today: I’d hate to get so close to victory again and run out of money just before Election Day. I don’t trust the current politicians leading this country to do what is best for my children, or yours. Here’s what I do trust: Today, I’m asking for your help – because I know that this mission will take a strong team, and that no man can win alone. I’m never going to be the loudest conservative in the House – nor the most colorful – but I’ll put my head down and work diligently to get the work of the people done. Isn’t that worth something anymore? I know that service starts with protecting our nation and putting law-abiding citizens first – not opening our border, defending criminals, and defunding the police. In 2011, I took an oath to defend our nation, and I intend to keep that promise. In Service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Humbly requesting your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm run
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0gtbs2qc95noea7g8fvk9pg1rq7op4c67309ruo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gmaor2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s3me9p71c70muo7cdjim5h70ob1mkqb8s75m6rm1otlehhb9o9jm1i32tjgseoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dpjc1jr4db664ob6o37m2qmash5u)
It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2sl23id402tm028v45ffi89ous9rokbapsran78_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gmaor2c1h2bs)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvj9aksijuiaccor11jed3pcr6dq1ecc7utt4otg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gmaor2c1h2bs)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1049kentmlsnh8tckot1vjsnltgj93cqske3e8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gmaor2c1h2bs)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm63d6hma8bq7foitei7v0tij2h29bep804qjrao_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gmaor2c1h2bs)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn7i2uocfkpj093b913dcs7uguf93e6lbrb8jg80_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gmaor2c1h2bs)**.

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4h5jrvlfls4ogq0pp4vme35pi19m50hrt0ineg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gmaor2c1h2bs)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zst3v5j9e8l00vl7jqqsas4oh8b287qdue2sibuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0c1gmaor2c1h2bs)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z2vr2vp7h41gd0bb3ctu88je0c8kj3fn300i4e88).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: The Heritage Foundation
subject: How much do you know about Big Tech's bullying tactics?
body:
I’m sending you an email because I wanted to make sure this message reached you. As I’m sure you know, Facebook, Google, and other Big Tech companies such as Twitter have chosen to become destructive of core American principles that sustain us as a free society. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6872%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=CPyABpcBIPDfHGrTjef3sQ&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60603%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f2DrbgQcFS3nJUNoF2x71A&sysid=1)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, I’m sending you an email because I wanted to make sure this message reached you. As I’m sure you know, Facebook, Google, and other Big Tech companies such as Twitter have chosen to become **destructive of core American principles** that sustain us as a free society. Facebook and Twitter censor and suppress conservative ideas. Amazon and YouTube have also suspended and de-platformed many conservative voices in the last two years. Heritage’s own online team still has posts about election integrity, religious freedom, conservative principles, and more throttled online--with no clear explanation why. By now it’s clear that Big Tech’s ideological bias **targets and censors conservative voices, shrinks the marketplace of ideas, and undermines the foundation of our republic.** Right now, Heritage is strategically taking action to _counter _Big Tech’s bullying tactics. As we carry out our strategy for stopping the Radical Left’s agenda as championed by Facebook, Google, Twitter, and others in Big Tech, it’d be helpful to know how much you’ve been paying attention to the multiple instances of conservatives being silenced on various platforms. Will you help us find which instances of censorship are flying under the radar and need to be further exposed? **You can take our Big Tech Censorship Survey by clicking this link:** **[https://secured.heritage.org/take-thf-big-tech-censorship-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60604%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1gAqJnYQh3Do8lUdf6Y%2fDA&sysid=1)** Gratefully, Kevin Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6872%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=CPyABpcBIPDfHGrTjef3sQ&sysid=1)_

Facebook and Twitter censor and suppress conservative ideas. Amazon and YouTube have also suspended and de-platformed many conservative voices in the last two years. Heritage’s own online team still has posts about election integrity, religious freedom, conservative principles, and more throttled online--with no clear explanation why. By now it’s clear that Big Tech’s ideological bias targets and censors conservative voices, shrinks the marketplace of ideas, and undermines the foundation of our republic. Right now, Heritage is strategically taking action to counter Big Tech’s bullying tactics. As we carry out our strategy for stopping the Radical Left’s agenda as championed by Facebook, Google, Twitter, and others in Big Tech, it’d be helpful to know how much you’ve been paying attention to the multiple instances of conservatives being silenced on various platforms. Will you help us find which instances of censorship are flying under the radar and need to be further exposed? You can take our Big Tech Censorship Survey by clicking this link: Gratefully, Kevin Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Soldano?=
subject: another week on the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We're up against big money - but we've got a bigger movement! | | |
---
| | Garrett Soldano here, Peter.

What a week it has been for Michiganders.

First, we saw the [phony Whitmer kidnapping trial unravel as two defendants were acquitted](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=408d235d65&e=fe4b890356) \- bringing into question whether the FBI and Democrats colluded to concoct this narrative before the 2020 election.

And yesterday, we learned more about the tragic shooting that occured in Grand Rapids - and the Democrats' unfortunate but predictable rush to place blame on the brave men and women in law enforcement. Read my full statement on this situation [here.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=98483d8352&e=fe4b890356)

However, our campaign and our grassroots movement continue to hammer down and build momentum across our state.

On Wednesday, I had the opportunity to tour several businesses in Shiawassee County, including a visit and a nice haircut at my friend Karl Manke's Barber Shop!
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=3e9959a84c&e=fe4b890356)
---
[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=1326232d6a&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=cc381ae215&e=fe4b890356)
---
[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=f73f7f0c05&e=fe4b890356)
---
| It is my job as a candidate for Governor to listen to and learn from our economy's greatest asset - business owners, workers and farmers.

We wrapped up on Wednesday by attending an Stand Up Shiawassee meeting in Corunna and speaking to a packed house of patriots about the incredible movement we're building. And yesterday, I returned to Kent County for "Faith and Freedom Night" - another great crowd!
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=247e88e826&e=fe4b890356)
---
[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=4a00d948c7&e=fe4b890356)
---
| It's never been more clear, Peter - we are THE grassroots campaign in this race, and as establishment candidates scramble to get the signatures necessary to appear on the Republican Primary ballot, our movement is well positioned to WIN this nomination and take the fight to Gretchen Whitmer.

There are a few obstacles that stand in our way, including the millions being spent on TV ads by our deep-pocketed opponents. Travelling around the state and speaking at over 120 events this past year, one thing is certain: We the People are DONE with silver spooned politicians who think they know best.

**We have something they don't** \- a growing movement of ordinary Michigan citizens that is engaged, that is energized, and prepared to do extraordinary things to take back our beloved state from Gretchen Whitmer and the elites.

_But I need your help._

If every one of our supporters can pitch in ten, twenty, fifty bucks, or even just $5 - that will help us defeat the establishment insiders trying to buy this election. If you can, please make an online donation at this secure link: [https://secure.winred.com/garrett-for-michigan/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=d2b20fe7c3&e=fe4b890356)

I hope you can join me at an upcoming event in Livingston, Macomb, Washtenaw, Oakland or Branch County. It is my goal to meet as many Michigan patriots as possible before the election! Invite your friends and family to come with you. See my full schedule at [GarrettforMichigan.com/events](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=25e17bbe9d&e=fe4b890356)

Thank you for your support, prayers and encouragement,

Garrett Soldano

Sent from my iPhone

---
|

---
| | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081
---
| Garrett Soldano for Michigan
1151 West Milham Avenue, Unit 2546, Portage, MI 49081

You can [update your preferences](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=a18f9a4764) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=a18f9a4764).

name: Kina Collins
subject: An empty chair
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
I will always show up, and I will never sell out. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk6u3Hl7Y_0isgWofq45tnQxMyECQB-abF6UHV6Ias5_2ShB9DBVta1p7A4bw_CO26HBjkVkWC2HG-Y5sPWYgkYNodw8xBQ5BglzCiXV8fcKs-8_bv512lljmQiwI8Z712AwuxHFc4i1dzjZXCVhDYghYPBSx3hR4Dmn8VW29vAUokdEZOX-3FWHFLev3Vk1Oxo/3l8/5D9H-lstT7Gl7pkjgzJ3Nw/h0/uIs5LxY1iLkoIn842umD-c_9OtshBgnAkoC2PC2LyCs) Dear Team, When I judge politicians I don’t look at what they say, I look at what they do.
That’s why when I joined Black Workers Matter, the West Humboldt Park Community Coalition, and Teamsters union members yesterday to demand that elected officials help fight for a community benefits agreement and fair contracts for Amazon workers, I expected to see my Congressman. **All I found was an empty chair.** **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESeOfB0xpFRFStVDaaVcpZSkKddw1ETXo00bDCxL_e0sGBIsdP8Z2-pfuOjRLRCqHo2srzaOyDGvN5SrtoTYTeqP_EvG_rpg_lyBEpjiPqDwrSGz0TA92dzzM02_EeJV82liqBjruNrW57j1oW5hVrRRVTcdatFK1_cvNdbH0zglJS2HTlBartZSm5qFW4LL1Iz5KBGdnX5IewAMMWqsSJoGzij0jmWH2EWHoSfHx2_gnEEbPXJ_Lq5Jc6XZNkNYpOh1d0HbTMDQ_NxxQpawjT4A/3l8/5D9H-lstT7Gl7pkjgzJ3Nw/h1/-D1V1OFFgRS1EcG6RvsslTqElYIc4uhFVQP2x1lxvss)**
It is hard to imagine that there are elected representatives who consistently choose corporations over working people, but when Danny Davis happily accepts a check from Amazon’s corporate PAC, that is exactly what he is doing.
[**We deserve a representative who shows up, and never sells us out. If you agree, donate $7 today to help us counter the influence of corporate money in politics.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxES32IAQv20tES3oJnmQCTqylsjxXC8mWvuHPkfIkgNSZHe9-9oMaMsNKRW7il9hcfKQA42mKrMuqAx11PeGIGtvFk3uVKr-kiJS1w1iubocoBAuVROhVXtgc14p5LCOJj9kiEPAxZA8TKQT-_xtOicd3fcXWs-QYk2_e87jk9rSjdBzb8ZSRHtExwsBwIdR2ttFcbtgyphCUSp5u5_OHWaZntUxr7NoRjGkFWnjskV1nt8NaDqm1P_m3gunzg7wBMtzppEQFqacXZl_ScNNXJehA/3l8/5D9H-lstT7Gl7pkjgzJ3Nw/h2/w9AHXPF7QwibewoPqsBTYEPiEO1HF6MEkMlJ5gQVgUo) [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESD4_3b09OMzDI9GhjknDaOs0Izo1y-CbNfpZ3er5Z_vf9Hys9lnXuJHURViMOfcOMEJXvni8iJ0jirxb0lK5evFE_VsYWKTIQH5dRmAOtIx4tuBQ3FZaEC7WDrNtuec6HYQbJC-UWCX2F1wl-qyu7oxgi2m2hDTyJcYHTrC3GrknWC8v9wFgaqAnpaM-On1UA7cVthC-DeclyreTs9MHs-S2QSMkAehokzjlMWwNxjGD6M7oBebo1MEy45cxvgxjYU8wPAi5GBk6RyQyjrg0JVg/3l8/5D9H-lstT7Gl7pkjgzJ3Nw/h3/Vqq6Ki5-kJ8Ra3OfTmDQcWqnBBpOzUnZKYsrj-iF3Gk) It is absolutely unacceptable that Amazon made over 33 billion dollars last year and their workers are living paycheck to paycheck. And it is unacceptable that our congressman, who represents one of the most Democratic districts in the midwest, refused to reject their corporate handout. **People tell us that $15 an hour is ‘too much.’ But what’s ‘too much’ for me is mothers and fathers having to choose between childcare and healthcare every month, 89 million Americans uninsured or underinsured, and Americans working over forty hours a week for slave wages.** Enough is enough. These workers deserve better, and we won’t stop until they get it. [**We need to elect candidates who will represent us, not corporations. If you agree, donate $7 right now.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESRjrJG5Pi6YnfTqnqTNUFWFzUejwblbRMUP7SXFbgafZ48plzBSn_3hLRO3SH1pCaq5VyEwWH_mT7yqw7ckEy8cgJnnB5Zi12yGQPGFpEfcATuj-jpND_-YnD1jcNOPaciJN7gfZiYIlSGtfNE9Q8tVSmWEzwXkekHiZHA4L2mUR_MwyyZ3XOofsh2uI5bpPLpdL3n1k8Dv37qDFrEiUXC0fR3RbGjSS8r0FOQhdDzWi8zOJ0DbGQUSmR4GZ11rZVihKd0mm2Z-ZdXVIi-BSQXw/3l8/5D9H-lstT7Gl7pkjgzJ3Nw/h4/GFA_Qt7f_Bg_vhLfCl-ZPkkE5KnLUBTOEvv6ML85VIY) In solidarity,
Kina Collins

Kina Collins for Congress
901 Lake Street, Unit 4093

clean_body: I will always show up, and I will never sell out. | | | Dear Team, When I judge politicians I don’t look at what they say, I look at what they do. That’s why when I joined Black Workers Matter, the West Humboldt Park Community Coalition, and Teamsters union members yesterday to demand that elected officials help fight for a community benefits agreement and fair contracts for Amazon workers, I expected to see my Congressman. All I found was an empty chair. It is hard to imagine that there are elected representatives who consistently choose corporations over working people, but when Danny Davis happily accepts a check from Amazon’s corporate PAC, that is exactly what he is doing. It is absolutely unacceptable that Amazon made over 33 billion dollars last year and their workers are living paycheck to paycheck. And it is unacceptable that our congressman, who represents one of the most Democratic districts in the midwest, refused to reject their corporate handout. People tell us that $15 an hour is ‘too much.’ But what’s ‘too much’ for me is mothers and fathers having to choose between childcare and healthcare every month, 89 million Americans uninsured or underinsured, and Americans working over forty hours a week for slave wages. Enough is enough. These workers deserve better, and we won’t stop until they get it. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

| | |

Hello,
I know I’m not the only one emailing you, and you probably have a lot of other campaigns in your inbox asking for money. **But I’ll be frank: your dollar has a bigger impact in New Hampshire than in any other state, and we could really use your help.**
We’re halfway through the month, but we’re nowhere near 50% of our email fundraising goal. **[_If you’re ready to chip in to our campaign before tonight’s mid-month deadline, please do!
