name: Heidi St. John
subject: Good Friday
body:
Dear Peter,

Easter is here once again. As Christians,
Resurrection Sunday reminds us that because of Jesus Christ, we
have reason to hope.

In the world of politics, "hope" is not much
more than a slogan. It's alluring-and also, it's illusive.
Every one of us longs for hope and change. It is the cry of our
heart to know that something more than this fleeting,
often-disappointing life exists.

As a woman of faith, I know that true hope
and real change isn't found in a campaign slogan, no matter how
catchy. The older I get, and as I watch my grandchildren
beginning to navigate their way in our world, I remain full of
hope, because I know where it can be found.

Hope is found in Jesus.

Peter knew where to find it, too. "Praise be
to the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! In his great
mercy he has given us new birth into a LIVING HOPE through the
resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead." (1 Peter 1:3)

As a Roman citizen, the apostle Paul knew a
thing or two about political corruption and persecution. He
refused to despair and wrote this to the early Church,
encouraging them not to give up: "Now may the God of HOPE fill
you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in
HOPE by the power of the Holy Spirit." (Romans 15:13)

I love that where there is true hope, joy is
also present.

"Joyful" is the word I use most whenever I'm
asked about the people that are working tirelessly on my
campaign. The men and women who are part of my effort to bring a
sense of patriotism and optimism back to the citizens in SW
Washington are full of hope. The hope we have is
unwavering-because it's rooted deeply in the promises of
Scripture.

This Easter, I pray that we will once again
turn our hearts toward heaven, and remember that true hope and
eternal change are available to us because of the resurrection of
Jesus Christ.

My family and I wish you a beautiful time
together this weekend as we fix our heart on that empty tomb.

He is Risen indeed!

For freedom,

Heidi St. John
Republican for Congress
www.HeidiStJohnForCongress.com

name: Conor McGuire
subject: This is a big weekend for us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44164304/340389548/-241209467?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220415mm1_cm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWIxNWU1MC1jOGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aDtxIYmQ_Plxyy7UjnLV6aDI3OIFLTQUhA-VHjhQ34o=)

Hey team, — it’s Conor, your friendly neighborhood finance director. This upcoming weekend is a big one for our campaign: on Saturday, we’re celebrating the grand opening of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s first field office in Las Cruces, which is a massive first step in launching field efforts to get out the vote and flip this district! **It’s also the deadline for hitting our mid-month goal of $10,000 in grassroots donations, and right now we’re not quite on track.** And... I’m usually not one to ask for gifts, but it would mean so much to me if you would make a contribution to support Gabe in my honor so that we crush our mid-month goal! **[Any amount — $10, $25, $50 — truly makes a difference. This upcoming weekend is a big one for our campaign: on Saturday, we’re celebrating the grand opening of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s first field office in Las Cruces, which is a massive first step in launching field efforts to get out the vote and flip this district! It’s also the deadline for hitting our mid-month goal of $10,000 in grassroots donations, and right now we’re not quite on track. And... Sunday is my birthday! name: Matt Castelli
subject: we need all hands on deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
Staying on track right now is crucial to our success in November. If we want to have the resources we need to defeat Elise Stefanik on Election Day, we need all hands on deck now.
| Team, I’ll get straight to the point.

Staying on track right now is crucial to our success in November. If we want to have the resources we need to defeat Elise Stefanik on Election Day, we need all hands on deck now.

I’m running for Congress to fight for policies that will reduce expenses for working families, expand access to healthcare, invest in infrastructure, and more. Elise only cares about her selfish political ambitions, but I want to represent YOU.

Just last week, I spent the afternoon at Mark Twain Mapleworks with maple producers to learn about and discuss the economic importance of maple in NY-21 communities. After an eye-opening afternoon, I got to try the finished product!

Folks, grassroots supporters like you make all the difference for my campaign. Your support will propel us to victory over Elise Stefanik.

I’m proud to say I have the unanimous support from the Democratic Party — including endorsements from all 18 counties of NY-21. I know it’s up to me to unify voters and defeat Stefanik and her Trumpist tendencies.

**[Can I count on you to donate $15 right away to help us win? We need as many supporters as possible to step up to the plate and help us stay on track if we want to create a better future for NY-21.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44164363/340389752/221456339?amount=15&refcode=MC_EM_FR_3MO_220415_1_3&refcode2=66d9a979-c8bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmQ5YTk3OS1jOGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mxhn-MtvNY3yINM8I1hGFauOd4UrOgTTco7GRQrktPs=)**

clean_body: Staying on track right now is crucial to our success in November. If we want to have the resources we need to defeat Elise Stefanik on Election Day, we need all hands on deck now. | Team, I’ll get straight to the point. Staying on track right now is crucial to our success in November. If we want to have the resources we need to defeat Elise Stefanik on Election Day, we need all hands on deck now. I’m running for Congress to fight for policies that will reduce expenses for working families, expand access to healthcare, invest in infrastructure, and more. Elise only cares about her selfish political ambitions, but I want to represent YOU. Just last week, I spent the afternoon at Mark Twain Mapleworks with maple producers to learn about and discuss the economic importance of maple in NY-21 communities. After an eye-opening afternoon, I got to try the finished product! = = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Folks, grassroots supporters like you make all the difference for my campaign. Your support will propel us to victory over Elise Stefanik. I’m proud to say I have the unanimous support from the Democratic Party — including endorsements from all 18 counties of NY-21. I know it’s up to me to unify voters and defeat Stefanik and her Trumpist tendencies. = Thanks for your support, Matt | = | Matt Castelli is a former CIA officer and Director for Counterterrorism at the National Security Council who served in both the Obama and Trump White Houses. Friends — I wanted to check in and write a quick message to you. While my opponent Brian Fitzpatrick continues to line the pockets of corporations and his wealthy donors, I’m interested in making government work for everyday Pennsylvanians who have been left behind by politicians in Washington. That’s why I’m running for Congress. Families like the one I grew up in cannot afford politics as usual. With the rising costs at the pump, student debt piling up, and childcare and healthcare costs skyrocketing, it’s clear that our leaders aren't listening to working families like mine. But I just got off the phone with my finance team, and they told me we only need $3,850 to meet our mid-month fundraising goal. So I am humbly asking you to chip in today so we can bridge the gap. [Can you please donate $10 or whatever is most meaningful to you before our mid-month deadline ends at midnight? name: Giffords.org
subject: We are asking for $3 to help us finish the job
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When we first started our work on gun violence prevention, talking about guns was almost universally considered a political loser.
#

Friends -
When we first started our work on gun violence prevention, talking about guns was almost universally considered a political loser.
We’d meet with candidates and partners to talk political strategy, but they didn’t want to say one word about guns on the campaign trail—especially in swing states.
How time has changed.
Today, issues like background checks are supported by Democrats, Republicans and Independents alike. Voters from big cities to small towns now consider gun violence a kitchen table issue, one that impacts who they’ll vote for.
That doesn’t happen by accident. It’s the result of work. Hard work. Tireless work. Work that happens when everyone is paying attention to this issue of gun violence, and when it fades from the spotlight.
But that progress only happened because we had the resources to keep fighting day in and day out.
And if we’re going to get through that last mile—the federal legislation we all know we need—we need your continued support.
So we have to ask:
[**Can you please make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford to help Giffords continue the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence? Gabby cannot do this alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr22?refcode=em220415-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1814_3935704_tkKWKn&akid=1814%2E3935704%2EtkKWKn)

body:
The GOP is spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat in the country.
| | |

Friend, I prefer not to send you emails asking for money, but this latest news leaves me no choice:

**Mitch McConnell and national Republicans have already spent over $7.5 million to unseat me – and now, a multimillionaire has jumped into New Hampshire's Senate race. He pledges to spend millions to self-fund his campaign.**
To make matters worse, my finance team just let me know that we’re facing a significant fundraising gap. We need to raise another $10,575 by midnight, or else we could fall short of our critical mid-month goal.

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Good Friday + 1/6 Digest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- First, happy Passover and Easter to those celebrating this weekend! Today, Good Friday, my family's faith tradition is to commemorate the death of Jesus Christ. And, I dare say, all people can find secular hope in this religious story. Christians call it "Good Friday" today because we know what follows three days later. But to those living it in the moment, that day would have been one of the darkest, saddest, and most hopeless they'd experienced. Perhaps you've had a day like that -- one so difficult or awful that hope, in the moment, wasn't easy to find. I know I have -- January 6th felt that way to me. But as Easter reminds us: Out of darkness comes light; out of hopelessness comes hope; and out of death comes resurrection. We couldn't have Easter without Good Friday. And so no matter how dark times can feel in our own country and world; how readily lies and conspiracies are told and consumed; how terrifyingly fragile our democracy seems at the moment -- WE THE PEOPLE have the power to bring about America's political and cultural resurrection. There is hope -- we're staring at it in the mirror. And that's where our **PRIMARY 1ST** plan comes in, which is a bold, original strategy to mobilize disaffected Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to vote in Republican primaries to defeat the extreme Trump-First candidates seeking to dominate institutions key to maintaining democracy in America, from local election officials to the U.S. Congress. You can learn all about our thrilling, hopeful strategy [here](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=2): | [](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=3 "PRIMARY 1ST STRATEGY") [PRIMARY 1ST STRATEGY](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=3)
---
The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again, expecting different results. And that's why we're so excited to do something unexpected, and have a real chance to shift the center of gravity and improve the odds that we can elect more Country First candidates to replace poisonous partisans.
But none of us can do it alone, and that's why I'm calling on every member of this movement to find a way to invest however you can in our country's future. Would you please consider:
**> >** [Getting involved](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=4) as a volunteer?
**> >** Spreading the word to your friends, family, and any other likeminded person? _(Forward this email to them)_
**> >** [Giving](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=5) a gift to fund the mission?
Whether you can do one thing or all of the things, our collective actions add up to making a huge difference. And armed with our primary election strategy, we've got even more important work to do. I know I'm ready -- and I hope you're with me!
Thanks, as always, for everything you do to bring this movement to life. I couldn't do this without people like you, and I wouldn't want to.
Country First,

Adam
[](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=6 "Stand with Country First") [Stand with Country First](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=6)
---

## 1/6 Committee Weekly Digest
Country First presents the next edition of The Weekly Digest to highlight the important work of the January 6th Select Committee. Each week that the committee makes news, we’ll provide a recap on the its work to make sure you’re up to date. **In Case You Missed It:**
* Rep. Kinzinger [speaks](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=BiDEj8yGy-h4To0LUa2PcscAHrNmIWv6btAR7GZCuzMS15iFW8TdmM4RWAfJXdphwh_2zn58piubCAo42p0pmtY_Y1AlKTtbVwpk-zdDU1QzuOV8YnbLqv_ns7-1E6LoqVN9l9oPyCloJwfA46l1fzzMdItRN7xap7fJ2jdm9b8&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=7) out on Mark Meadows testimony to the 1/6 Committee
* Rep. Kinzinger gives an [impassioned](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYzwadbOOu1BLXd_1JagXEI&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=8) speech on the House Floor to hold Navarro and Scavino in contempt of Congress
* Rep. Kinzinger gives his [opening](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbcKwI_cQBSQaUktbasjNoA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=9) remarks to the 1/6 Committee hearing

Here are the major developments from this past week: **House Votes to Hold Peter Navarro and Dan Scavino in Contempt of Congress** The United States House of Representatives voted along party lines, minus Congressman Adam Kinzinger and Congresswoman Liz Cheney, to hold former Trump aides, Dan Scanvino and Peter Navarro in [contempt](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=oGkNRIpNU-65tzHrfmdwr6JRqGcDBbGwQzs3KgLnz49C3FLgdysMI1HJTaiAMe-E6KkdDvBa82SFAwuNjaxRwGc9Miz0JQgqcOvUQw3_RCYMsyYV54FRrKvXMY7H18bNAT8VTmnMNDOgCEFeKDVUAg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=10) of Congress after they evaded subpoenas issued by the 1/6 Committee. In a 220-203 vote, the House voted to refer the former trade advisor and deputy chief of staff to the former President to the Department of Justice to be charged with criminal contempt of Congress. The referral from Congress comes after months of rescheduling depositions and attempts made by the 1/6 Committee to speak with the aides. Before the vote, a heated debate ensued on the House Floor, with the majority of Republicans reaching for words like "witch hunt" and "show trial" while the 1/6 Committee members argued for accountability. Criminal contempt charges carry a sentence of up to one year in prison and up to $1,000 in fines. **1/6 Defendant Argues Former President "Authorized" Deadly Attack on the Capitol** On Wednesday, Dustin Thompson, an alleged 1/6 rioter [described](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHngbQEaLGNWITIanmatFMmseRzjV3ifRp-Uaaq2bRZ8UC-DQ_0-exQ2BfT0hOB8VmLGK7y_3e1RKKKNeNDSN-JA5cSEZLgEMygM4gRU0JoRw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=11) his thought process while breaching the U.S. Capitol building. According to Thompson and his lawyer, Thompson believed that he was acting on the will of the former President while attending the rally-turned-insurrection in Washington, DC on January 6th. During his testimony, Thompson outlined the [isolation](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GmrkqIvTVM5Gw19P8OEWnqPAtIHhAMxU89vlTUXNYDblxmZBcd2KUjPJ5pvIlFzJaELa2QCXfU3rwTQo6uaFJpSmY5WbPBM7b9SwYObCJXH1hDEIRUv98owYykwvukd_SBLz0_H51tE2xKrt5eVYKz0tpFBP-9w6nwK5iXwQADg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=12) he felt following the loss of his job during the coronavirus pandemic that caused him to go "down the rabbit hole" into QAnon-type conspiracy theories. He pointed out the multitude of speakers at the “Stop the Steal” rally that took place mere hours before the attack on the Capitol building. Thompson, under oath, testified that, "Besides being ordered by the President to go to the Capitol" he was, "caught up in the moment." Thompson is the third rioter to go before a jury for his role in the attempted coup. **Former President’s Daughter Sits With 1/6 Committee for Hours** Ivanka Trump, the former first daughter and top White House official, sat with the 1/6 Committee on April 5th to [discuss](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=oGkNRIpNU-65tzHrfmdwr_ftpwyVb_P58eB3biM8ucWT4MJv3uRCOOJt8tRNtX_0uYugp8do1GdypuhJ7plb6gBFh7v2LCtlbTJu1s44kRKv0TvQG4VTKzf-pLFCcu_zHvArUdWXWcOS3jza5nMULw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=13) the events that occurred before, during, and after the brutal attack of the U.S. Capitol. Her testimony comes just days after her [husband](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=oGkNRIpNU-65tzHrfmdwr53NNYGUFnWQUBIcwfpuDvqoeLIObChN7I8ELGJk8dhaR4uY3cvl_pf9CV2EpwiuhOlN_C8sbQyaTJouQgcjf--bl-WOLHZzpFJ8_pL7ZjwLo5gFZZg-huXYLLlbsHt1ww&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=14) and former top White House official, Jared Kushner, answered questions that proved "helpful" to the committee’s investigation. According to sources familiar with the committee, Ms. Trump [spoke](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=oGkNRIpNU-65tzHrfmdwr_ftpwyVb_P58eB3biM8ucWT4MJv3uRCOOJt8tRNtX_0uYugp8do1GdypuhJ7plb6gBFh7v2LCtlbTJu1s44kRKv0TvQG4VTKzf-pLFCcu_zHvArUdWXWcOS3jza5nMULw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=15) with committee members about her and her father’s whereabouts and thought processes from the time leading up to the attack and throughout the assault. According to Chairman Bennie Thompson (D-MS), the former first daughter and top aide did not assert any sort of privilege and answered questions the committee asked, though not divulging the depth of her answers. Although the contents of the committee's questions or her answers were not revealed, the committee’s progress towards the former President’s most inner and influential circle. **Federal Judge Rules that Trump "More Likely Than Not" Committed a Crime in Attempt to Overturn the 2020 Election** Delivering yet another devastating blow to the former President’s attempt to decertify the 2020 election, Judge David Carter, a federal judge in California [asserted](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GmrkqIvTVM5Gw19P8OEWnqPAtIHhAMxU89vlTUXNYDbFLVKTCXyW02D83EyDqk1Y-Ea73Hm_6a-8rd4cqqrAf2rboBoTirr01-_3X6rYwtQ8xrwEih77MQMpfFEHCgZZk5s0In1rjnkjUzr5FFSBt6LRrpQ3X4jzAEkSWlnaUEo&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=16) on March 28th that the former President probably broke the law. The federal judge wrote that "based on the evidence, the Court finds it more likely than not that President Trump corruptly attempted to obstruct the Joint Session of Congress on January 6, 2021," and ordered Trump attorney, John Eastman, to turn over more than 100 emails to the 1/6 Committee. Carter’s reasoning [pointed](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHsPiXkBwa9Dd-KWaAAkSDp0x4_GKcYuc7mNmcdNdH6Clog8nbeT3pe9aemwbQGOcPDIMqEYUfUjMlcecn7u9w0Y&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=17) to the former President’s continual attempts to undermine the democratic process of certifying a federal election, including the insurrection that took place after his speech on January 6th, as reasoning for his assertion. Judge Carter’s ruling is part of a civil suit involving the Trump camp’s attempt to evade the 1/6 Committee's request for documents pertaining to the attack at the Capitol. **Proud Boy, Charles Donohoe, Pleads Guilty to Conspiracy and Agrees to Cooperate with DOJ** A leader of the far-right group Proud Boys has pleaded [guilty](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=oGkNRIpNU-65tzHrfmdwrz996zvk7gzj0oUP_t1vDSS4NR38NGQHWYSJ8smY3Wnxp8CELzN48GBIHdcslyuOnU5C_ipjb_eFSznW2emklDE42v4VsdX-6pMRx2sDaH-5l_bUCcSyNYmiygjC5L1ibYG7I6q_18shZ27BaGGtZys&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=18) to charges of conspiracy in connection with the coup attempt on the U.S. Capitol. As a part of his deal, the conspiracy theorist agreed to cooperate with the Department of Justice investigation into the events that unfolded on January 6th. Donahue, a member of the North Carolina chapter called the Ministry of Self Defense, was aware of the threat of violence on January 6th as early as January 4th. According to court filings, Donahue believed that "storming the Capitol would achieve the group's goal of stopping the government from carrying out the transfer of presidential power." The goal of the event was to interfere and prevent the counting of the electoral college votes, a traditionally symbolic event. Donahue along with six other high-profile Proud Boy members have been charged with conspiring to obstruct an official proceeding, and assaulting, resisting or impeding an officer among other offenses. The other charges have been dropped against Donahue in exchange for his cooperation. Donahue and his co-defendants Henry Enrique Tarrio, Ethan Nordean, Joseph Biggs, Zachary Rehl, were among some of the first to breach the Capitol building on January 6th. **Revealing Documents Show Plan to Occupy the Capitol Building and Supreme Court Building on January 6th** Prosecutors in Proud Boys leader Enrique Tarrio's case [accusing](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHsvqzijJIWNsXafTCuFb3ywgtCmUndopNc_dfhMWhEzTEO5bt0YMpn9fWjSoUoI5SLW_kxbDF_XzQmzot2IJfbbSOMQXzXcoSaHydpxZLppX&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=19) him of conspiracy, among other charges, have revealed a more elaborate plan to overtake and undermine the United States government by occupying the entire Capitol complex. In a nine-page manifesto of sorts, the "1776 returns" plan outlined the direct action to take six congressional office buildings hostage and demand a new election in the streets of Washington, DC. Although the plan doesn’t directly call for storming the U.S. Capitol building, the two-pronged manifesto describes "storm[ing] the winter palace" as one of the prongs. After, the "patriot plan" was set to be installed, flooding the streets with "patriots" to demand a new election on January 20th. It is unknown how many members of the far-right militia, the Proud Boys, the document had been distributed to, but it could shed light on the frame of mind many of them were in on January 6th. Tarrio is accused of planning, encouraging, and inciting violence at the U.S. Capitol in an effort to reinstall Trump as the President. **Other news that may be of interest:**
* Ex-Trump advisor, Stephen Miller, set to [speak](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9bmQjRYvg5RiftfZZQBIKJ8Ds7IkJreY9XsshPjddVtCLvbjpf1b6bzOe_Ll13svOvJfm9lF7Gz8n9o2XNwS4phWJWxQA3rlMHvOsSlSFa3qrcmCSAklJGe7Re-5uvoHFgFlfsd7Vpuzn4Lmgy49aT2kIFyoIxZM-qzT7xfBiVsburp5qI2rmwpVlouaXvU73A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=20) with 1/6 Committee on April 14th
* 1/6 Committee [looks](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GmrkqIvTVM5Gw19P8OEWnqPAtIHhAMxU89vlTUXNYDYQmyt3fftOoEcuxYqeCeVLKFLgHYVsbtpld4puBSOzSMckKtrt8r2PGjl0zLdPbm2gXU2-mSi8ODx8g5ahIMTI2zmNalchxGepuS5Qrt85Tg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=21) to May for public hearings
* 1/6 Committee set to [receive](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHngbQEaLGNWITIanmatFMmseRzjV3ifRp-Uaaq2bRZ8UMnU4q8000VhZGnEP3yGjuJ012vC0KFBiQjC0wyJgn84Rg_Xvr4q5TPTVFyK3u4JzXIqBJ1EtQXp7K3N3Yqp1ig&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=22) new Trump White House documents
* Ex-Trump advisor, Roger Stone, [allegedly](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=QZRPSKM9y6z5lCx4Xi6o32c6_JqcjvlD4dgMfRVCrb_C2T_scVOlH1dtcJMLj-ldHx96iRstAWbQe9TfDq8C274fOvNrGy5vxB6PdN_AVJIQA3BxRsYld4hfYwMnIV2fDJY-sUmJ16l_ooxy66mw4Q&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=23) tells supporters to "descend on the Capitol" in revealing phone call
* Over 800 people have been [charged](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=XyFDjtFWEG67DvqcZQTS-Rcje1M4W5fEX7QkwXIB21EEm18mah-fqctg3vmXSDt4f2t5EtGxS2NusRJqZrNpLv_hmbxcU2V9wGlNhMP2D1_TU87KV_hhVMhws-G5WEWy&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_friday_nd&n=24) in connection with 1/6 insurrection

_Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. If you would like to help contribute content to this newsletter, please e-mail[volunteer@country1st.com](mailto:volunteer@country1st.com)._

clean_body: | Friend -- First, happy Passover and Easter to those celebrating this weekend! Today, Good Friday, my family's faith tradition is to commemorate the death of Jesus Christ. And, I dare say, all people can find secular hope in this religious story. Christians call it "Good Friday" today because we know what follows three days later. But to those living it in the moment, that day would have been one of the darkest, saddest, and most hopeless they'd experienced. Perhaps you've had a day like that -- one so difficult or awful that hope, in the moment, wasn't easy to find. I know I have -- January 6th felt that way to me. But as Easter reminds us: Out of darkness comes light; out of hopelessness comes hope; and out of death comes resurrection. We couldn't have Easter without Good Friday. And so no matter how dark times can feel in our own country and world; how readily lies and conspiracies are told and consumed; how terrifyingly fragile our democracy seems at the moment -- WE THE PEOPLE have the power to bring about America's political and cultural resurrection. There is hope -- we're staring at it in the mirror. And that's where our PRIMARY 1ST plan comes in, which is a bold, original strategy to mobilize disaffected Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to vote in Republican primaries to defeat the extreme Trump-First candidates seeking to dominate institutions key to maintaining democracy in America, from local election officials to the U.S. Congress. You can learn all about our thrilling, hopeful strategy : | "PRIMARY 1ST STRATEGY" The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again, expecting different results. And that's why we're so excited to do something unexpected, and have a real chance to shift the center of gravity and improve the odds that we can elect more Country First candidates to replace poisonous partisans. But none of us can do it alone, and that's why I'm calling on every member of this movement to find a way to invest however you can in our country's future. Would you please consider: > as a volunteer? > Spreading the word to your friends, family, and any other likeminded person? (Forward this email to them) > a gift to fund the mission? Whether you can do one thing or all of the things, our collective actions add up to making a huge difference. And armed with our primary election strategy, we've got even more important work to do. I know I'm ready -- and I hope you're with me! Thanks, as always, for everything you do to bring this movement to life. I couldn't do this without people like you, and I wouldn't want to. name: Trump Majority Team
subject: You're one step away
body:
Finish it out! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9826%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=blTwAv1gNr7onX6KWbTqFQ&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28406%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xSS4vCUtMWKYBRkrK5RYJg&sysid=1)

Friend,

We noticed that you are just 1 step away from being in the top 0.5% of all Trump supporters...

subject: If we fail to reach this goal, our chances of defeating Gov. DeSantis will plummet
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
and we’re still falling short! |
---

| | Hi there, it’s Charlie Crist’s finance team.

By now, you’ve probably heard that we set an aggressive mid-month goal of raising $15,000. We’re reaching out to let you know that while we’ve made significant progress toward this goal, we’re not there yet.

**_[To close the gap, we’re asking everyone to pitch in a few dollars by midnight tonight. Can you do that now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44181001/340444257/1278717326?&amount=5&refcode=20220415_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQ3MTBkOS1lY2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dS_SO_XVjoapfiD12c_EUv8jjbLjS8aMKvZFlNrFRuo=)_ If we fail to reach this goal, our chances of defeating Gov. Ron DeSantis will plummet.**

Unlike Gov. DeSantis, Charlie doesn’t rely on right-wing, billionaire donors and their deep pockets. He depends on his incredible grassroots team, and that’s why we're coming to you today.

We wouldn’t ask if we didn’t need your help, friend.**If you can spare any amount, we know Charlie would be very grateful.[_Please contribute by the end of the day!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44181002/340444258/1278717326?&amount=5&refcode=20220415_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTQ3MTBkOS1lY2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dS_SO_XVjoapfiD12c_EUv8jjbLjS8aMKvZFlNrFRuo=)**

We profoundly appreciate your support!

— Finance Department, Team Crist

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: I need your help today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress 1317 W Frontage Rd, Suite A, Alamo, TX 78516
body:
We need women like Monica in Congress - she would be nothing but an asset to our party and to the House | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=58388a4e558c4cef85c6a2186a9b6142&_e=GA9vBxT9Uy3E1ow7X8uyDSgXwWe9IjE301TekaHDbxyQMUVkCX9Hl96_zXDwc0MsBtSJ4mOM_Ygjx7fuEGehnczRAuncSyK6lBCVYg5GOmre0CFkPXaYHtWUPTCSRlLFjT4850lq6Z67UixYYlu6FC21tYQ5U8tu6H5pLQft5crQ-JkIg-6hIIMKg9PgR8cdk2FiPkv_QenTnGfDWLpWaj2BOY4m2A12cAjNTKND3ZBbtYaFYtyB9wsGPCkwS-flZBKzoOYzSLS15iMJ9Y6SyvT2Z3lK5ZCK71SKm_YBxLUuDGHk6LZr_K3cnMo1edQv1z8hDcjSGspu1tZXUy4dSaxl35KuK4Hz9Vz89byoLMaBXwN14HZfZf-ZOuvUvdFUcFCMdx6WwAe1VqCXoAZNnDcUK_bCHqTU-m-FAHAuNtqSlRCcYPX36_v5b8a-b9ZbTFtJEcaaM69HIgYIlijCI87TWl_9JtgH6hUBZ5ClvWymTJhaESXJfmOuU8R1v56UwfE790AuoT7yWNiWZXWNRQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in this year's midterm elections** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=58388a4e558c4cef85c6a2186a9b6142&_e=GA9vBxT9Uy3E1ow7X8uyDSgXwWe9IjE301TekaHDbxyQMUVkCX9Hl96_zXDwc0MsBtSJ4mOM_Ygjx7fuEGehnczRAuncSyK6lBCVYg5GOmre0CFkPXaYHtWUPTCSRlLFjT4850lq6Z67UixYYlu6FC21tYQ5U8tu6H5pLQft5crQ-JkIg-6hIIMKg9PgR8cdk2FiPkv_QenTnGfDWLpWaj2BOY4m2A12cAjNTKND3ZBbtYaFYtyB9wsGPCkwS-flZBKzoOYzSLS15iMJ9Y6SyvT2Z3lK5ZCK71SKm_YBxLUuDGHk6LZr_K3cnMo1edQvxqzipglA2FPb-kla4BRL-iB_eAPbO4Ailj_wwCz1sOmTSxE__67_qPGX1WRxtcaVTsa3ngJt98Z-EO0VaKs1G1b63wnfjgBlyfs0AjQWyIfzDIKGseJ1Im19Q6BhFJRxKA2S7oz5u3lJC-0-OXR8zCfum0lYi11AU2EFGqCZl6AXYUNr78qfLm3CxM-_weVawBhbchXDYFV_oV9L7xeDQg%3D%3D)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Hispanic woman elected to Congress from her district_!

When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast - and my team and I believe she has a very solid chance of winning this time around.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=58388a4e558c4cef85c6a2186a9b6142&_e=GA9vBxT9Uy3E1ow7X8uyDSgXwWe9IjE301TekaHDbxyQMUVkCX9Hl96_zXDwc0MsBtSJ4mOM_Ygjx7fuEGehnczRAuncSyK6lBCVYg5GOmre0CFkPXaYHtWUPTCSRlLFjT4850lq6Z67UixYYlu6FC21tYQ5U8tu6H5pLQft5crQ-JkIg-6hIIMKg9PgR8cdk2FiPkv_QenTnGfDWLpWaj2BOY4m2A12cAjNTKND3ZBbtYaFYtyB9wsGPCkwS-flZBKzoOYzSLS15iMJ9Y6SyvT2Z3lK5ZCK71SKm_YBxLUuDGHk6LZr_K3cnMo1edQvnJhxPn2vRw9vmYdwYos6Z4BV77GA9JEPXRmNrs1Gif6tsWLqKex2bVVrUqpe4XwJtwzRD5UtZDLoPvq7Ufq49t-Bjo_oKPk7D6duHt6wvlF1XolxtytClfLPTtUd2SNbSaoqCFByQP6ZfXpoz_Jenq0V2Da60BddmT_Yqxq63n9ThUPOILWAN6T_DhPeLheIjP-GyJSHr2ChmAZ7x-cO7g%3D%3D)

**With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority.**

Can you think of anyone better to be the Republican Party's spokesperson on border issues than a resident of a border community? I can't.

That's why w**e must do everything that we personally can** do to help Monica succeed in her congressional race.

But none of this can happen without **[YOUR HELP](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=58388a4e558c4cef85c6a2186a9b6142&_e=GA9vBxT9Uy3E1ow7X8uyDSgXwWe9IjE301TekaHDbxyQMUVkCX9Hl96_zXDwc0MsBtSJ4mOM_Ygjx7fuEGehnczRAuncSyK6lBCVYg5GOmre0CFkPXaYHtWUPTCSRlLFjT4850lq6Z67UixYYlu6FC21tYQ5U8tu6H5pLQft5crQ-JkIg-6hIIMKg9PgR8cdk2FiPkv_QenTnGfDWLpWaj2BOY4m2A12cAjNTKND3ZBbtYaFYtyB9wsGPCkwS-flZBKzoOYzSLS15iMJ9Y6SyvT2Z3lK5ZCK71SKm_YBxLUuDGHk6LZr_K3cnMo1edQvkYIct2HSc3jQxmbcRKCq60hrS95uECLrIHEoCC5EWGbH5V2T-1PxGWhlnMdFQ3w8BaiJ2AvSAX1J2jQHQQTXR4kvhLbODa-X_EWG_uvu-qVRHOZ31z-x6k84QoT0yPX9ZrFN1Z1i0BxCwgy23y3Y6VucoSQg_FozUOTz_TUMOlV415vlOIhTeyAA3Zs-eRFiEJ-t0ubv8YQyQl4JO5fJcA%3D%3D)**.

**[Can I count on you to support one of the strongest candidates I know? She has my full support, now I need my supporters to have her back too.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=58388a4e558c4cef85c6a2186a9b6142&_e=GA9vBxT9Uy3E1ow7X8uyDSgXwWe9IjE301TekaHDbxyQMUVkCX9Hl96_zXDwc0MsBtSJ4mOM_Ygjx7fuEGehnczRAuncSyK6lBCVYg5GOmre0CFkPXaYHtWUPTCSRlLFjT4850lq6Z67UixYYlu6FC21tYQ5U8tu6H5pLQft5crQ-JkIg-6hIIMKg9PgR8cdk2FiPkv_QenTnGfDWLpWaj2BOY4m2A12cAjNTKND3ZBbtYaFYtyB9wsGPCkwS-flZBKzoOYzSLS15iMJ9Y6SyvT2Z3lK5ZCK71SKm_YBxLUuDGHk6LZr_K3cnMo1edQvxRD3wNr9h92W1MpqB290S6GR2iYhaMKKg2Y1xaYsXifWDCUAlnYchpwLG80Q1qitwq2qjZwJHqwi3bUyzyK3kM8RV_9i7subBWDjqyadOXY_ai6i2_gNY6feBe6LsWIS9v3h3q5xK0GpCYoAhYq4uO5xmBitZSMvqgoESa8wErLUSTWt4gM7Zh-Y9f-1PJLEHivGs3rOy78dRTNTNQQdkQ%3D%3D)**

| [**HELP ME GET MONICA TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=58388a4e558c4cef85c6a2186a9b6142&_e=GA9vBxT9Uy3E1ow7X8uyDSgXwWe9IjE301TekaHDbxyQMUVkCX9Hl96_zXDwc0MsBtSJ4mOM_Ygjx7fuEGehnczRAuncSyK6lBCVYg5GOmre0CFkPXaYHtWUPTCSRlLFjT4850lq6Z67UixYYlu6FC21tYQ5U8tu6H5pLQft5crQ-JkIg-6hIIMKg9PgR8cdk2FiPkv_QenTnGfDWLpWaj2BOY4m2A12cAjNTKND3ZBbtYaFYtyB9wsGPCkwS-flZBKzoOYzSLS15iMJ9Y6SyvT2Z3lK5ZCK71SKm_YBxLUuDGHk6LZr_K3cnMo1edQvmYpTQOJab6IEEYgDSRR7fS5deZMX35-QzFxkjhk1HtJQur8A78_s32OoC-t-yM6QWDJAKP05Gc39YN6qzzpM7RuaMee8e9ggVa9x_I3oFq3cAD3ZTSRuxYSGhb0EkmF485UFRJ_3rT5Qb5H_y7DD1b2QPXFKqvlunjNXvvl8P4KLFuvR6_CKGSFflTzej0a8WHeVja6rNIqfemuNDaj02Q%3D%3D)
---

Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. She is truly one of the strongest and determined people that I know, and**I need her in Congress with me**.

Monica knows the value of hard work and sacrifice firsthand. Raised by her mother in a South Texas border town, she didn’t have it easy growing up, but she was determined to achieve the American Dream

Monica is someone who knows how to GET THINGS DONE and she would make an **excellent addition** to Congress.

[**Republicans only need to pick up five seats to win back the House next year, can I get you to chip in $25, $50, maybe even $100 towards Monica’s campaign so she can help us take back the House majority?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=58388a4e558c4cef85c6a2186a9b6142&_e=GA9vBxT9Uy3E1ow7X8uyDSgXwWe9IjE301TekaHDbxyQMUVkCX9Hl96_zXDwc0MsBtSJ4mOM_Ygjx7fuEGehnczRAuncSyK6lBCVYg5GOmre0CFkPXaYHtWUPTCSRlLFjT4850lq6Z67UixYYlu6FC21tYQ5U8tu6H5pLQft5crQ-JkIg-6hIIMKg9PgR8cdk2FiPkv_QenTnGfDWLpWaj2BOY4m2A12cAjNTKND3ZBbtYaFYtyB9wsGPCkwS-flZBKzoOYzSLS15iMJ9Y6SyvT2Z3lK5ZCK71SKm_YBxLUuDGHk6LZr_K3cnMo1edQvHXroqPmCZ1ArTLcauJ1zocicLXBIOBOMkY8XMYOhgXUrAT2UtH3TGVvQ-WdmexvBdXrMFfJux77ZggnNAD4ja_AMwErOPPhJJEGg4M1chhZsE-WZLIHzjNcMuLqxKbZUt4G-Raq9_7wFdxP-a-__jb287ujzF6I3QjN9eT2V2C0QIOBm1c8LQbvJEaZRtPXGwafx51bap34Rq15A-d6gEw%3D%3D)

I’m grateful to have Monica as a friend and the American people would be extremely fortunate to have her as a Congresswoman. **I can say, without a doubt, that a win for Monica would be a win for Republicans and a win for the American people**.

[**HELP ME GET MONICA TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=58388a4e558c4cef85c6a2186a9b6142&_e=GA9vBxT9Uy3E1ow7X8uyDSgXwWe9IjE301TekaHDbxyQMUVkCX9Hl96_zXDwc0MsBtSJ4mOM_Ygjx7fuEGehnczRAuncSyK6lBCVYg5GOmre0CFkPXaYHtWUPTCSRlLFjT4850lq6Z67UixYYlu6FC21tYQ5U8tu6H5pLQft5crQ-JkIg-6hIIMKg9PgR8cdk2FiPkv_QenTnGfDWLpWaj2BOY4m2A12cAjNTKND3ZBbtYaFYtyB9wsGPCkwS-flZBKzoOYzSLS15iMJ9Y6SyvT2Z3lK5ZCK71SKm_YBxLUuDGHk6LZr_K3cnMo1edQv60F5QhiCBb8ozD-PDt5y8PlOcMkAVFzLEItZlwo1fDo9oXkQ3lV0XAINj4QPKI3arNdAzlIWmnOINuQuYIEYJKWs9yOSlMTJf_eW5_bjtI3xN6suDSOtX06M4uNFtjUnDhrgtPW8QEeumVfzMW0kDcHxAqeOMbAbpPd37sRvL5rGSUZW0TRiAZiMW77oM9RRnlOUa3MPzeOdrC2JgI60Hg%3D%3D)
---

**[Can I count on you to support the entire party by joining me in backing Monica?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=58388a4e558c4cef85c6a2186a9b6142&_e=GA9vBxT9Uy3E1ow7X8uyDSgXwWe9IjE301TekaHDbxyQMUVkCX9Hl96_zXDwc0MsBtSJ4mOM_Ygjx7fuEGehnczRAuncSyK6lBCVYg5GOmre0CFkPXaYHtWUPTCSRlLFjT4850lq6Z67UixYYlu6FC21tYQ5U8tu6H5pLQft5crQ-JkIg-6hIIMKg9PgR8cdk2FiPkv_QenTnGfDWLpWaj2BOY4m2A12cAjNTKND3ZBbtYaFYtyB9wsGPCkwS-flZBKzoOYzSLS15iMJ9Y6SyvT2Z3lK5ZCK71SKm_YBxLUuDGHk6LZr_K3cnMo1edQvuo6RWsX49nivGelHQZnwoCe0Q6RfTDpyXisNHFu5KYcEJKvvwkDFfcfp3ao6VpJi6Gm5rWal00zXAmHTb-VLcNt1AXJtVfcCL9-BEwtknAspj0Ia01HjTnf9hKrjw445k9Ju3Ky3MskQL_QhxQFIAZ5BmL_uE-S4tD93AoHaEOXmStka7oDFlH47rx4589UqUt7XLrQJojP139WENFRLrw%3D%3D)**

Thank you
Rep. Dan Crenshaw

clean_body: We need women like Monica in Congress - she would be nothing but an asset to our party and to the House | Fellow patriot, As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in this year's midterm elections but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today. To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz. . In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the first ever conservative Hispanic woman elected to Congress from her district! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast - and my team and I believe she has a very solid chance of winning this time around. With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority. Can you think of anyone better to be the Republican Party's spokesperson on border issues than a resident of a border community? I can't. That's why we must do everything that we personally can do to help Monica succeed in her congressional race. But none of this can happen without . | Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. She is truly one of the strongest and determined people that I know, andI need her in Congress with me. Monica knows the value of hard work and sacrifice firsthand. Raised by her mother in a South Texas border town, she didn’t have it easy growing up, but she was determined to achieve the American Dream Monica is someone who knows how to GET THINGS DONE and she would make an excellent addition to Congress. I’m grateful to have Monica as a friend and the American people would be extremely fortunate to have her as a Congresswoman. I can say, without a doubt, that a win for Monica would be a win for Republicans and a win for the American people. Thank you Rep. Dan Crenshaw P.S. Monica is headed into a multi-way primary for the Republican Party's nomination and . There is no telling what kind of candidate our party would end up with if Monica's not successful. | Paid for by Monica for Congress 1317 W Frontage Rd, Suite A, Alamo, TX 78516 Don't want to receive our emails?

[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) is bringing
in $100,000 checks and million dollar transfers from the Nancy Pelosi
Victory Fund to support their corporate candidates, we’re raising money
from grassroots donors to support grassroots, progressive candidates.

And even though our fundraising is struggling this year, we will never
take a check from a corporate PAC — because we’re fighting for the people,
NOT corporations.

On April 6, we let you all know that we were facing a concerning downward
fundraising trend this year. Since then, 1,438 donors have stepped up and
chipped in to help us turn things around. Our average donation this month
is just $19.76.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102754?refcode=em20220415-22875&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=22875%2E1203867%2Ej6CxRh ]BUT, as of today, the midpoint of April, we’re still 6% behind last
month’s fundraising pace. So,
Peter, we have to ask: can you
contribute $3 today to help fuel our primaries?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102754?refcode=em20220415-22875&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22875%2E1203867%2Ej6CxRh ]Contribute

We’re less than 6 weeks from our next primary, and if we’re going to
defeat candidates backed by the Democratic establishment, Big Pharma, Wall
Street, fossil fuel companies, health insurance executives, and Republican
mega-donors, we need everyone in our movement to step up.

The only way we can build support in Congress for Medicare for All and a
Green New Deal is by electing more representatives like Jessica Cisneros,
Summer Lee, Kina Collins, Rana Abdelhamid, and Odessa Kelly.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102754?refcode=em20220415-22875&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22875%2E1203867%2Ej6CxRh ]Peter, can
you chip in $3, $19.76, or anything at all today to fuel
our progressive fight?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=22875%2E1203867%2Ej6CxRh ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=22875%2E1203867%2Ej6CxRh ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220415-22875-footer&t=1025&refcode2=22875_1203867_j6CxRh&akid=22875%2E1203867%2Ej6CxRh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=22875%2E1203867%2Ej6CxRh

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jay=20Block?=
subject: Election Integrity Matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
Democracy Can Slip Through Our Fingers | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-7076209?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=96f5299c2e&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **As a Sandoval County Commissioner, I want to safeguard the choice made in each resident’s vote. I am deeply grateful for the dedicated service of our officials in the Clerk’s office, and I recently asked some tough questions about our county ballot drop boxes.**

_What I learned substantiates the nationwide concerns about election integrity_. It was reported that the greatest vulnerability with our county ballot drop boxes is in the rural areas where there is inadequate surveillance.

_**That wasn’t the only concern revealed.**_ It was also discovered that with current surveillance protocols, it cannot be verified whether a voter is dropping off their own ballot. If bad actors obstruct the view of cameras, multiple ballots could be dropped without leaving a trail of evidence. Additionally, even though officials in the clerk’s office receive alerts from sensors placed at each ballot drop box, potential damage to ballots would have already occurred by the time alerts are received.

**The situation with the ballot drop boxes in our state and nation is a complete disaster.** **These vulnerabilities demonstrate how ballot boxes have no place in our voting system._Voters do not trust the use of them_ , and this information makes that understandable.**

I am grateful to Sandoval County Election officials who answered the tough questions. Now we can begin the process of securing our elections to restore faith that each valid vote counts!

**As your next Governor,** I will stand against laws which perpetuate vulnerabilities in our election process. Together we can act as problem solvers to create a system that garners confidence in the sanctity of our most foundational right as Americans: having a voice in free and fair elections.

Will you place your vote of confidence in me today by making a donation to my campaign?

---

name: Peter Franchot
subject: URGENT: Fundraising Deadline Tonight
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
We’re just hours away from our critical mid-month fundraising deadline. Over the past few days, our grassroots supporters have stepped up to help power our movement to victory. Thanks to them, we’re making great progress towards our goal – but we’re still a few dollars short! If you are able to help, now is the opportunity to maximize your impact.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0415?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0415?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0415?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0415?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0415]
Thanks to our incredible grassroots supporters, our people-powered movement is closer to the finish line than any other team in this race. Recent polls have consistently shown that we have a strong lead over the rest of the field. And we’ve already gained the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials – the most of any candidate for Governor in either category.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0415?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0415?amount=20.22]
I have no doubt that with your help, we can pull ahead even further in these final months. We have an exciting opportunity to change the way that government does business in 2022. From building a statewide transit system, to making Maryland the first carbon neutral state in the nation, to lowering the cost of healthcare and more, we’re going to deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Our challenges are sweeping. So too must be our solutions. Enough talk – let’s get it done! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0415?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0415?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Michele Rayner
subject: let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida P

A mid-month goal is useful for two reasons.

In order to keep track of our progress, our campaign keeps regular tabs on our fundraising. So a mid-month goal is useful for two reasons.

**One:** It gives us an **accurate idea of the pace of donations** for the month.

**Two:** It gives us **enough time to catch up** when we’re falling behind.

So at this point in April, in order to hit our $20,000 digital fundraising goal we should be close to $10,000... but right now we’re barely over $6,000.

[Obviously this is not where we should be right now, so I’m personally reaching out to ask for your help to close this fundraising gap. Your $3 donation directly impacts our work and grows our critical voter outreach operation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44165704/340396197/1210045690?amount=3&refcode=MRFC_20220415_EMDF_E1_T0_30AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTNhYWZiYS1jY2JjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nU8Dok6xPo0nOqHYtYosjjI2pRrigWt-Y6ShII1PBo=)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Warnock’s numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! |

---
**🚨 BREAKING NEWS: Democrat Raphael Warnock Raised $13.6 Million in Q1 🚨**

Fellow American,

We knew our Democrat opponent was raising a lot of money, but this incredible amount in just three months is more than any candidate in the country.

13.6 million dollars.

That's $151,111 a day.

| Friend,

President Biden’s border policies are a betrayal of the American people and of America herself. _**They are also illegal** \- _**which is why I am suing him in federal court.**

| Law-abiding citizens are paying dearly for this Administration's disastrous policies. Since Joe Biden has taken office, we've witnessed OVER 2,000,000 border crossings and a huge upsurge in human traffickers and dangerous drugs flooding in from Mexico. **_Overdose deaths are at an all-time high._**

Take a look at these horrifying drug seizure numbers _** just this year**_** ** under the Biden Administration:

🚨 **77.9 thousand pounds** of Methamphetamine
🚨 **23.5 thousand pounds** of Cocaine
🚨** 4.2 thousand pounds **of Fentanyl

Democrats' disregard for border security and the Rule of Law puts American families, businesses, and communities at risk. Joe Biden has refused to enforce the law, deport illegal immigrants and secure the border. _Republican Attorneys General are taking action to keep America safe and hold Biden accountable._

From: Team Lamb
Date: April 14, 2022 at 3:07 p.m.
Subject: What we're up against

Friend,

We are almost one month out from our primary. But as Democrats in Pennsylvania get ready to make their choice, let's look at the choice facing Republicans next month.

First there's Dr. Oz, the **Republican multimillionaire resident of New Jersey** who has been endorsed by Donald Trump. Oz donated $5 million to his own campaign and has made millions by peddling dubious medical supplements and COVID misinformation.

Here are the facts, Derek —
* There are only **32 days** left until Election Day in the Democratic primary for PA-17.

* Chris is the only candidate to have the endorsements of major unions, local elected officials, and _both_ county Democratic committees in Western PA.

* Chris refuses to accept corporate PAC money, unlike self-funded right-wing extremists. Instead, our campaign is powered by grassroots donations from everyday Pennsylvanians.

* We’re almost a few hours away from our mid-month deadline, and we’re counting on supporters like you to fuel our get-out-the-vote operation in the upcoming weeks. But that takes significant resources, so we’re asking:

[**We’re running out of time, Derek. name: Team AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A donation from you today will prove our movement’s values have strong support from across the country.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220415-2951-header&t=1&akid=2951%2E2526796%2EgQoC00)
**298.**
That’s how many contributions we need to reach before midnight tonight in order to hit our mid-month target.
How did we get that number? Based on our average gift for the month ($14.73) and how much we’ve raised so far, we need 298 more contributions by midnight tonight in order to stay on track toward hitting our overall targets for April.
**298 is an important number to us because each donation – no matter the amount – shows that our values from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal have strong support in your state and across the country.**
[Can you be one of the 298 people we need to chip in within the next 12 hours to meet our goal and allow us to carry out all the programs Alexandria has planned?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220415?refcode=em20220415-2951-P_FND_MMF_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2951_2526796_gQoC00&akid=2951%2E2526796%2EgQoC00)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220415?refcode=em20220415-2951-P_FND_MMF_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2951_2526796_gQoC00&akid=2951%2E2526796%2EgQoC00)**
Each donation we receive directly translates into growing our movement.
Thank you for making all of this possible.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220415?refcode=em20220415-2951-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=22&refcode2=2951_2526796_gQoC00&akid=2951%2E2526796%2EgQoC00)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220415-2951-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=23&akid=2951%2E2526796%2EgQoC00)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

body:
| Hey Peter, Things have been moving _really_ fast ever since Dr. Caraveo locked up the Democratic nomination, and I’ve got to get back to meetings in a minute — but I wanted to send you a quick note about our current situation. Basically, **winning the primary two and a half months early (!) changes _everything_**. Since we don’t have to spend resources competing in a primary election, we have an incredible opportunity to lay the groundwork and invest in significant organizing infrastructure months before whichever far-right, anti-choice GOP opponent the Republican Party nominates. In a race as competitive as this one’s going to be, every dollar we raise _now_ — before the general election really starts to ramp up in the summer, and especially while the GOP nominees are still fighting amongst themselves — could be a difference-maker. So, can you chip in to our Voter Outreach Fund to help us get out ahead of our opponent? Use this link to make a donation: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/caraveo-outreachfund](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44167940/340406473/-1294466778?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220415mm3ahead_db_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2NiZjllNS1kMGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_gj0HETk383pS2JNXZXctw49RVrnvkkL2bzjCqzO0g0=) Thanks! Peter,

Earlier this year, the Washington State legislature approved a new congressional map. After redistricting, WA-08 not only remains the most competitive district in the state – but it will also be one of the closest races in the entire country.

An election expert at _Inside Elections_ said, **"The 8th will still be a highly competitive seat. According to the composite of statewide and federal races between 2016 and 2020, the district has an average partisanship of R+3.1."**

Peter – Kim is in for her toughest race yet. Republicans have named her seat a top target and _The Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ , and _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ are all calling her race a "toss-up." We need your help to ensure we have the resources to take on Kim's four Republican opponents and keep this seat blue.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The lines are drawn . . .
body:
Disney World is GROUND ZERO in the Culture Wars after Governor Ron DeSantis signed a law to protect our children from the Trans Agenda in schools."
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Cad5eWZfYwy5dSFHE3pbiw/CgBaU763p2Vm5SHaOrxwhTdg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ymT3AL0LXJ5fSzzz97lqGQ/CgBaU763p2Vm5SHaOrxwhTdg)I just received what looks to be the final redistricting map and the lines for Florida's 11th Congressional District, where I'm running against RINO Incumbent, Daniel Webster.

After taking a look at the map, it hit me that my mission has expanded to include one of the most vital issues we face today . . . **protecting our children from the sick minds of the Left.**

**If this map is finalized, my district will now include Disney World.**

[And I need your help more than ever to win.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ymT3AL0LXJ5fSzzz97lqGQ/CgBaU763p2Vm5SHaOrxwhTdg)

You know, Disney, the wholesome, family-oriented global empire that influences our children from birth?

At least that's what they want you to think . . .

Today, **Disney World is GROUND ZERO in the Culture Wars** after Governor Ron DeSantis signed a new law to protect our children from the hyper-sexualized Trans Agenda in schools.

The new law forbids teachers from teaching gender identity and sexual orientation to children in Kindergarten to Third Grade. Basically, Governor DeSantis wants kids to be kids without influence from the LGBTQ and Trans Agenda.

And it's needed!

In Loudon County, Virginia, educators fell in line with the demands of the Trans Rights Lobby and allowed boys in the girl's bathroom. And what happened? The obvious: **a transgender biological teenage boy sexually assaulted a girl in a high school bathroom!**

[Help me win a seat in Congress to stop the Trans Left from preying on our children.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/ymT3AL0LXJ5fSzzz97lqGQ/CgBaU763p2Vm5SHaOrxwhTdg)

Disney doesn't care too much about protecting children from sexual predators . . . as long as they're still buying Mickey Mouse goods and watching Marvel Movies.

This week, Disney heir, Charlee Corra, a 30-year-old great grand-daughter of Disney's founder, came out as a boy. **Charlee donated $250k to fight against DeSantis and promote teaching gender-identity politics to children.**

But wait, there's more . . . Roy P. Disney (the founder's grandson and Charlee's dad), upped the amount to $500k.

This fight is very real, and goes beyond politics, as **it dives into the polution of the minds of our children**. Now, Disney is hiring trans actors and developing trans characters to normalize what is clearly body dysmorphia, and a distortion and manipulation of biological facts!

If this map is finalized, my district will now include Disney World. You know, Disney, the wholesome, family-oriented global empire that influences our children from birth? At least that's what they want you to think . . . Today, Disney World is GROUND ZERO in the Culture Wars after Governor Ron DeSantis signed a new law to protect our children from the hyper-sexualized Trans Agenda in schools. name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Help get Senator Johnson on the ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Hi Friend -- Today, April 15th, marks the first day that we are able to circulate nomination papers to ensure Senator Johnson is on the ballot this November. The Senator and the rest of our team are asking for everyone's help as we look to maximize the number of signatures we collect in order to highlight the statewide unity behind Senator Johnson and his ongoing fight for freedom. The final day to collect nomination signatures is June 1st, but we are asking everyone to **mail their completed forms between now and May 23rd**. | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0YML_X-72sedswlw9l36d3JMwZv1cdt9eVXNMU24lRe0NHcENrmYBnkYO6uxlCmKh0f2ixd3UoB_OxZ9xMlCjGCxtu-iMRfOSiMq1m1E8ciA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_nom_sig_1&n=1 "Sign Senator Johnson's Nomination Signatures

Today!") [Sign Senator Johnson's Nomination Signatures Today!](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0YML_X-72sedswlw9l36d3JMwZv1cdt9eVXNMU24lRe0NHcENrmYBnkYO6uxlCmKh0f2ixd3UoB_OxZ9xMlCjGCxtu-iMRfOSiMq1m1E8ciA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_nom_sig_1&n=1)
---
Over the coming weeks, their campaign is looking to collect tens of thousands of signatures from all corners of the state. Each filled-out sheet and individual signature is crucial as it allows us to continue growing our grassroots army to re-elect Senator Johnson on November 8th.
We have attached the nomination signature form. Feel free to disperse this anywhere and everywhere you see fit to maximize our reach throughout this process.
**Signature sheets can be returned to P.O. Box 603, Elm Grove Wisconsin, 53122, or to RPW at 148 East Johnson Street Madison Wisconsin, 53703.**
Your help is greatly appreciated. If anyone has any questions feel free to email Nathan Trueblood at **Nathan@RonJohnsonForSenate.com** or Pam Travis at **Pam@RonJohnsonForSenate.com**.
Thanks again for your efforts and all you do.
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0YML_X-72sedswlw9l36d3JMwZv1cdt9eVXNMU24lRe0NHcENrmYBnkYO6uxlCmKh0f2ixd3UoB_OxZ9xMlCjGCxtu-iMRfOSiMq1m1E8ciA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_nom_sig_1&n=2 "Click here to view Nomination Forms") [Click here to view Nomination Forms](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0YML_X-72sedswlw9l36d3JMwZv1cdt9eVXNMU24lRe0NHcENrmYBnkYO6uxlCmKh0f2ixd3UoB_OxZ9xMlCjGCxtu-iMRfOSiMq1m1E8ciA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_nom_sig_1&n=2)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_nom_sig_1&n=3) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_nom_sig_1&n=4) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_nom_sig_1&n=5) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_nom_sig_1&n=6)

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Every dollar donated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Small-dollar donations helped send Pramila to Congress, and they will keep Pramila in office — but only with your support.
#
Peter,
We're proud to say that for emails just like this one so far in April, our average donation is $16.76.
**$16.76 is proof that grassroots power actually works.** Small-dollar donations helped send Pramila to Congress, and they will keep Pramila in office — _but only with your support._
If one out of every five people reading this email chipped in $16.76, we could reach our mid-month goal of 1,000 contributions in no time. [**Will you make a gift of $16.76, $3, or any amount before our mid-month deadline at midnight tomorrow?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12379?refcode=em20220415-1186&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1186%2E420207%2EkYn2Dz)
**[Contribute $16.76 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12379?refcode=em20220415-1186&t=20&akid=1186%2E420207%2EkYn2Dz)**
Peter, there is real power in numbers. Your support — and that of other grassroots donors — adds up. Every dollar donated allows Pramila to continue focusing on legislating, supports her re-election, and ensures our progressive movement has the resources to grow.
Democrats have accomplished a lot in the face of special interests, but we know that there’s more to get done. And next January, a new Congress will be sworn in. **But before that happens, we have to work hard to help Pramila deliver for our communities while protecting and EXPANDING our Democratic majorities.**
[**So what do you say****, Peter? Contribute $3 or any amount to help us grow our movement and keep Pramila legislating for the people in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12363?refcode=em20220415-1186&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1186%2E420207%2EkYn2Dz)
Pramila doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money because she has always believed in the power of the people to enact real, lasting change. Thanks for chipping in today.
In solidarity,
Lauren Lalonde
Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220415-1186-footer&t=22&refcode2=1186_420207_kYn2Dz&akid=1186%2E420207%2EkYn2Dz)**
