body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Black man casting his ballot [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/435152786F6433435133594C654C5434712F774F746D796A76375752572F7A562F4975517952486949492B743767736B65566B743351786B3079766D766A4A47/editor_images/Image%20%284%29.jpeg]
Good morning !
We are now 32 days away from Election Day in the Commonwealth. Did you know that you can vote early by visiting your County Election Board and casting a mail-in ballot in person? Learn more the upcoming primary election and voting early [https://vote.pa/early/?org=npp] .
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/564A597871713763326C38302F7570475971664833634C2B32776D3067317662577A4871596A436270346C6F7454396F3359664B727578514463515532665549/editor_images/IMG_6161.jpeg]
Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson becomes the 116th Associate Justice of the United States Supreme Court in a bipartisan 53-47 vote.
We’re elated to see the immensely qualified Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson become the first Black woman to serve on the highest court in our nation. This is a powerful moment to finally have a justice that reflects the diversity of our country. Representation matters.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/427262694561463855776A5646656649452F554C776767356D627632356E37686C3335756E727A572B334173456C2F586D574651776F466541685433744E4C34/editor_images/supremecourtkids.jpeg]
Our executive director Kadida Kenner was living her best life as the co-emcee for the Celebrate Justice Jackson Rally on the steps of U.S. Supreme Court in Washington, D.C. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Image%20%283%29.jpeg]
NPP teamed up with a diverse coalition of national organizations including People For the American Way, Alliance for Justice, Center for Popular Democracy Action, The Leadership Conference of Civil and Human Rights and the National Women’s Law Center and many more to celebrate this joyous and historic moment.
We're Hiring!
We're seeking a Director of Operations to join Team NPP. More details on the full job description and application details can be found here [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/director-of-operations/] .
#TweetOfTheWeek
https://twitter.com/propublica/status/1514327783320821767?s=11&t=HVNCuEE4gqRadmAq3vLhSQ [https://twitter.com/propublica/status/1514327783320821767?s=11&t=HVNCuEE4gqRadmAq3vLhSQ]
Reminder: It's time to request your mail ballot
You can vote by mail for this upcoming primary election on May 17th. Vote by mail works for Pennsylvania. 2,616,012 Pennsylvanians were able to vote safely and securely in 2020 thanks to Pennsylvania’s landmark vote-by-mail law, Act 77.
Learn more about voting by mail [https://vote.pa/info/mail/?org=npp] .
Vote By Mail [https://vote.pa/mail/?org=npp]
Voter Registration Lookup [https://vote.pa/check/?org=npp]
Register to Vote [https://vote.pa/?org=npp]
State and Local News
Your guide to the 2022 primary challengers
City & State PA has compiled a list of all incumbent legislators facing challengers in the 2022 primary.
Read more in City & State PA [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/politics/2022/04/your-guide-2022-primary-challengers/365433/]
Ballot drop boxes might go away in Pa. along with private funding to run elections
The Republican-led state Senate is working to pass legislation that would eliminate ballot drop boxes in an attempt to further disenfranchise PA voters.
Read more in Penn Live [https://www.pennlive.com/news/2022/04/ballot-drop-boxes-might-go-away-in-pa-along-with-private-funding-to-run-elections.html]
Cartwright introduces Time Off to Vote Act
U.S. Rep. Matt Cartwright, D-Moosic, and colleagues introduced the Time Off to Vote Act, which would require employers to provide their workers with at least two hours of paid leave to vote in a federal election.
Read more in Times Leader [https://www.timesleader.com/news/1550089/cartwright-introduces-time-off-to-vote-act]
House passes bill banning transgender females from competing in women’s sports
A bill to ban transgender females from competing in girls and women’s sports passed the Pennsylvania House of Representatives on Tuesday.
Read more in Penn Live [https://www.pennlive.com/news/2022/04/pa-house-passes-bill-banning-transgender-males-from-competing-in-womens-sports.html]
Senate votes to end drop boxes, outside money for elections
Drop boxes for depositing mail-in and absentee ballots would be banned and donations to run elections would no longer be permitted from groups outside government under bills approved Wednesday by the Pennsylvania Senate.
Read more in AP [https://apnews.com/article/2022-midterm-elections-pennsylvania-presidential-tom-wolf-voting-88dff47833e0a075967791b6886bf4b3]
Lawmakers Laughlin and Collett are vouching for independent voters’ voices in primary elections
There’s at least one election-related issue that has maintained bipartisan support through the last couple of years: open primaries. But despite lawmakers’ and advocates’ best efforts, independent voters will still be blocked from the upcoming May primary.
Read more in City & State PA [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/politics/2022/04/lawmakers-laughlin-and-collett-are-vouching-independent-voters-voices-primary-elections/365539/]
Pittsburgh’s Black leaders celebrate Supreme Court confirmation of Ketanji Brown Jackson
The confirmation of Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court — making her the first African American woman to serve on the nation’s highest court — was a historic moment, Allegheny County President Judge Kim Berkeley Clark said.
Read more in Pittsburgh Post Gazette [https://www.post-gazette.com/news/politics-nation/2022/04/07/ketanji-brown-jackson-supreme-court-confirmation-reaction-pittsburgh-beacon-hope-black-girls/stories/202204070158]
Your 2022 Pennsylvania governor’s race campaign finance cheat sheet
With about a month left until the state’s primary elections for governor take place, every dollar counts. For months, candidates – particularly on the Republican side – have been jockeying for position as they seek to earn their party’s nomination and face presumptive Democratic nominee Josh Shapiro in the fall.
Read more in City & State PA [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/politics/2022/04/your-2022-pennsylvania-governors-race-campaign-finance-cheat-sheet/365495/]
More than 664K Pa. voters have applied for mail-in ballots ahead of primary election, Pa. says
More than 664,000 voters have applied for mail-in ballots ahead of Pennsylvania’s May 17 primary election, state officials said Wednesday.
Read more in Penn Capital Star [https://www.penncapital-star.com/blog/more-than-664k-pa-voters-have-applied-for-mail-in-ballots-ahead-of-primary-election-pa-says/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/386B594A5431766C4A447A30616968615A524A4E58725032684236664A4331455A424E6C6A6561565A436F6778665745553549385A596145655238423137455A/editor_images/signal-2022-04-04-105700_002.jpeg]
April Volunteer Opportunities
We’re on a mission to reach our goal of 50,000 new registered voters in the Commonwealth in 2022, and 200,000 by the 2024 presidential election. Help us expand the electorate by visiting our April volunteer sign up. [https://bit.ly/AprilVolunteers2022] When we vote, we win!
The Policy Corner: State Courts
student learning [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/386B594A5431766C4A447A30616968615A524A4E58725032684236664A4331455A424E6C6A6561565A436F6778665745553549385A596145655238423137455A/editor_images/unnamed.png]
The nation witnessed history being made on Thursday, April 7, 2022, when Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson became the first Black woman justice to be confirmed for the highest court in the land. The Supreme Court of the United States became a focus again for so many. Over the past several years, Pennsylvania state court rulings have made headlines across the country, specifically because of Pennsylvania’s Commonwealth and Supreme Court rulings during the 2020 election result battles waged by the Republican-led Pennsylvania legislature to overturn the will of the voters. These headlines have only highlighted the importance of why fair and independent courts matter.
There are levels to Pennsylvania’s state court system with the minor courts including the municipal court at the lowest level, hearing cases about driver infractions and up to cases that could place someone behind bars for five years. Moving up from there is the court of common pleas which is the trial court hearing cases about child abuse, neglect, spousal support, and other criminal cases. Most cases that are heard on this level will stop there. When a case comes out of the Court of Common Pleas because a decision is made that one party does not agree with, it may be appealed and this would go to the next level, our state intermediate appellate courts - the Superior or Commonwealth Court. Sitting at the top of our state court hierarchy is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. It is the highest court in the Commonwealth, making the final determination in regards to the state constitution, unless it goes against our federal constitution.
In Pennsylvania, we are one of only seven states in the country that votes for all of our judges and justices. As a registered voter, you have the power to elect judges and justices who sit on every level of our state courts, who will hear cases from traffic tickets to child abuse to challenges against our free and fair elections. Your vote for those judges and justices who will sit on these benches, for sometimes up to 10 year terms will have a direct impact in your daily life.
We can't do this important year-round work without you.
Help us reach our goal to register 50,000 voters in the Commonwealth
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]
Volunteer with Us [https://bit.ly/AprilVolunteers2022]
Make a Plan to Vote [http://bit.ly/NPPVotePA]
We hope you had a wonderful Vaisakhi. Ramadan Mubarak, Chag Pesach Sameach (Happy Passover) and Happy Easter from Team NPP.

name: Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=180%2E5257348%2E3kmtyt ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Here are a few numbers you may have seen kicked around in the news this
week, Derek:

$31 million: Kevin McCarthy’s first-quarter fundraising haul, breaking his
own personal record for the most ever by a House Republican.

$37.5 million: How much money the Congressional Leadership Fund — that’s
House Republicans’ officially-branded dark money Super PAC — raised in the
same timeframe.

Well here’s another.

$23.45. That was the average donation to our campaign. Not millions, but
single dollars. How do you like that?

That last number is the most important to me. It never ceases to amaze and
inspire me. It represents the hard work, grit, and determination of this
grassroots team. And it reaffirms my belief that not only do the majority
of Americans believe our country can do more to ensure everyone has the
opportunity to succeed, but it also shows that you’re willing to fight for
it too.

While the GOP often makes it seem otherwise, it’s not too much to ask that
our government and our economy work for everyone, and not just the wealthy
few at the top. Or that workers deserve fair wages and a seat at the
bargaining table. Or that we support reproductive rights, climate
solutions, and protecting our democracy, which the majority of Americans
also support.

With the partisan gridlock and division in Congress, sometimes these
reforms feel more like a pipedream than a reality — but they are possible
AND they are well within our reach. All we need to do is protect and
expand our Democratic majorities in the upcoming midterm elections.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220415_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=180_5257348_3kmtyt&akid=180%2E5257348%2E3kmtyt ]Derek, can you make a donation of $23.45 or any amount you
decide to my re-election campaign right now? We’ll put it to work, fueling
our fight for legislative progress and helping my Democratic colleagues
get elected nationwide.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220415_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1005&refcode2=180_5257348_3kmtyt&akid=180%2E5257348%2E3kmtyt ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

Thank you for everything you do. It means more than you know.

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Congress Here are a few numbers you may have seen kicked around in the news this week, Derek: $31 million: Kevin McCarthy’s first-quarter fundraising haul, breaking his own personal record for the most ever by a House Republican. $37.5 million: How much money the Congressional Leadership Fund — that’s House Republicans’ officially-branded dark money Super PAC — raised in the same timeframe. Well here’s another. $23.45. That was the average donation to our campaign. Not millions, but single dollars. How do you like that? That last number is the most important to me. It never ceases to amaze and inspire me. It represents the hard work, grit, and determination of this grassroots team. And it reaffirms my belief that not only do the majority of Americans believe our country can do more to ensure everyone has the opportunity to succeed, but it also shows that you’re willing to fight for it too. While the GOP often makes it seem otherwise, it’s not too much to ask that our government and our economy work for everyone, and not just the wealthy few at the top. Or that workers deserve fair wages and a seat at the bargaining table. Or that we support reproductive rights, climate solutions, and protecting our democracy, which the majority of Americans also support. With the partisan gridlock and division in Congress, sometimes these reforms feel more like a pipedream than a reality — but they are possible AND they are well within our reach. All we need to do is protect and expand our Democratic majorities in the upcoming midterm elections. [ ]Derek, can you make a donation of $23.45 or any amount you decide to my re-election campaign right now? We’ll put it to work, fueling our fight for legislative progress and helping my Democratic colleagues get elected nationwide. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $23.45 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thank you for everything you do. It means more than you know. — Adam 150 E. body:
The Iowa Supreme Court ruled UNANIMOUSLY in our favor ...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44183586/340453036/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk934-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzlkNGUzYi1mNWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q21APpdguqggoXoMpVe25xzU0OnoPa-GAf3AaY6BHak=)
For weeks now, Washington Republicans have waged coordinated attacks to kick me off the ballot and ensure their buddy Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) coasts to reelection. It's a fight that we took all the way to the Iowa Supreme Court – **and today, the court ruled UNANIMOUSLY in our favor. National Republicans' desperate and partisan attempt to end this grassroots campaign has FAILED.**
Now, the fight continues. The fight for a voice for Iowa's working families in Washington, and the fight for an expanded Democratic Senate majority that will get things done for the American people. **[Achieving all that means defeating Sen. Chuck Grassley and flipping this seat blue, and if you're with me, then I'm asking you to chip in $5 or more right now. Whatever you give will ensure we have the resources to keep fighting these attacks and defeat Sen. Grassley on Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44183587/340453037/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk934-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzlkNGUzYi1mNWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q21APpdguqggoXoMpVe25xzU0OnoPa-GAf3AaY6BHak=)**
These attempts to dismantle our campaign were pathetic, plain and simple. The only reason national Republicans did this is because they know Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approval ratings with Iowa voters, and that only 27% of likely voters said they want to reelect the guy. Instead of trying to face our campaign head on, they dragged us through the court system to drain our resources with costly legal fees.

**But our justice system saw right through their desperate attempts to thwart democracy, with every justice on the Iowa Supreme Court ruling our campaign deserves to be on the ballot.**
From here, we’re going to keep talking to Iowans in every corner of the state and building our coalition to beat Chuck Grassley. Today, national Republicans lost again, and we’re going to make sure that they lose in November, too. **But Washington Republicans have more than $41 million in the bank to keep on attacking me throughout the course of the campaign.** We need massive resources to take Chuck Grassley on with full force this November – that starts with grassroots supporters like you.
**This was a huge victory that wouldn't have been possible without you. Let's keep it up.[Please, to ensure I can defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley and expand our Democratic Senate majority, chip in a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare right now. Nobody will fight harder than I will to flip this seat blue. You have my word.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44183588/340453038/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk934-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzlkNGUzYi1mNWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q21APpdguqggoXoMpVe25xzU0OnoPa-GAf3AaY6BHak=)**

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Please read even though it’s long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out.
|
---
| | | Friend,

I'd like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I've been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to start this month strong and need you to listen to me.

I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I'd take a second to walk you through why I'm running for office and why this deadline means so much.

---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2a757f0bb91c4a85af35f167ef14df6d&_e=TDrv9RzJkPfBXECd-h67fEYNTZ6e19xDuSXmn8A9kT5gejaaBT540_i6OksyAr4RmRzh3PCWSpxQMq0FTeZmNejOYCPKPwy5Vtj5nPSSfF0WjrC5Ym2Swa7Js2xvR_zF9xYdRlYhhGi2TYskoJE4BVGbj9WqVgI2O0SnG8Yqg-6CT13Kvj1tAJzeJ7e9vTfp_esI2dzIUPmwAy0q-7tBoxg8l6vksljh1YyUCkJD5WyqJ9JpaGY3mUJ7qZN1Z4xl5xYt2PFoRatjbQUy6fkDDUSftmGhk5lt4tm9MtQMiztNPnyGP5hVCaX0Z4Sl5eu13hLlMnc7ZIEA66Q8cC9CABenPCyEHsG4Xw7MmjWQAfyoXYxvrD-tjmkJzWoW0Ej9EK0P9JJ8aTu_VhWd6IkbO2D9nQ-8o6wRTv2joA4RYqv_egRhPyk5Nv2P1jZyUSUDlp_OweeY8uap_IKRZVntApUVO_NERR6N1RPGNIfjY3u2PFrbJitr4TMDOuSGavqFKCZywKcGhrGVTalyKpO_rQ%3D%3D "2")
---

This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American.

He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2a757f0bb91c4a85af35f167ef14df6d&_e=TDrv9RzJkPfBXECd-h67fEYNTZ6e19xDuSXmn8A9kT5gejaaBT540_i6OksyAr4RmRzh3PCWSpxQMq0FTeZmNejOYCPKPwy5Vtj5nPSSfF0WjrC5Ym2Swa7Js2xvR_zF9xYdRlYhhGi2TYskoJE4BVGbj9WqVgI2O0SnG8Yqg-6CT13Kvj1tAJzeJ7e9vTfp_esI2dzIUPmwAy0q-7tBoxg8l6vksljh1YyUCkJD5WyqJ9JpaGY3mUJ7qZN1Z4xl5xYt2PFoRatjbQUy6fkDDUSftmGhk5lt4tm9MtQMiztNPnyGP5hVCaX0Z4Sl5eu1sT-P4sOOFQcy8w_zJw4lIWU1MQdT2H1K9RrwoI7NtwSSyiRtISVO0Ci-uvOaF9yjCn3HXTALRVhW1LkZWd-b7qojEyI8AFiXhSEaIDyn5VtyvSlEfXvIRcvyHlczuvdIwRlyCxp69U-x4DNiDdslrEwusrkI6HPs2uIRjolubo16ObicdhcOU1SLO4MjKRtB-Cg9fq1KTSTKUIyc-fJL8g%3D%3D "1")
---

Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated.

I met my wife Jeanette in college and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...).

---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2a757f0bb91c4a85af35f167ef14df6d&_e=TDrv9RzJkPfBXECd-h67fEYNTZ6e19xDuSXmn8A9kT5gejaaBT540_i6OksyAr4RmRzh3PCWSpxQMq0FTeZmNejOYCPKPwy5Vtj5nPSSfF0WjrC5Ym2Swa7Js2xvR_zF9xYdRlYhhGi2TYskoJE4BVGbj9WqVgI2O0SnG8Yqg-6CT13Kvj1tAJzeJ7e9vTfp_esI2dzIUPmwAy0q-7tBoxg8l6vksljh1YyUCkJD5WyqJ9JpaGY3mUJ7qZN1Z4xl5xYt2PFoRatjbQUy6fkDDUSftmGhk5lt4tm9MtQMiztNPnyGP5hVCaX0Z4Sl5eu1IrJI9k8gvF6ZOOmKdFIr0u5m5Kp4hb48H5tx4y_Jx01EJfgFQ7T38pcGiEMIYvx07iyQnxEDsGZ3S7vG-w9Z9oJ5RgnYjaNR1obGzhPAzloVdz2m-xIw21aiB7OdrpbuH7GXb6E-5XL7mPHjC9i-wF0K2q-GeeoknHFsk6YthM-TbcpLr3ZB7kkm_JouhR52lCmQv2hFct2yzJQZjTuhoQ%3D%3D "3")
---

All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted.

I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden's policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that's exactly what I did.

My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I'm teaching my kids exactly what he taught me.

---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2a757f0bb91c4a85af35f167ef14df6d&_e=TDrv9RzJkPfBXECd-h67fEYNTZ6e19xDuSXmn8A9kT5gejaaBT540_i6OksyAr4RmRzh3PCWSpxQMq0FTeZmNejOYCPKPwy5Vtj5nPSSfF0WjrC5Ym2Swa7Js2xvR_zF9xYdRlYhhGi2TYskoJE4BVGbj9WqVgI2O0SnG8Yqg-6CT13Kvj1tAJzeJ7e9vTfp_esI2dzIUPmwAy0q-7tBoxg8l6vksljh1YyUCkJD5WyqJ9JpaGY3mUJ7qZN1Z4xl5xYt2PFoRatjbQUy6fkDDUSftmGhk5lt4tm9MtQMiztNPnyGP5hVCaX0Z4Sl5eu1VrIVjoYbo__nJ2BV_rZ8sKL4cBeG-LvDK3Rj8MvQspmuz-4lDz18pb8lKTHhfZFV6AtW126WnB3xKkI0bOY-FTQKZQMzyv5fxZ9HuuxPE_hY5jCotpLKgulbRGgTpQAazOyepVXILdqXpn_az3I7nDD5D4HYRh5JWORJpocPSJ7f22Z2QtrvSn5FsnTub-P1F9_UVJLHdSGw4UhDiCnvxg%3D%3D "4")
---

After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn't have been more grateful for their support.

I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream.

---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2a757f0bb91c4a85af35f167ef14df6d&_e=TDrv9RzJkPfBXECd-h67fEYNTZ6e19xDuSXmn8A9kT5gejaaBT540_i6OksyAr4RmRzh3PCWSpxQMq0FTeZmNejOYCPKPwy5Vtj5nPSSfF0WjrC5Ym2Swa7Js2xvR_zF9xYdRlYhhGi2TYskoJE4BVGbj9WqVgI2O0SnG8Yqg-6CT13Kvj1tAJzeJ7e9vTfp_esI2dzIUPmwAy0q-7tBoxg8l6vksljh1YyUCkJD5WyqJ9JpaGY3mUJ7qZN1Z4xl5xYt2PFoRatjbQUy6fkDDUSftmGhk5lt4tm9MtQMiztNPnyGP5hVCaX0Z4Sl5eu1AhrYdECVZX21JE0cBRjaXstL2r9Gsnq5-H8y2-5SUCWJ0EkzSLh-9B9F6NpaD3Hk4kNFo5imIO36TGTiXo0cQ6XSZlkunnaYWsthL10exqJcxGSCp_IlWsAk76YrJCuJtPlFYIvGFBg_YqB8K6ce-BtIDR8wssXtV-4wQ69fUmpEMku_Ou9zT2K65jR49E4s4p11clPzcwa5m15Z3JNj3g%3D%3D "5")
---

This brings me to my main point: I'm running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream.

I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from.

Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. **The number we raise is being released, and if we 're outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream. **

clean_body: I’d like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. | | | | Friend, I'd like to thank you in advance for taking the time to read this and hear me out. I know I've been emailing, texting, and calling more than normal right now, but I need to start this month strong and need you to listen to me. I hope you know me to be an honest man of integrity, so I thought I'd take a second to walk you through why I'm running for office and why this deadline means so much. | "2" This is a photo of my dad (of course wearing a Miami Dolphins shirt). He was the best role model for being a father, a friend, and an American. He and my mom thankfully came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba to a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to stay put in America and get to work to achieve the American Dream. | "1" Eventually, my sister and I became first generation college graduates, and while we had to take on student loans to do so, we knew the work ethic our parents instilled would help us pay them down once we graduated. I met my wife Jeanette in college and we got married in 1998. We started our beautiful family of four kids: Amanda, Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick. We eventually adopted two dogs, Winston and Arthur (who I found with my laptop typing some emails to you recently...). | "3" All jokes aside, being a father to my wonderful kids is by far my favorite and most important job, and I will never take that for granted. I first ran for Senate because I saw what Barack Obama and Joe Biden's policies were doing to families like mine. More families were living paycheck to paycheck at the expense of tax-and-spend Democrats. My parents taught me to work if I wanted to make a change, so that's exactly what I did. My dad never got to see me become a U.S. Senator in the country he immigrated to in order to make a better life for us, but I carry his work ethic and family values with me every day in the Senate to honor him, and now, I'm teaching my kids exactly what he taught me. | "4" After seeing the dysfunction in Washington firsthand, I decided to run for President so I could bring my passion for America to the White House. My loving family was right by my side, and I couldn't have been more grateful for their support. I wanted to stop Hillary Clinton at all costs, and eventually, that meant dropping out of the race and working with Donald Trump to win. Throughout his term, we worked on pro-family and pro-veteran bills to make America great and restore the American Dream. | "5" This brings me to my main point: I'm running for Senate because I will never stop fighting to restore the American Dream. I feel so blessed looking through these photos, and I wanted to share them with you so you can understand where I am coming from. Reaching these deadlines may seem like a fundraising ploy, but this is real. The number we raise is being released, and if we 're outraised again, that will be a major step back in our fight to restore the American Dream. "I hope you’ll make a donation today and join this fight before tomorrow’s deadline:" | | | "I'LL JOIN YOU, MARCO!" Thank you so much for taking the time to read this, Marco Rubio | | * | | "MarcoRubioFooter" | A personal note from Marco Rubio : Friend, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race? Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress. So here's the deal: "Footer Gif" I really do need your help, Friend. People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today. You know I've reached out a lot, so don't complain if we lose. I'm committed to winning. Are you? | | "I'M COMMITTED TO WINNING" | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate PO Box 530650 Miami, FL 33153 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Finance Team, Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate
subject: Let’s run through some numbers →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We know you’re probably getting a lot of emails today, but we wouldn’t be reaching out if it weren’t important.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220415-946-footer-ak&t=2&akid=946%2E90090%2EN1Zm1p)
[**_We’re just hours away from our mid-month deadline at midnight tonight._****Can you rush a donation to our people-powered, grassroots campaign?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31727?t=3&akid=946%2E90090%2EN1Zm1p) **[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31728?refcode=em20220415-946&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=946%2E90090%2EN1Zm1p)** **We don’t take a dime of super PAC, fossil fuel, or corporate money — so we depend on small-dollar donations from folks like you.**
---
Hey,
We know you’re probably getting a lot of emails today, but we wouldn’t be reaching out if it weren’t important. We’re cognizant of your time though, and we’ll jump straight into it — **we’re here to run through three important numbers.**
**18** **—** This is the exact number of days we have until our Primary Election. And we still have a ton of work to do. We have to keep our TV ad on air, get out the vote, and ensure that our message for a progressive Ohio has reached every corner of the state.
**1** **—** We only have one day left to meet our mid-month fundraising goal of $15,000. By the time you’re reading this, we’ll have 13 hours — or fewer — left to close our fundraising gap. We’re completely grassroots funded and we rely on our supporters across the country to power our movement.
**3** **— We need just 3 contributors from****Cresco to donate.**[**Can you help us over the finish line by donating $5 right now**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31727?t=5&akid=946%2E90090%2EN1Zm1p)[**?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31727?t=6&akid=946%2E90090%2EN1Zm1p)

Strong and **consistent** fundraising can show everyone that we have what it takes to win (and we do!). But if we fall short, we could lose out on critical resources that allow us to do more — like bring on more organizers, canvass voters statewide, run digital ads, tour the state —**making it that much harder for us to keep our momentum going.**

Look, Morgan has traveled all across Ohio since she launched this campaign. We’ve seen how much passion there is for a different type of candidate — and how much hunger there is for change.

**So we know we can win this.** But today we need to show everyone else that we truly do have what it takes. We need just 3 more supporters from Cresco to step up today and help us hit our mid-month goal.

[**_We can’t afford to keep falling behind — not with the primary so close at hand. If you can, please make a contribution to help us catch up before_**** _midnight tonight_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31727?t=7&akid=946%2E90090%2EN1Zm1p)**[.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31727?t=8&akid=946%2E90090%2EN1Zm1p) **
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31728?refcode=em20220415-946&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=27&akid=946%2E90090%2EN1Zm1p)**
Let’s show everyone what this movement is truly made of,

clean_body: We know you’re probably getting a lot of emails today, but we wouldn’t be reaching out if it weren’t important. We don’t take a dime of super PAC, fossil fuel, or corporate money — so we depend on small-dollar donations from folks like you. Hey, We know you’re probably getting a lot of emails today, but we wouldn’t be reaching out if it weren’t important. We’re cognizant of your time though, and we’ll jump straight into it — we’re here to run through three important numbers. 18 — This is the exact number of days we have until our Primary Election. And we still have a ton of work to do. We have to keep our TV ad on air, get out the vote, and ensure that our message for a progressive Ohio has reached every corner of the state. 1 — We only have one day left to meet our mid-month fundraising goal of $15,000. By the time you’re reading this, we’ll have 13 hours — or fewer — left to close our fundraising gap. We’re completely grassroots funded and we rely on our supporters across the country to power our movement. 3 — We need just 3 contributors fromCresco to donate. Strong and consistent fundraising can show everyone that we have what it takes to win (and we do!). But if we fall short, we could lose out on critical resources that allow us to do more — like bring on more organizers, canvass voters statewide, run digital ads, tour the state —making it that much harder for us to keep our momentum going. Look, Morgan has traveled all across Ohio since she launched this campaign. We’ve seen how much passion there is for a different type of candidate — and how much hunger there is for change. So we know we can win this. But today we need to show everyone else that we truly do have what it takes. We need just 3 more supporters from Cresco to step up today and help us hit our mid-month goal. Let’s show everyone what this movement is truly made of, Finance Team Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate | | Email us: contact@morganharper.org

name: Joe Cunningham
subject: racehorses and politics (yes, really)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| Here’s a story I’ve been telling on the campaign trail a lot: a while back, a man wanted to trade his racehorse for a new one that would run better, so he hired a consultant.

The consultant was unusual, after looking everywhere and checking other horses, he told him to keep his original horse — it had by far the biggest heart of any horse he saw and would run the best because of that.

That horse, American Pharoah, became a legend in the horse racing community and, despite being less than ideal in terms of what people look for in a racehorse, won some of the biggest races.

That’s what we need in our political leaders — not someone like McMaster who answers only to his special interest backers and political advisors, but someone who’s got the biggest heart and cares about every person in our state.

**[That’s the sort of leader I’ll be, but I’ve got to win first. name: Leo, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: There’s a lot of power in this number:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, will you
$19.36 to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal tonight?

(Keep reading and we’ll tell you why this amount!)

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220415?refcode=em20220415-1766&amounts=20.29&t=1001&refcode2=1766_346206_MzhOCh&akid=1766%2E346206%2EMzhOCh ]CHIP IN $19.36 →

Let me explain,
Peter.

We’re proud to share that our average online donation is $19.36.

That might not seem like a lot, but there’s a lot of power in that
number.

This number represents the grassroots movement we’re building right here
in Kentucky: teachers, fast food workers, coal miners, nurses, students,
and believers in change are coming together and chipping in whatever they
can to help defeat Rand Paul and elect Charles.

When you donate $19.36 it directly funds our campaign’s ability to:

* Knock on doors, make phone calls, and send texts so we can talk to
as many voters as we can
* Register voters from traditionally disenfranchised communities
* Send Charles on the road so he can visit towns in all 120 counties
of Kentucky
* Train volunteers and organizers
* And so much more

That’s powerful,
Peter. If we keep fighting like
this, putting our $19.36 donations together — we can build the grassroots
organizing movement we need to replace Rand Paul with a real champion for
working families.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220415?refcode=em20220415-1766&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1766_346206_MzhOCh&akid=1766%2E346206%2EMzhOCh ]Will you chip in $19.36 or anything you can before our midnight
deadline? Right now we’re about $7,851 short from reaching our goal and
making sure we have the necessary funds to reach as many Kentuckians as
possible before the Voter Registration Deadline.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220415?refcode=em20220415-1766&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1766_346206_MzhOCh&akid=1766%2E346206%2EMzhOCh ]DONATE NOW →

$19.36 may not be a lot compared to the average donations of other
campaigns — but that’s what sets Team Booker apart.

Unlike Rand Paul, we don’t accept donations from Big Pharma, fossil fuel
companies, or corporate PACs. We rely on grassroots contributions from
everyday folks like you,
Peter, because we believe that
our politicians should be focused on people, not profits.

We also believe this kind of strategy is our strongest chance to mobilize
voters from the hood to the holler, defeat Rand Paul, and expand our
majority in the Senate so we can finally get the urgent support we need.

But this means it’s absolutely necessary we reach our goal tonight at
midnight to make sure we have the funds to register as many voters as
possible before the upcoming registration deadline.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220415?refcode=em20220415-1766&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1766_346206_MzhOCh&akid=1766%2E346206%2EMzhOCh ]Will you give $19.36 or anything you can today to help us hit our
goal? If you and 10% of the people reading this email right now chip in,
we can hit our goal in time. Every little bit counts with only hours away
until our deadline.

Together,

Leo
Deputy Campaign Manager

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220415-1766-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1766_346206_MzhOCh&akid=1766%2E346206%2EMzhOCh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1766%2E346206%2EMzhOCh

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Friend,

I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump.

He fought to put America First for four years as our President, and I plan to do the same for Alaska as your next Member of Congress.

I’m ready to get to Washington to FIGHT for our values, but I can only do that with YOUR support, Friend.

While this race is just beginning, we only have about two months until the election. I have President Trump's support, and now I need yours.

_**[Please rush in a donation of ANY AMOUNT to publicly stand with President Trump and me as I fight to put ALASKA FIRST.>>](http://email.mail.magamonitor.com/c/eJxtUU1PwzAM_TXdrVXr9GM79MAY4wIXkJA4VSZx24wkjdKUafx6kjIBB6Qkip7t5-dn0b4RVHW9kS3kAHlZVEVdACuzimHBe94w3sNux9-SMtcoVaZxQD0Z6SeX8UlvxpYVDTXbbR7TyxJFjSGdFYwVQvQ1FBvVjt7bOWE3CRzDmYkvjrKzNI5EJIkYOhz7yaHC-R0D4N2ibUpGTG4mkVpU0qSc-4QdQ__FhM-BVQnULrI5aYYAhCIKUNBHl84qEgP9oovXnSYhFx0wisN01s32GpmnxfGYHXp08Rq8Rjhqi3IwIXb1CLr_1HXrDH--f8b5JpqMp1W4mAx66ri9uPm7UWeUFLH7btkSmp0_reAoRfDt8Lo9P5unl_uNa4U9S6XkXDdhI8O6kriGoFHJ_tImzT4BWMsAVsdhePk4LU_w-ejT_VCldyf9kMcg3IbXXyz9ZF5JstWciDaHL4ZZtKI)**_

[](http://email.mail.magamonitor.com/c/eJxtUcFugzAM_Rp6A4GB0B44rOu6y7ZDJ1XaCYXEQLokZCGs6r5-Cau2HiYlkfVe_Pxs87pFKAlZiRpSgLTIyoxkkBdJmdOMdazKWQebDWujIlVUyETRnqpRCzfahI1qNdQEyTpLi463VUoIpNiWFVnzAniOtM34StaDc2aK8rsI9v5MyGaLyVloizyIBIxaOnSjpZJO79QDzs7KxKj5aCfksaFS6JgxF-V7X3_WPtjlZQTEBjUrdO8Bn4Qe8v7w0hiJvMc_dHaqUcjFrDyGoZnG2MlcmWmcLQu_fY0mXE2vDKPKUNFrz11nBM1_7pqlh5vwpp0foVE7XIzzUVOHDTMXO_0UarQU3DNH9cK1_uCmXcBBcD-33dv6_KoPx8eVrbk5CynFRCq_kX5ZSViD9yhFd6mjahsBLGkAy8ShP36e5gN8Pbt425fxw0k9pYGEe_-6i8Hfn1eRZBlOQKvdN8POtQw)

clean_body: I am fighting to put Alaska First. Friend, I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump. He fought to put America First for four years as our President, and I plan to do the same for Alaska as your next Member of Congress. I’m ready to get to Washington to FIGHT for our values, but I can only do that with YOUR support, Friend. While this race is just beginning, we only have about two months until the election. I have President Trump's support, and now I need yours. Your support is critical right now, Friend. Personally, I’ve got nothing to lose, but Alaska and our nation do. Public service is a calling, and I would be honored to represent the men and women of Alaska in Congress, just as Congressman Young did for 49 years. This is your chance to be one of my first supporters. I know you won’t let me down. Thank you, Sarah Palin Candidate for Congress for Alaska | Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. | P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687

| | Happy Friday!
It seems we are finally getting more consistent springtime temperatures, which will be nice as we are getting out and talking to more people. We are almost at the halfway mark for the primary election! Thank you for being part of this amazing grassroots effort and continuing to volunteer your time and energy. We can't wait to be able to celebrate with everyone when we reach that finish line.

I hope you enjoy this week's newsletter and be sure to check out the "Exciting News!" We have a fun announcement that we hope people will participate in, all across PA - even kids! We know Doug would like to get out to meet each and every one of you if he could, but until then, we hope this will bring a smile to your face.

Enjoy your weekend and get out there and work towards the two contests we have going on! name: Team Erica Smith
subject: SPOTTED: Sandy Smith at a Trump Rally
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
Sandy Smith is a dangerous far-right insurrectionist and Trumpist. Let’s talk about what we’re going to do about it.
#
**Just when we thought it couldn’t get any worse****.**
As we rapidly approach the start of early voting in _less than 2 weeks_ , this is what Sandy Smith has been up to:
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49232?t=1&akid=1093%2E3698%2EOfCelu)
**Sandy Smith has shown her true colors once again.** She was at the January 6th insurrection (_while Erica was teaching her class and comforting her students_). And last weekend, she was at Donald Trump’s MAGA rally.
**Sandy Smith is more interested in getting Donald Trump’s endorsement than fighting for NC-01, and it’s critical we do everything in our power to protect this seat.**
[**_Can you chip in $5 to help us fight back against Sandy Smith and her far-right supporters? We need to raise $25,000 before midnight tonight to ensure we have the resources to elect Erica and protect this seat._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49232?t=2&akid=1093%2E3698%2EOfCelu)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49238?refcode=em20220415-1093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1093%2E3698%2EOfCelu)**
Sandy Smith has a plan to take advantage of this once-safe, open swing seat to block critical progress.
What she doesn’t know is that Erica has represented more than half of the counties in NC-01 in the state senate, and _she’s never lost an election here_. **Erica is the only candidate in this race who has the grit, experience, and expertise it’ll take to protect this seat.**
The far-right knows how important this race is. Everyone from CNN to Politico have their eye on the NC-01 election and knows that it will shape how Congress looks and whether we have a Democratic majority.
[**_If you’re able to spare anything, can you make a contribution today to help ensure we have the resources we need to have the strongest campaign possible and fight back against Sandy Smith?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49232?t=22&akid=1093%2E3698%2EOfCelu)
Onwards,
Team Erica Smith
Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — _her home district_ – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. **[Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House seat and give power back to working people »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49238?refcode=em20220415-1093-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1093%2E3698%2EOfCelu)** **[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49238?refcode=em20220415-1093-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1093%2E3698%2EOfCelu)**

clean_body: | | | | We need to stop the establishment | Hi Peter, Did you see this headline? Cheney capitalizes off national profile to raise $2.9 million in first quarter of 2022 -NBC News | Rebecca Shabad With Cheney being such an outspoken critic of President Trump, it is no wonder why the Democrats, DC Elite and Dark Money super PACs are pouring millions into her campaign to support her. And while they think they can win just by buying Wyoming, I know it’s grassroots supporters, like YOU, Peter, that will help us win! Thanks to your support, President Trump’s endorsement, Republican Rand Paul’s endorsement, Republican Kevin McCarthy’s endorsement and Republican Chair Elise Stefanik’s endorsement, I know it is our time! But to combat Cheney, my team has raised the stakes and upped our April Mid-Month goal by $22,000. It’s time for us to FIGHT BACK against Cheney and her big-government bureaucrats who want to manage our lands, control our lives, and dictate what we are allowed to think and say. You have always been one of our Top Supporters and I know you won't let us down. Thank you, | | Harriet Hageman Republican Candidate Endorsed by President Trump | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

name: Mark Warner
subject: This is what it’s all about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
You sent me to Washington to improve lives and to protect our country, and it’s an honor to be able to do that.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44184488/340459602/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJmZDAzZS1mYWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-T1nNuK_4kih13Jw4fmv7uNsChotIy1EBHO1kk3e9Q0=&emci=9d483d94-f5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c4bfd03e-fabc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | These past few weeks have been busy, Derek. I’ve been all over Virginia. I made it down to Richmond to announce $5 million in federal funds to replace the Mayo Bridge, one of 700 bridges across Virginia that is designated structurally deficient. And just this week I was in Fairfax County to deliver crucial funding that will help the county build up to 250 affordable homes. I watched with immense pride as Judge Kentanji Brown Jackson wowed the Senate Judiciary Committee during her confirmation hearings. Then I had the honor of casting my vote to confirm her as the first Black woman ever to sit on the Supreme Court. And I introduced bills in the Senate that would promote lifelong learning for workers, and create more transparency and accountability in the Opportunity Zones program. Each moment reminded me what being a Senator is all about. You sent me to Washington to improve lives and to protect our country, and it’s an honor to be able to do that. But I’ll be honest, these past few weeks would have been different if we didn’t have a majority in the Senate. I always look for ways to find bipartisan common ground, but I’m also a realist. For one thing, soon-to-be Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson would have been rejected outright by a GOP Senate. We also would have faced much more of an uphill battle finding consensus on the bipartisan infrastructure bill that brought new federal funds to Richmond for that bridge, and the funding for those new affordable homes. And frankly we’d have little hope of making any meaningful progress on the education or economic reform legislation I’m pushing if the GOP had the majority. _**[That’s why I need you to donate before midnight tonight. What we raise in the month of April will determine how we protect our majority this year. Chip in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44184490/340459604/-1089750885?refcode=mw_em_220415_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJmZDAzZS1mYWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-T1nNuK_4kih13Jw4fmv7uNsChotIy1EBHO1kk3e9Q0=)**_ There is so much work to be done, and it’s work we simply cannot do if we are in the minority. I hope you’ll give now. Thank you, Mark **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44184492/340459606/-1089750885?refcode=mw_em_220415_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGJmZDAzZS1mYWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-T1nNuK_4kih13Jw4fmv7uNsChotIy1EBHO1kk3e9Q0=)**

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Did you hear about what’s happening in Oklahoma?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
This will only take you 1 minute to read:

Hey Peter, did you get a chance to read Derek's email yesterday?

**Oklahoma just passed a near-total ban on abortion that directly contradicts _Roe v. Wade_ - soon, more states could follow in Oklahoma and Texas' footsteps. **

To fight back, Derek is determined to reelect reproductive justice champions and expand our Democratic House majority. But he needs your help to do it.

With the election only months away, it's clear that reproductive freedom is on the ballot. Our mid-month deadline is at midnight, and Derek needs six people in 18326 to reach our goal.

**[Will you chip in whatever you can so that Derek can keep fighting for reproductive freedom in Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0NlQMfh_gzO_K5CQbYhjriK6MIrmaNyVo5zEPiU0B-c=/6-PJuIdmEdnTwFnLtyNwn1GC1KnVTcIAF-Wi4ZyeWeE=?refcode=em22_220415_mm1_fndd_gq_act_kkr_tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220415_mm1_fndd_gq_act_kkr_tk_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Derek Kilmer** <info@derekkilmer.com>
Date: Thu, Apr 14, 2022
Subject: Before midnight tomorrow

Team --

We started this month on a positive note when Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson was officially confirmed as the next Supreme Court Justice and the first Black woman to sit on the highest court in the land.

But as we took one step forward, Oklahoma passed one of the most extreme abortion restrictions in the country this week. This near-total abortion ban directly contradicts _Roe v. Wade_ , threatens prison time for providers, and puts women's physical and mental health at risk.

**One thing is clear: with reproductive freedom on the ballot this November, we need to defend and expand the Democratic House majority more than ever before.**

**[I am committed to defending pro-choice champions in Congress, but I need your help to do it. name: Paul Begala
subject: Take it from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]
Hi, team,
Paul Begala here. I’m a Democratic campaign veteran who has worked in the Clinton White House on campaigns ranging from offices ranging from Congress to the White House.
I know my buddy James Carville reached out to you recently for support, so I wouldn’t be emailing you again if it wasn’t so urgent.
But the future of American democracy itself is on the line this November – and Democratic Secretaries of State will be the make or break factor in the survival of our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]
DASS is the only national organization dedicated to Electing Secretaries of State who will stand up for our democracy and fight back against the ‘big lie’, but they have an uphill battle against them.
They urgently need your support to stop the ‘big lie’ and elect Secretaries who will defend our open, free, and fair democracy. Will you join me in supporting them by rushing $10 right now? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]
In my decades of campaign experience, I’ve seen campaigns argued over taxes, healthcare, and every other issue under the sun.
But this year is the first time the choice is this stark: either Democratic Secretaries win and disaster is averted, or the GOP and their ‘big lie’ defeat us – and end our democracy as we know it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]
23 election deniers are running for Secretary of State in 19 states, and the victors of those races will run our elections in 2024.
I don’t know about you – but the thought of a ‘big lie’, Election Denying radical running elections in a swing state like Nevada, Michigan, or Arizona scares the hell out of me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]
DASS can fight back and win, but only with your support. Will you rush $10 right now to help them stop the ‘big lie’, and elect Democratic Secretaries who will save our democracy? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]
CHIP IN $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]
CHIP IN $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]

CHIP IN $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D]
ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?refcode=EM_FR_041522_B3_90D&amount=5]
Thank you,
Paul Begala

[] DASS is the only national organization dedicated to Electing Secretaries of State who will stand up for our democracy and fight back against the ‘big lie’, but they have an uphill battle against them. They urgently need your support to stop the ‘big lie’ and elect Secretaries who will defend our open, free, and fair democracy. Will you join me in supporting them by rushing $10 right now? >>> [] CHIP IN NOW >>> [] In my decades of campaign experience, I’ve seen campaigns argued over taxes, healthcare, and every other issue under the sun. But this year is the first time the choice is this stark: either Democratic Secretaries win and disaster is averted, or the GOP and their ‘big lie’ defeat us – and end our democracy as we know it. [] 23 election deniers are running for Secretary of State in 19 states, and the victors of those races will run our elections in 2024. I don’t know about you – but the thought of a ‘big lie’, Election Denying radical running elections in a swing state like Nevada, Michigan, or Arizona scares the hell out of me. [] DASS can fight back and win, but only with your support. Will you rush $10 right now to help them stop the ‘big lie’, and elect Democratic Secretaries who will save our democracy? >>> [] CHIP IN $5 >>> [] CHIP IN $10 >>> [] CHIP IN $25 >>> [] CHIP IN $50 >>> [] ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [] Thank you, Paul Begala [] DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections. Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today! Donate Now []

| | | Dear Peter,

**Joe Biden’s recent budget plan is absolutely nuts. It will completely strangle our already failing economy.**

[**Chip in today to help me put a stop to his budget plan. >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1f679ac053&e=645b3b1338)

It is insane how out of touch Joe Biden is. His budget creates a whopping **_$45 billion_** in new taxes on any energy produced domestically.

American energy is going to fall apart while Biden negotiates with dictators and tyrannical leaders to buy their oil and gas.

Joe Biden does not care about the hardworking middle-class Americans that are facing the consequences of his leadership. This budget needs to be stopped **_NOW_** ; Americans **_CAN NOT_** suffer any longer.

[**Chip in today to help me put a stop to his budget plan. >>**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b781c0ff00&e=645b3b1338)

[Chip in $250](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f5b8fffa50&e=645b3b1338)

From day one of his term, Biden has worked to ruin America’s energy production. He began this mission by shutting down the Keystone XL pipeline.

Now, to worsen matters, he is taxing American energy companies!

[**With your support, we can work together to stop this budget, before it is too late.**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9ae90c5871&e=645b3b1338)

name: Team Latham
subject: It's been one year
body:
I'm in this fight now more than ever
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Today marks one year since we announced our campaign for United States Senate. As I reflect, I feel extremely fortunate to have spent this past year crisscrossing our state and meeting so many patriotic Georgians who are ready to fight to take back our state and country.
But it's also been a tough year for our country. We've seen record inflation, out of control gas prices, an unsecured border that has allowed over 2 million illegal crossings, and a devastating failure in Afghanistan that led to the loss of 13 of America's finest servicemembers.
I'm in this fight, now more than ever, so we can put a stop to Joe Biden & Raphael Warnock's destructive agenda. We're now 39 days out from the primary election, and voters have an important choice to make. I'm the experienced America First leader that has what it takes to defeat Raphael Warnock. My opponent in this primary has skipped every debate, ducked interviews, and ignored the everyday Georgians that I'm fighting for.
I will always show up for the people of this great state. I did just that last Saturday when I participated in the 9th District GOP Senate debate. I stood next to Herschel Walker's empty podium and shared why I'm the only candidate with the experience to plug in day one and fight for Georgia, and the only candidate in this race who will defeat Raphael Warnock.
[Watch a short clip from the debate here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001URwBxTHHSDW6ZMmRPD7A1UX3p80Uppfjyxxw62GykiGjz6ljuoeQ4r1-wcllg_QFg3GmFdXFeaZDy2g-9cVxRjqeRLtmxiW9djnVNuzLHsikXfATq7Om_iKkF0vooOF5Qn3F_7VzTpXnokMaGKfIK1LWAGt7qBoN-DkcS3-tuyRcgxXic3KQa5ZjAGfcZK54Xd2RdJN5yCGMc067mwp5dAXcshBHbtgXEdDFRbdFjrF3VCNpEprIcg==&c=SkVdf6bnir6NJq5sNdK5uXI7Bw7A_B8wHwp3BJxg-g6yZAR_8rFZEQ==&ch=PjxTx9vP1YnFjOHwmaq89abPfc2STsSxfQkGk8X_0JHNoyN_IHqs0w==)

We want voters in Georgia to know they have a real choice on May 24th between an experienced warfighter and a celebrity. This election is too critical to make the wrong choice, and we must keep our ad up on TV so that every voter in Georgia sees it.

clean_body: I'm in this fight now more than ever | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, Today marks one year since we announced our campaign for United States Senate. As I reflect, I feel extremely fortunate to have spent this past year crisscrossing our state and meeting so many patriotic Georgians who are ready to fight to take back our state and country. But it's also been a tough year for our country. We've seen record inflation, out of control gas prices, an unsecured border that has allowed over 2 million illegal crossings, and a devastating failure in Afghanistan that led to the loss of 13 of America's finest servicemembers. I'm in this fight, now more than ever, so we can put a stop to Joe Biden & Raphael Warnock's destructive agenda. We're now 39 days out from the primary election, and voters have an important choice to make. I'm the experienced America First leader that has what it takes to defeat Raphael Warnock. My opponent in this primary has skipped every debate, ducked interviews, and ignored the everyday Georgians that I'm fighting for. I will always show up for the people of this great state. I did just that last Saturday when I participated in the 9th District GOP Senate debate. I stood next to Herschel Walker's empty podium and shared why I'm the only candidate with the experience to plug in day one and fight for Georgia, and the only candidate in this race who will defeat Raphael Warnock. == | == | | The next morning I went to the National Infantry Museum at Fort Benning to join fellow veteran and Fox & Friends Sunday co-host Pete Hegseth for an interview about China, the border, and my campaign for Senate. == | == | I also appeared on Newsmax's National Report to discuss the ongoing war in Ukraine and how the United States should proceed with our military aid to Ukraine. == | == | Have you seen our first TV ad yet? == We want voters in Georgia to know they have a real choice on May 24th between an experienced warfighter and a celebrity. This election is too critical to make the wrong choice, and we must keep our ad up on TV so that every voter in Georgia sees it. == | | == | | Have you gotten your yard sign yet? If not, == to show your support and spread the word! == | | Don't forget, the time to vote is coming soon! We are 39 days away from the primary election on May 24th! Mark your calendar to vote and be sure to encourage your family and friends to do the same! Early Voting Begins May 2nd Final Primary Election Day is May 24th == | | I hope you enjoy time with your families this weekend. We wish you a happy Passover and a joyful Easter weekend! Gratefully, Latham | == == == == | | | | | | | Team Latham | 4062 Peachtree Rd. NE, Suite A #288, Atlanta, GA 39319 | | Sent by mailto:info@lathamsaddler.com

name: Team Olikara
subject: Cap Times: Olikara Wants to Bring Dignity to the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Image of Cap Times headline that reads, "Olikara Wants to Bring Dignity to the U.S. Senate" with link to article: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/CapTimes_Jack_Kelly_Headline_3.jpg]
[https://captimes.com/news/government/wisconsin-s-steven-olikara-wants-to-bring-dignity-to-the-u-s-senate/article_90341ced-a7a3-5e44-8089-d1d50db5fda7.html]

Dear Peter,

We’ve been getting lots of media coverage lately! The latest is an interview with Steven by Jack Kelly of the CapTimes [https://captimes.com/news/government/wisconsin-s-steven-olikara-wants-to-bring-dignity-to-the-u-s-senate/article_90341ced-a7a3-5e44-8089-d1d50db5fda7.html] highlighting our campaign’s focus on dignity and building a diverse coalition of Wisconsin voters. Help us build on this growing momentum by contributing to our campaign today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate?refcode=0415email] .

Image of Cap Times logo: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/ct_logo.png]

“The way you make change in a diverse democracy is by bringing unlikely allies together who maybe found something in common they didn't realize they had. And that is what dignity means in our politics.”

In the article [https://captimes.com/news/government/wisconsin-s-steven-olikara-wants-to-bring-dignity-to-the-u-s-senate/article_90341ced-a7a3-5e44-8089-d1d50db5fda7.html] , Steven talks about how this race will have a critical impact on shaping the future of our democracy. His focus on humanity and dignity is what has enabled him to bring Democrats, Republicans and Independents together and pass 31 bipartisan bills through Congress.

Image of Cap Times logo: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/ct_logo.png]

“Our coalition, I call it the "exhausted majority" — and that includes everyone from formerly incarcerated entrepreneurs in Milwaukee, to small family farmers in the Driftless, to tech entrepreneurs in Dane County, to educators in Brown County. All of these constituencies feel left out of the political system and I want them to be at the center of our agenda.”

As the interview turns its focus to health care, Steven points out that providing guaranteed health care and portable benefits for all U.S. citizens boosts our economy by allowing people to pursue work that’s meaningful to them.

Image of Cap Times logo: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/ct_logo.png]

“Right now there's an issue called "job lock," where a lot of people are stuck working unfulfilling, sometimes even abusive jobs for these multinational corporations, because their health care, not only for themselves, but also for their family, is tied to that job. I want to unlink those two. I want you to be able to pursue purposeful work, and that will come through a modern, Medicare-like health care system that's available to all Americans.”

Please help us get the word out about our campaign by donating [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate?refcode=0415email], sharing this article [https://captimes.com/news/government/wisconsin-s-steven-olikara-wants-to-bring-dignity-to-the-u-s-senate/article_90341ced-a7a3-5e44-8089-d1d50db5fda7.html] on social media and talking about it with your friends and family. Together, we can continue building this cross-partisan coalition of voters to send Steven to the U.S. Senate and transform politics in our state and the nation.

With Excitement for the Road Ahead!
Team Olikara

Read the full article here: [https://captimes.com/news/government/wisconsin-s-steven-olikara-wants-to-bring-dignity-to-the-u-s-senate/article_90341ced-a7a3-5e44-8089-d1d50db5fda7.html]

This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more voters in Wisconsin.
Button that says, "Chip in Today!" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0317email]

[Paid for by Olikara for Senate.]

Facebook logo with link to Steven Olikara's Facebook profile: [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate]
Twitter logo with link to Steven Olikara's Twitter profile: [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara]
Instagram logo with link to Steven Olikara's Instagram profile: [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/]
TikTok logo with link to Steven Olikara's TikTok profile: [https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara]

Olikara for Senate
P.O. Box 510216
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b88a15b9-2fbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/0bb1886f-ddbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDgwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmIxODg2Zi1kZGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISpE1k8PJ56U6ZqBSmsI0lzzbjcehflGCiOPvchOFk4=&id=130029555 .

name: Noah, Political Coordinator
subject: Why I support Ben
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-mm?refcode=220415-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-mm?refcode=220415-email]
Friend,
My name is Noah, and I am the Political Coordinator for Ben Samuels' campaign for Congress.
I support Ben because I am sick and tired of hateful rhetoric and angry leadership. Ben believes there is more that unites us than divides us, and I am ready to throw my weight behind someone who is focused on offering a positive vision for our community.
We need some more supplies for the office so that more and more Missourians can get involved in this grassroots campaign to unseat Ann Wagner. Can you help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-mm?refcode=220415-email]
As a young Democrat and active member of the St. Louis Jewish community, I am worried about the state of our democracy and the radical hatred coming from the other side. I know Ben is the candidate who can win this race and help to restore a bit of decency and integrity to politics in Washington.
Please contribute to the campaign’s fundraiser right now and help us keep growing so that this November, Ann Wagner does not even have a shot at keeping her seat.
Give now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-mm?refcode=220415-email]
--Noah, Political Coordinator
Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area.

clean_body: | Team, We’re just one day away from our mid-April fundraising deadline. We want to share why tomorrow’s deadline is important. Each contribution fuels our work and expands our ability to do more for everyday Americans. Together, we’re working to support our veterans, care for our seniors, protect our land and water, make health care more affordable, bring down costs of everyday essentials like gas and groceries, and more. Kyrsten and our team remain focused on getting things done for everyday families in the coming weeks and months. We count on folks like you to help us power our work, so we’re asking: Friend, will you add a donation by tomorrow’s deadline to ensure we are set up to continue delivering lasting results? body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44185535/340463886/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjFkZTUyMS1mZmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqB-7xtdTn-o_fYK3oWXe4WHKK01MQ3kssJ_gc0XzYo=&emci=8d679988-e1bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a61de521-ffbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Republicans are doing everything they can to make voting more time consuming and increasingly inconvenient. Supposedly to put a stop to all the non-existent voter fraud that happened in 2020.
Thankfully, their most recent attempt to kill Arizona's mail-in voting system was halted by the Arizona Supreme Court last week.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44185536/340463887/2089498197?refcode=X_041522_AZSC&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjFkZTUyMS1mZmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqB-7xtdTn-o_fYK3oWXe4WHKK01MQ3kssJ_gc0XzYo=)
---
If you're struggling to understand why Republicans are on a mission to kill mail-in voting, you're not the only one.
**Arizona has had an early voting program for three decades. And Republicans vote early, by mail, just as much (if not more) than Democrats. At least 90% of Arizona voters vote by mail. **
Look, we know you aren't impressed with this blatant attempt to silence Arizona voters, and neither is Kirsten Engel.
[**Will you join Kirsten in the fight to defend our right to free and fair elections by chipping in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44185537/340463888/2089498197?refcode=X_041522_AZSC&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjFkZTUyMS1mZmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqB-7xtdTn-o_fYK3oWXe4WHKK01MQ3kssJ_gc0XzYo=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44185538/340463889/416963966?refcode=X_041522_AZSC&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjFkZTUyMS1mZmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqB-7xtdTn-o_fYK3oWXe4WHKK01MQ3kssJ_gc0XzYo=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44185539/340463890/416963966?refcode=X_041522_AZSC&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjFkZTUyMS1mZmJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqB-7xtdTn-o_fYK3oWXe4WHKK01MQ3kssJ_gc0XzYo=)

body:

| | Peter, While Joe Lombardo was **endorsing and giving money** to Steve Sisolak in 2018, I was in Washington fighting for Nevada and the America First agenda. In exactly TWO months, Republicans across Nevada will head to the polls to decide which one of us will take on Steve Sisolak in November. **_Lombardo helped Sisolak win once, and he’ll do it again if he wins on June 14th. _**

Friend,
I am proud to announce The NewDem Action Fund added our campaign to their Candidate Watch List. The New Democrat Coalition is the second-largest House Democrat ideological caucus.
Jane Hope Hamilton is on The NewDem Action Fund's Candidate Watch List. [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5A64484D4F746233596762565234386D37483858652B356C5241495A7A706B7A392F7549316C4B73424B78536A4C7A47574754576863444C474E754C6F644975/editor_images/New%20Dems%20Action%20Fund%20%281%29.png]
The NewDem Action Fund helps to elect results-driven candidates. They are focused on supporting candidates who can work collaboratively, build impactful coalitions, and make government work for everyday families.
I started my career in public service over twenty years ago because I knew our communities deserved better. It's surreal to have the New Democrat Coalition recognize my years of service and the results I've delivered for North Texas families.
With the runoff election just over a month away, I'm asking you to pitch in $30 right now to help spread our message to voters and grow our movement in TX-30. Can I count on you to rush a donation today?
