name: Alvin Williams, President
subject: The Lies Just Keep Coming....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
-
| | Dear Peter, I didn’t want you to miss out on the chance to fight back against the radical left. You know as well as I do that they’ll lie and cheat their way to stay in power. And one of their most pernicious lies is that Republicans are racists. **[You can help fight back against this false narrative with your _“Destroy the Liberal Lies”_ car magnet](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=1)** that I’ll tell you more about in my email below. Thank you for all you do to fight for truth and freedom, Peter.
---
| [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=2)
---
_For America,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund
[DONATE](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=3)
---
\- - - - - - Begin Forward - - - - - - **From:** Alvin Williams
**Sent:** Wednesday, April 6th 2022 6:45 PM
**To:** Peter
**Subject: Destroy Their Lies....**
---
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=4)
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=5)
---
Dear Peter,
Dr. Carson is absolutely correct: **_without Black voters, the Republican Party may never win another Presidential election._**
Even worse, the GOP will find it increasingly difficult to win Senate seats in swing states - putting your conservative values in **serious jeopardy**!
**And nobody knows this more than the Democrats.**
That's why liberal race-baiters have launched an all-out assault on outspoken, Black conservatives - _like Dr. Ben Carson, Burgess Owens, and Sheriff Clarke_ \- **because they know their stranglehold on Black voters depends on it.**
You see, Black Republicans are crucial in destroying the Liberal Lie that **all Republicans are racist**.
You and I both know that isn't true, but Black voters only hear the liberal side of the story that says only government can create prosperity. They simply never hear the truth about conservatism.
[](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=6)
---
It's a BIG problem that is threatening to destroy our values, Peter.
**[I'm hoping you'll help me fight back against the race-baiting Liberal Lies](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=7)** , but first let me tell you **the BIG secret liberals do NOT want you to know**.
**The Democrats are scared to death right now...**
...because they know if Republicans can reclaim just 12% of the Black vote, _it will be the Democrats who will be unable to win another Presidential election_.
**Even a 7% increase in Blacks voting Republican could STOP the Democrats from winning the 2022 midterms!**
They're watching their **stranglehold** on Black voters start to slip after decades of failed policies that have **enslaved** entire generations of minorities to the government plantation.
The tide is turning because proud, Black conservatives _(like Dr. Ben Carson, Burgess Owens, Sheriff Clarke, and many more)_ \- are recruiting minorities to the Republican Party like never before - simply by sharing the promise of conservatism.
**That's why hateful liberals are desperate to destroy every Black conservative!**
**They know the ONLY way to keep Blacks voting for Democrats is to spread the lie that** **all Republicans are racist.**
That's why they call Sheriff Clarke a **"traitor to his race."**
That's why they spent MILLIONS to target and finally defeat Rep. Mia Love, a GOP rising star known for championing personal responsibility.
And that's why they attack Dr. Ben Carson with articles titled **"F*ck Ben Carson"** and call him hateful names like **"Uncle Tom"** and **"the acceptable negro for whites"**.
You and I can NOT let this stand!
There is simply too much at stake to let liberal race-baiters continue to attack Black Republicans and spread hate-filled lies about conservatives like you and me.
**[That's why I'm hoping you'll help me fight back with a contribution of $20.22 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=8)**
Your contribution will be put to use immediately to defend our proud, Black conservatives from hate-filled liberal attacks.
**[Your support will also help Black America's PAC Action Fund purchase radio ads in urban markets](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=9)** across America to spread conservativism to minority communities and reclaim Black voters to the Republican Party, where they belong.
These issues-based radio ads are absolutely critical if you and I are to reclaim Black voters, protect our values, and end the Democrat Party's **reign of terror** over the Black Community.
I can tell you from personal experience - once the message of conservatism reaches Black voters, it spreads like wildfire and obliterates the Liberal Lies that keep Blacks voting for Democrats.
**[So can I count on your contribution of $20.22 today?](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=10)**
**Remember, just a 7% increase in Blacks voting Republican could STOP the Democrats from winning the 2022 midterms...**
...but we can't do anything without your immediate help, Peter.
As a conservative leader in your community, your support is needed now more than ever!
**[So please join me in fighting back against the Liberal Lies and taking the fight to the Democrats with a contribution of $20.22 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=11)**
Or if you can't afford that much right now, **[then please give $5 or even $1 as a symbol of your support](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=12)**.
**[If you make a donation of ANY amount today, I'll send you this exclusive _"Destroy the Liberal Lies"_ magnet as a special thank you gift.](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=13)**
[](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=14)
---
Together, you and I can END the Liberal Lies by standing strong beside our Black conservatives.
Thank you, in advance, for joining the fight to destroy the Liberal Lies.
| [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=15)
---
_For America,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund
[DONATE](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=16)
---
**P.S.** Just a 7% increase in Blacks voting Republican will STOP the Democrats from winning the 2022 midterms - **and nobody knows this more than Democrats**. That's why liberals - _desperate to keep their stranglehold on Black voters_ \- spread the vicious lie that all Republicans are racist! **[Your contribution of $20.22 or more will help BAMPAC Action Fund take the fight to the Democrats and destroy the Liberal Lies.](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=17)** **[And if you make a donation of ANY amount today, I'll send you this exclusive "Destroy the Liberal Lies" magnet as a special thank you gift.](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=18)** | [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?info=2022EA0304&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0304&n=19)
---
Thank you and God Bless.

body:

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Senate Leadership Fund just booked ads in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

We just found out that Senate Leadership Fund — a super PAC run by Mitch McConnell and his allies — just booked at least $8,000,000 worth of TV ads in North Carolina.
They are setting their target on our Senate race because they know the Senate majority could come down to North Carolina.
[**Can you rush a $3 donation to our campaign today to make sure we’re prepared for whatever attacks they throw our way? Our final FEC deadline before the primary is on April 27, and we need to prove our campaign is ready for the millions of dollars of dark money ads headed our way.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220415-1-t2t3&refcode2=720.357359.Zq9a-5&t=1&akid=720%2E357359%2EZq9a-5)**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220415-1-t2t3&refcode2=720.357359.Zq9a-5&t=2&akid=720%2E357359%2EZq9a-5)**
This commitment from McConnell’s super PAC — before Republicans **_even**_ have a nominee — is a clear sign of just how competitive this race will be. No matter who they nominate, they know they are going to face a steep challenge to overcome our strong grassroots support and momentum.
We’ve seen multiple polls showing us in a statistical tie with our opponents, and I’ve proven I can win statewide twice before. So Republicans are desperate to stop me from doing it again.
McConnell and his corporate, dark money allies will stop at nothing to try to protect this seat and retake the majority. It’s going to take all of us to defeat them.
[**Please make a $3 donation today to help us compete with Republicans’ outside spending. This is important. We need a massive showing of grassroots support when we report our numbers after the pre-primary FEC deadline this month.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220415-1-t2t3&refcode2=720.357359.Zq9a-5&t=3&akid=720%2E357359%2EZq9a-5)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Beto HQ
subject: Three donations from 18326
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Our finance team is poring over their spreadsheets.
#
In order to scale up our campaign to the level that we need to win, we have to constantly be hitting our internal fundraising goals. **Since we’re at the midpoint of the month, our finance team is poring over their spreadsheets and crunching the numbers.**
We just set a goal to raise $97,000 before midnight tonight in order to keep Beto on the road meeting voters and grow our organizing team across the state. This is an ambitious goal but if just three folks from 18326 each chip in, we’ll hit this goal before midnight. _So we’re reaching out to ask:_
[ Will you be one of the three folks from 18326 we need to make a contribution today? Whether you can afford to donate $3 or a little bit more, every single donation will make a difference. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55416?refcode=ema20220415-185157&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=185157%2E444211%2ErjBw-L)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55416?refcode=ema20220415-185157&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=185157%2E444211%2ErjBw-L)**
With more than 60,000 volunteers signed up, we’re working every day to scale this campaign so we can create the biggest organizing program that Texas has ever seen to defeat Greg Abbott. Abbott isn’t fighting for Texans’ best interests. He’s focused on radical political stunts that hurt the economy in Texas and across the country.
This is shaping up to be the most expensive — and competitive — gubernatorial election in Texas history. And Abbott’s team has said that they plan to spend $100,000,000 against Beto.
[ We can’t have Greg Abbott as governor for another term. Please, help us elect Beto in November by being one of the three folks from 18326 who we need to make a contribution before midnight.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55416?refcode=ema20220415-185157&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=185157%2E444211%2ErjBw-L)
With your support, we can win this campaign. Let’s get it done!
—Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220415-185157-footer&t=22&refcode2=185157_444211_rjBw-L&akid=185157%2E444211%2ErjBw-L)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=185157%2E444211%2ErjBw-L)

This is shaping up to be the most expensive — and competitive — gubernatorial election in Texas history. And Abbott’s team has said that they plan to spend $100,000,000 against Beto. With your support, we can win this campaign. Let’s get it done! —Team Beto Email us: info@betofortexas.com

body:

As of today, we’re halfway through the month so I’ve been checking in on our fundraising numbers and making sure we’re on track to reaching our goal by the end-of-month deadline on April 30.
When we receive contributions from supporters like you and reach our fundraising targets, those financial resources help power everything that makes for a strong, winning campaign — like countering Mike Pence’s $10 million ad blitz targeting Lizzie, printing literature and yard signs, recruiting volunteers to help us reach all the new voters in our district, and so much more.
If you’re able to contribute to our campaign today, it would put us in a stronger position to reach our end-of-month goal in a couple of weeks and power our team as we prepare for Election Day. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220415?refcode=lpfe220415_m]
Thanks,
Gordon Center

| | Peter, we have big news that I wanted to share with you personally: We filed our petition signatures to get on the ballot! This puts us in a strong position to win reelection here in Michigan’s new Eleventh District — **in fact, we are the first Democratic candidate to file our signatures.** I couldn’t be more thrilled to continue this work alongside strong supporters like you, Peter — this campaign is powered by the hard work and dedication of our volunteers, who show up and turn out to community events, spread the word to neighbors, and pitch in when they can. Our volunteers are the backbone of our campaign, and motivate me to keep fighting for what’s right every single day. [_**Will you chip in $5 or more today to ensure our team can keep growing our volunteer capacity we need to win in November?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173940/340432867/478999150?refcode=em_20220415_f_a_sign&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDBlMmFmNS1lNGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ef9l3nP3_uSiodyAZjJUIW8KTB_A8lE5SEXR_kwv5tQ=) We can’t lose sight of what’s at stake. From the future of our climate to the fate of our democracy, all of the work we are fighting for could be lost without growing our Progressive Caucus in Congress. [_**Can you donate to my reelection campaign today, ensuring our progressive voices remain in Congress? Our campaign’s most common contribution is just $10.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44173941/340432868/478999150?refcode=em_20220415_f_a_sign&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDBlMmFmNS1lNGJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ef9l3nP3_uSiodyAZjJUIW8KTB_A8lE5SEXR_kwv5tQ=) Thank you for all you do. body:
She can't afford to start off on the wrong foot
| | |
---
This is concerning, friend: With just a day left to meet her Mid Month fundraising goal tomorrow at midnight, Val Demings is** still falling short.** Please, let us explain why this is such a dire moment:
**Val Demings is neck and neck with Marco Rubio in a race that will determine Senate control, and _The __Miami Times_ even reported that she's closing the polling gap!**
The problem is that Marco Rubio and national Republicans are launching desperate attacks against her because they KNOW that she can win this race and expand our Senate majority.__**The GOP has even stooped as low as attacking her law enforcement career.**
**Our Mid Month fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching. And our numbers last quarter proved to the political establishment that this people-powered movement is prepared to fight back against Marco Rubio's lies – but we need to keep up the momentum.**

| Friends,

In case you missed the morning’s news, [newly obtained text messages](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=217456cab7&e=10c1db3257) reveal that **Sen. Mike Lee researched how to overturn a lawful election in 2020.**

**I am greatly concerned about this news. My official statement below:**

_“Sen. Mike Lee researched overturning a lawful, democratic election for partisan and political gain. The moment Mike Lee realized the gravity of Trump’s attempts to undermine the 2020 election, he should have stopped researching the legality of such actions and stopped pressuring local legislators. Lee has an obligation to protect and defend our Constitution and democratic process, as he swore to do when he took office. Instead, he allowed the situation to continue and enabled those seeking to keep themselves in power, no matter the consequences.”_

**Please, share this message if you agree that it’s time to vote Mike Lee out. **

— Becky

Fellow Conservative - I deleted my Hulu Disney+ subscription.

_Why?_

Because Disney is pushing woke gender identity propaganda on America’s children. Out of spite for Florida’s _Parental Rights in Education Bill_ , Disney has cozied up with the progressive left socialists and is using its platforms to push woke ideology that parents like me disagree with.

Parents have the right to raise our kids without woke corporations getting in the way. Disney is threatening that right.

subject: Did you not read this?!

body:
Alright, friend, looks like some of you didn't read my last email because **we set a goal of 1,000 donations, but only saw 345?!**
---
With Republicans cashing in millions, we can't risk falling behind. And at this rate, we're bound to lose the Senate or the House – or even worse, BOTH! **[PLEASE friend, will you pitch in $5 by midnight tonight so we can hold our Democratic majorities in Congress?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44187090/340471367/628857336?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk730-fr-aai&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5MDVhNzE0LTA4YmQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=q23kgzyzNt9UOpG_w6K_uBtI4jHjUBE53A2ft4ffayI=)**
Thanks.

– Carville
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **James Carville**
Date: Fri, Apr 15, 2022
Subject: $43 million?!
| | |
---
I won't sugarcoat this, friend: Democrats are DOOMED if we don't start paying attention to the upcoming midterm elections.
**I'm not joking: According to a new report, the Senate GOP campaign arm raised $43 million in Q1!!!**
Republicans are raising money hand over fist, and Democrats simply CANNOT afford to fall behind these bozos. That's why we urgently need 1,000 donations today to make sure we can go toe-to-toe with the Republican Senate campaign arm.** [So, will you make a contribution right away to help us get 1,000 donations before midnight and give us the boost we need to protect our _very_ slim Senate majority?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44187091/340471368/628857336?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk730-fr-aai&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5MDVhNzE0LTA4YmQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=q23kgzyzNt9UOpG_w6K_uBtI4jHjUBE53A2ft4ffayI=)**
Right now, the National Republican Senatorial Committee has a war chest of MILLIONS in its hands. And what are they gonna do with it? Use their typical cheap and dirty tactics to try and take our Democratic majorities, of course.
**And with political strategists predicting a red wave come November, we have ZERO time to waste.****** With Election Day just a few months away, now is the time to open our eyes and keep them on the prize.
**[Friend, I'm counting on you to step up. Chip in $15 or whatever you can by midnight tonight so that we can hit our mid-month goal and show Mitch McConnell and the GOP we're keeping the Senate in 2022:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44187092/340471369/628857336?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk730-fr-aai&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5MDVhNzE0LTA4YmQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=q23kgzyzNt9UOpG_w6K_uBtI4jHjUBE53A2ft4ffayI=)**

Friend,

These past few months in Washington have once again proved that Democratic Leadership is failing us. As we inch closer to the midterm elections, will you join me in ensuring Republicans regain control in Washington?

name: Nida Allam
subject: this is hard to admit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nida for NC
body:
|
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/5NEgKdxauxboG7CNb4Uvbw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkPDslP0TIaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQxNV9lbV9mcl9iMV9qb2JfZW5fcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MjdxUzlJV2dJdzJMTnI4bU1kcGpnUkZMSEZhJnJlZmNvZGUyPTI3cVM5SVdnSXcyTE5yOG1NZHBqZ1JGTEhGYSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yN3FTOUlXZ0l3MkxOcjhtTWRwamdSRkxIRmFXA3NwY0IKYksltlliXWdr81IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAHA~)
---
I want to pull back the curtain and tell you the truth about the real underbelly of political fundraising.

Our political system makes it incredibly difficult for working people like myself to run for office.

In order to fully commit myself to winning this seat, I had to quit my job, which has been incredibly hard.

I can’t self-fund my campaign or call up my wealthy network like so many other candidates.

My campaign is fueled by grassroots donations over emails like this. $5, $10, and $27 donations are going to be what allows us to win.

**I hate asking for campaign contributions, but it’s the only way working people like myself can break into the system.** [**_We’re $4,720 short of our critical mid-month deadline in 10 hours. If we miss it, we’ll have to make crucial budget cuts. Will you join our grassroots movement by rushing $27 now? >>_**](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/5NEgKdxauxboG7CNb4Uvbw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkPDslP0TIaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQxNV9lbV9mcl9iMV9qb2JfZW5fcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MjdxUzlJV2dJdzJMTnI4bU1kcGpnUkZMSEZhJnJlZmNvZGUyPTI3cVM5SVdnSXcyTE5yOG1NZHBqZ1JGTEhGYSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yN3FTOUlXZ0l3MkxOcjhtTWRwamdSRkxIRmFXA3NwY0IKYksltlliXWdr81IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAHA~) | [Chip in $27 immediately >>](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/5NEgKdxauxboG7CNb4Uvbw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkPDslP0TIaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQxNV9lbV9mcl9iMV9qb2JfZW5fcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MjdxUzlJV2dJdzJMTnI4bU1kcGpnUkZMSEZhJnJlZmNvZGUyPTI3cVM5SVdnSXcyTE5yOG1NZHBqZ1JGTEhGYSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yN3FTOUlXZ0l3MkxOcjhtTWRwamdSRkxIRmFXA3NwY0IKYksltlliXWdr81IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAHA~)
---
In order to run for Congress, I had to make the hard decision to take a chance and quit my job– something that not everyone can afford to do.

But I’m one of the lucky ones– my husband and I have enough savings to make this work for a few months and no one else who relies on us for financial support.

But I’m not going to lie: it's been hard making ends meet while still covering our mortgage, medical bills, and student loan payments.

**The extreme financial inequity in this country is why so many working people like myself can never even consider running for Congress.**

Over 50% of people serving in Congress are millionaires. It’s no wonder that Congress hasn’t passed policies to help working families when politicians are so disconnected from the average American.

clean_body: | | ~ I want to pull back the curtain and tell you the truth about the real underbelly of political fundraising. Our political system makes it incredibly difficult for working people like myself to run for office. In order to fully commit myself to winning this seat, I had to quit my job, which has been incredibly hard. I can’t self-fund my campaign or call up my wealthy network like so many other candidates. My campaign is fueled by grassroots donations over emails like this. $5, $10, and $27 donations are going to be what allows us to win. I hate asking for campaign contributions, but it’s the only way working people like myself can break into the system. ~ | ~ In order to run for Congress, I had to make the hard decision to take a chance and quit my job– something that not everyone can afford to do. But I’m one of the lucky ones– my husband and I have enough savings to make this work for a few months and no one else who relies on us for financial support. But I’m not going to lie: it's been hard making ends meet while still covering our mortgage, medical bills, and student loan payments. The extreme financial inequity in this country is why so many working people like myself can never even consider running for Congress. Over 50% of people serving in Congress are millionaires. It’s no wonder that Congress hasn’t passed policies to help working families when politicians are so disconnected from the average American. ~ | ~ | ~ | ~ | | | Thank you for your support, Nida Allam | ~ 6409 Fayetteville Rd Ste 120-378 Durham, NC 27713 Paid for by Nida for NC Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. The ONLY way Nida will win this race is with small grassroots donations. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please click ~. Thanks for fighting alongside Nida! | | | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

It's critical to get back on track. Not only does it ensure we have the resources to share our campaign message across the state, but it also allows us to FIGHT BACK against King Murphy and his cronies in Trenton.
[Please make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT to our mid-month goal in the NEXT HOUR. >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qmjQWtWVa_yGZqr-9kYyKITv04rF8-dGtGEBKplAIE1MRQOD4voEuDu-sAZzrw532_9gM9YYIC21BqemEGZNDoR7wPZnEIC5OWk7iGn_FODeVthvECEpsTuXoJu9na68Sth4wH1tUr6SF3Msh1vwG1o4ux-r5_Xt5DQcs-TxdFXI2I8tdHPQDN2prltqcj8vr_3S_aX6oJGJDXB6yiLHxvgvHAs-wxliK917zr5FkNOxrs5A2ykDWql9iVsykpONeKmcIzTBUlCxm2ymn7hyNDNy76cntFyPsHRPmVydEXhHIIEk_nZpsrJLtNqrP6XGPKaCxbEt6_BaoVrP-mn1QOtGBhp0_1PHVH-JYi4RExb1OL6lPpRLbA==&c=yDWpRuKGtuWrLCaelNQ6PrGvOQQIQKHcc4DikblNNJtp1PSS8QpwNw==&ch=fjbnDiMZcWs8NV8f2O8KjDhYXUKcBH8UlBfliwcdlGaCG09qu9xaJw==)

Our coalition is growing, Peter Willis!
I’m so proud to receive the endorsement of **New York Communities for Change** , one of the largest grassroots, membership-driven, community-based organizations in New York.
[This a HUGE moment for our campaign. name: Tim
subject: re: our options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3297%2E3611125%2EsNZ0cw ][IMG]

Folks,

We’re only a few weeks away from gametime. In early May, Republicans will
pick a candidate to take me on in November, and we need to be ready with
the resources necessary to combat their attacks both online and on TV.

Look, we know they’ve got billionaires and far-right, dark-money super
PACs on their side—and they’re all jumping at the chance to take us down.
So now it’s up to you to decide if we’re able to take them on, or if we’ll
fall prey to their dirty tricks.

So, the way I see it, we have two options if we want to win this race...

1. Either we need more online supporters like you to chip in before
midnight OR

2. We need folks to pitch in just a little bit more than usual.

subject: Cringe moment for Biden, Elon's offer to Twitter
body:
and more... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/50e804fedd99/cringe-moment-for-biden-elons-offer-to-twitter?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | |
---
## Another week, another cringe moment for President Biden...
Watch this moment from this week:
| | | | | | |
---
## Elon Musk makes an offer to buy Twitter for over $40B...
Now the question is will Twitter accept. We had a YouTuber with an investment channel, Meet Kevin on _Spicer & Co_ last night to explain what some next steps might be, check it out:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6a793ea106&e=f6564bbe3b)
If the sale goes through, I have one request...
| | | | | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Amazon will levy a 5% fuel and inflation fee on online merchants that use its shipping services](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cc12c65150&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Bloomberg Is the White House going to blame this on Putin?[CDC extends travel mask requirement to May 3 as COVID rises](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3bf6d4723f&e=f6564bbe3b) — via AP News I[owa Democrats must apply to hold first-in-the-nation caucus after DNC opens nominating calendar ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a0898b9970&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Des Moines RegisterNow you wonder why Biden went to Iowa to announce the E15 extension? [Former Patriot Matt Light running for school committee in Foxborough](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d9880fbfb5&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Boston Globe[Secret Service Scoop: Biden Secret Service Detailee, Uniformed Division Officer Assigned to Harris’ Residence Entangled in Alleged Bribery Scheme ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6c4bdd6066&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Real Clear Politics [Biden Has Only Given One Interview with Establishment Media in 2022](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a954472a7e&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Breitbart [Biden is turning a border crisis into an outright catastrophe](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ffb176c37b&e=f6564bbe3b) — Marc Thiessen via Washington Post
| | | | | | |
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1c73c13e74&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | |
## PurpleStride is coming up, consider supporting my team...
Will be walking to wage hope against pancreatic cancer in memory of my dad on April 30th, consider joining my team.
---

Mothers Day and Fathers Day are both coming up, so I’ve got signed copies of _Radical Nation_ available on SeanSpicer.com. Get one now:|

[Buy here](seanspicer.com/products)

name: Patrick Denny, Wes Moore for Maryland
subject: Updates from Wes Moore for Maryland - April 15th
body:
Check out the latest below!

| | Friend - Happy Friday, and thank you so much for your continued support of the Moore-Miller campaign! This week it has been confirmed - our primary election is set for July 19th, which means we are 95 days to election day! It's been another busy week for Wes - we are excited to announce the endorsements of Delegate Geraldine Valentino-Smith, Delegate Vanessa Atterbeary, Senator Guy Guzzone, Hagerstown Mayor Emily Keller, Laurel Councilmember Brencis Smith and the Ironworkers Local 5 - and that was all just this week! Tomorrow, the campaign will be holding a rally in Baltimore City with Wes Moore, Aruna Miller, and several other special guests - please see the details below and we hope you'll join us! This will be a fun outdoor event with music and food trucks, and we would love to see you there. And next week, we'll be running it back for our Office Opening in Silver Spring - those details are below as well. In the coming weeks, we have several fundraising events as well, and would love for you to join us, or consider hosting your own. More details are below, and please reply to this email for more information. Many thanks for your support of Wes and Aruna, and more to follow! Patrick Denny Finance Director Wes Moore for Maryland **Wes Moore Rally in Baltimore!** Saturday, April 16th, 12:30pm - 2:30pm T. Rowe Price Pavilion Park, Baltimore, MD _[RSVP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187375/340472570/-252819174?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg4ODExZS0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfpkXSI6HXqH7Y2ecotZM3mJ1DmcVd9fnlyl6P-aDU4=&emci=aa468523-1dbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b88811e-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)_ **Montgomery County Office Opening!** Saturday, April 23rd, 12:00pm - 2:00pm Silver Spring, MD 20910 _**[RSVP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187376/340472571/1720612528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg4ODExZS0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfpkXSI6HXqH7Y2ecotZM3mJ1DmcVd9fnlyl6P-aDU4=&emci=aa468523-1dbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b88811e-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)**_ _**What people are saying - highlights from the press:**_ **[_Baltimore Positive: Why are Maryland's teachers backing Wes Moore?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187377/340472572/-713554872?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=why-are-marylands-teachers-backing-wes-moore&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg4ODExZS0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfpkXSI6HXqH7Y2ecotZM3mJ1DmcVd9fnlyl6P-aDU4=&emci=aa468523-1dbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b88811e-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)** Cheryl Bost brings clarity to what teachers need and why MSEA endorsed Wes Moore for Governor. Bost stated that she "...saw in Wes a commitment for public education, a commitment to making sure that educators have a voice at the table and energy that we think is needed to energize the electorate to come out and vote" “....what I sensed in Wes Moore was someone who is a good listener and will be a good listener" Don Mohler later stated. "Wes has a way to get to know people....he learned from listening instead of just kinda checking the box and talking to our folks...." **[_The Washington Post: Wes Moore wins coveted endorsement in Maryland governor's race _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187378/340472573/989049486?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg4ODExZS0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfpkXSI6HXqH7Y2ecotZM3mJ1DmcVd9fnlyl6P-aDU4=&emci=aa468523-1dbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b88811e-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)** Democratic gubernatorial candidate Wes Moore on Saturday won the coveted endorsement of the state’s largest teachers union, a large boost for the former nonprofit chief who is making his first run for public office. Union leaders said they were drawn to Moore’s “personal history as a Marylander” and his commitment that aligns with the union’s goals for a “world class education for every student.” “Our students and communities need leadership committed to the promise that no matter their neighborhood they will have the same opportunity to reach their potential,” union president Cheryl Bost said in a statement. “Wes Moore has demonstrated a commitment to unite people whom he leads in the fight for racial, social justice, and to give educators a voice in the decisions and policies that affect education.” _**[WYPR: Wes Moore, Democratic primary candidate for Maryland Governor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187379/340472574/-1625036578?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg4ODExZS0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfpkXSI6HXqH7Y2ecotZM3mJ1DmcVd9fnlyl6P-aDU4=&emci=aa468523-1dbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b88811e-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)**_ Today on Midday _, _we continue our election-year interview series, Conversations with the Candidates: 2022. Tom's guest is Wes Moore, who is one of 10 candidates in the Democratic primary for Governor. _[**Baltimore Positive: Lt. Gov candidate Aruna Miller tells us why she joined Wes Moore ticket to lead Maryland**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187380/340472575/-1536264666?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg4ODExZS0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfpkXSI6HXqH7Y2ecotZM3mJ1DmcVd9fnlyl6P-aDU4=&emci=aa468523-1dbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b88811e-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)_ [_**WATCH: Talbot Spy Election 2022 Profiles: Wes Moore for Governor**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187381/340472576/-1380077148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg4ODExZS0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfpkXSI6HXqH7Y2ecotZM3mJ1DmcVd9fnlyl6P-aDU4=&emci=aa468523-1dbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b88811e-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485) **_Save the date: Upcoming Fundraisers!_** _See the below details for some of our upcoming fundraisers - we hope you can join us! Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.___________ **“Women for Wes” Breakfast Reception in support of Wes Moore for Maryland** Hosted by: Shahara Ahmad-Llewellyn, Gwen Adolph, Andi Bernstein, Wendy Credle, Dana DiCarlo, Lisa Ellis, Julissa Ferreras, Laura Kleinhandler, Hildy Kuryk, Linda Loewenthal, Tonya Lewis Lee, Blair Miller, Crystal McCrary, Dia Simms, Laurie Tisch, and Colleen Tompkins Tuesday, April 19th, 8:30am - 10:00am Michael’s Restaurant, W 55th St. New York, NY **[RSVP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187382/340472577/-2134750993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg4ODExZS0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfpkXSI6HXqH7Y2ecotZM3mJ1DmcVd9fnlyl6P-aDU4=&emci=aa468523-1dbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b88811e-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)** Arrival details provided upon RSVP **Reception in support of Wes Moore for Maryland** Hosted by: Liz Young McNally, Lev Sviridov, Matt Watters, Josh Welle, and Will Zeng Tuesday, April 19th, 7:30 pm - 9:00 pm The Home of Will Zeng, Chelsea, New York, NY **[RSVP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187383/340472578/-1364835166?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjg4ODExZS0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfpkXSI6HXqH7Y2ecotZM3mJ1DmcVd9fnlyl6P-aDU4=&emci=aa468523-1dbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7b88811e-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)** Address & arrival details provided upon RSVP **Reception in support of Wes Moore for Maryland**
Hosted by: Elise & Scott Kurlander, Katie & Sam Santarelli, and Christy & Matt Wyskiel
Wednesday, April 20th, 6:00 pm
The home of Elise & Scott Kurlander, Reisterstown, MD

clean_body: Check out the latest below! | | Friend - Happy Friday, and thank you so much for your continued support of the Moore-Miller campaign! This week it has been confirmed - our primary election is set for July 19th, which means we are 95 days to election day! It's been another busy week for Wes - we are excited to announce the endorsements of Delegate Geraldine Valentino-Smith, Delegate Vanessa Atterbeary, Senator Guy Guzzone, Hagerstown Mayor Emily Keller, Laurel Councilmember Brencis Smith and the Ironworkers Local 5 - and that was all just this week! Tomorrow, the campaign will be holding a rally in Baltimore City with Wes Moore, Aruna Miller, and several other special guests - please see the details below and we hope you'll join us! This will be a fun outdoor event with music and food trucks, and we would love to see you there. And next week, we'll be running it back for our Office Opening in Silver Spring - those details are below as well. In the coming weeks, we have several fundraising events as well, and would love for you to join us, or consider hosting your own. More details are below, and please reply to this email for more information. Many thanks for your support of Wes and Aruna, and more to follow! Patrick Denny Finance Director Wes Moore for Maryland Wes Moore Rally in Baltimore! Saturday, April 16th, 12:30pm - 2:30pm T. Rowe Price Pavilion Park, Baltimore, MD Montgomery County Office Opening! Saturday, April 23rd, 12:00pm - 2:00pm Silver Spring, MD 20910 What people are saying - highlights from the press: Cheryl Bost brings clarity to what teachers need and why MSEA endorsed Wes Moore for Governor. Bost stated that she "...saw in Wes a commitment for public education, a commitment to making sure that educators have a voice at the table and energy that we think is needed to energize the electorate to come out and vote" “....what I sensed in Wes Moore was someone who is a good listener and will be a good listener" Don Mohler later stated. "Wes has a way to get to know people....he learned from listening instead of just kinda checking the box and talking to our folks...." Democratic gubernatorial candidate Wes Moore on Saturday won the coveted endorsement of the state’s largest teachers union, a large boost for the former nonprofit chief who is making his first run for public office. Union leaders said they were drawn to Moore’s “personal history as a Marylander” and his commitment that aligns with the union’s goals for a “world class education for every student.” “Our students and communities need leadership committed to the promise that no matter their neighborhood they will have the same opportunity to reach their potential,” union president Cheryl Bost said in a statement. “Wes Moore has demonstrated a commitment to unite people whom he leads in the fight for racial, social justice, and to give educators a voice in the decisions and policies that affect education.” Today on Midday , we continue our election-year interview series, Conversations with the Candidates: 2022. name: Kara Hahn
subject: Why I'm rejecting corporate PAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177811/340440846/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)

Friend,

I took a vow to reject **corporate PAC money in my campaign** , and today I want to take a moment to explain why. Something that's been in the news recently serves as an example of what's at stake: the outrageous price of insulin.

Insulin costs _pennies_ on the dollar to produce. It's been in use for almost 100 years. And the patent was sold for $1 in order to make it a drug every family could afford.

Yet even though there have been no significant changes to insulin, the price has continued to rise. Over 37 million Americans are diabetic. That's more than 1 in 10 Americans, which means this isn't some theoretical problem. Price gouging has caused enormous hardship for many American families and even led to self-rationing, sometimes with tragic results.

Last month the House took a huge step toward helping American families by voting to cap the monthly price of insulin at $35. The price cap is incredibly popular with Democrats and Republicans alike.

**In short, it's the _right_ thing to do.** But let's be honest — it might not happen. This bill still needs to move through the Senate, where it will face fierce opposition. And there's one big reason why: **drug companies control massive sums of special interest money.** Elected officials will be forced to choose between the people they represent, and big money donors offering to bankroll campaigns.

**[Team, I've already made my choice. I'm choosing you and rejecting corporate PAC dollars, and I'll always represent the working people and families of New York's 1st District. So I'm asking: Will you chip in to help this 100% people-powered campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177812/340440847/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **[Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177813/340440848/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)** | **[Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177814/340440849/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)**

**[Express Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177815/340440850/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)** | **[Express Donate $100](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177816/340440851/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&express_lane=true&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)**
**[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177817/340440852/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)** | **[Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177818/340440853/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)**
Whether it's insulin, infrastructure, affordable health care, climate change, or common sense gun safety measures, you won't ever have to wonder where my commitments are on any issue.

Corporate PACs are going to push back against real progressive change, and _that's exactly_ why we can't afford to send someone to Washington who is beholden to those big moneyed interests.

Here is the thing, in all honesty, it's harder to run a campaign without corporate PAC dollars. But when I get to Congress, it will be clear why I'm there — I'll be there to serve the PEOPLE of New York's 1st District.

**[So, if you can, pitch in $5 today to help fund our grassroots campaign — for the working people and families of NY-01.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177819/340440854/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177820/340440855/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)
Thank you for your time,

Kara Hahn

Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177821/340440856/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44177822/340440857/1307566342?refcode=em22_220415_mm3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjA1ZjBkYy1lOWJjLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiP0Gs86uD1DJSFzb1WtNNBCjq3zUVD82byLN8lsYjM=)

clean_body: | = Friend, I took a vow to reject corporate PAC money in my campaign , and today I want to take a moment to explain why. Something that's been in the news recently serves as an example of what's at stake: the outrageous price of insulin. Insulin costs pennies on the dollar to produce. It's been in use for almost 100 years. And the patent was sold for $1 in order to make it a drug every family could afford. Yet even though there have been no significant changes to insulin, the price has continued to rise. Over 37 million Americans are diabetic. That's more than 1 in 10 Americans, which means this isn't some theoretical problem. Price gouging has caused enormous hardship for many American families and even led to self-rationing, sometimes with tragic results. Last month the House took a huge step toward helping American families by voting to cap the monthly price of insulin at $35. The price cap is incredibly popular with Democrats and Republicans alike. In short, it's the right thing to do. But let's be honest — it might not happen. This bill still needs to move through the Senate, where it will face fierce opposition. And there's one big reason why: drug companies control massive sums of special interest money. Elected officials will be forced to choose between the people they represent, and big money donors offering to bankroll campaigns. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Whether it's insulin, infrastructure, affordable health care, climate change, or common sense gun safety measures, you won't ever have to wonder where my commitments are on any issue. Corporate PACs are going to push back against real progressive change, and that's exactly why we can't afford to send someone to Washington who is beholden to those big moneyed interests. Here is the thing, in all honesty, it's harder to run a campaign without corporate PAC dollars. But when I get to Congress, it will be clear why I'm there — I'll be there to serve the PEOPLE of New York's 1st District. = = Thank you for your time, Kara Hahn Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = = *

Earth Week starts on Monday! | | Hi Peter, Earth Day is next week, and we’re celebrating with a week of action! The theme? Electing climate champions. With the primary election just weeks away, there’s no better time to get involved and help get climate candidates elected. OLCV’s Earth Week will be full of fun ways to make a difference, from writing LTE’s to phone banking to canvassing. See below for the schedule! [**You can sign up for as many events as you want using our online form.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44177920/340441418/1527695943?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2Mzc2MDBkLWVhYmMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pz1QinWrJ3ekFOs-tVr0MTxlHY21tjAmHspFXDj1m6Q=&emci=236e3cf7-19bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8637600d-eabc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) **Monday 4/18 **
* Mad Hatter’s Letter to the Editor Tea Party - 6pm to 7pm on Zoom
_Join us as we spill some political 'tea' over our favorite cup of tea, and draft Letters to the Editor to help elect pro-climate candidates._

**Tuesday 4/19 **
* Virtual Phone Bank for Jackie Leung (HD 19) - 4pm to 7pm on Zoom
* Virtual Phone Bank for Tina Kotek for Oregon Governor - 5:30pm to 8pm on Zoom

**Wednesday 4/20**
* Virtual Phone Bank for RJ Navarro (HD 21) - 5pm to 7pm on Zoom
* Virtual Phone Bank for WLnsvey Campos (SD 18) - 5:30pm to 8pm on Zoom

**Thursday 4/21**
* Virtual Phone Bank for Aaron Woods (SD 13) - 6pm to 9pm on Zoom
* Canvass for Mark Gamba (HD 41) - 5pm to 7:30pm in SE Portland

**Friday 4/22**
* Earth Day Social Media Day of Action
_Use OLCV's toolkit and join us in posting why you're voting for climate champions this May._

**Saturday 4/23**
* Joint Canvass for Jessica Vega Pederson for Multnomah County Chair and Lynn Peterson for Metro President - 11am to 1:30pm in NE Portland
* Canvass for Tina Kotek for Oregon Governor - 2pm to 5:30pm in N. Portland
* Climate House Party for Mark Gamba (HD 41) - 4:30pm to 6:30pm in NE Portland

**Sunday 4/24**
* Canvass for Farrah Chaichi (HD 35) - 11am to 1pm in Beaverton
* Canvass for Catherine Thomasson (HD 45) - 11am to 2pm in NE Portland

[**Sign up for Earth Week here!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44177922/340441420/1527695943?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2Mzc2MDBkLWVhYmMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pz1QinWrJ3ekFOs-tVr0MTxlHY21tjAmHspFXDj1m6Q=&emci=236e3cf7-19bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8637600d-eabc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) One of the biggest ways we can make a difference this year is by electing climate champions–people who are going to get things done for our air, our water, and our climate. Who we elect makes a difference in our future. [**Please join us for our Earth Week of Action!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44177924/340441422/1527695943?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2Mzc2MDBkLWVhYmMtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pz1QinWrJ3ekFOs-tVr0MTxlHY21tjAmHspFXDj1m6Q=&emci=236e3cf7-19bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8637600d-eabc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) See you on the campaign trail,
Britney VanCitters
Organizing Manager, OLCV |

disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
We’re closing in on another fundraising deadline in just a few hours...

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187839/340473612/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220415-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220415-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220415&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=72cf6b94-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmNmNmI5NC0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTpklfJKt22d7OUlEhpGgaPHZ40L-clJc-mLHzHQLRg=)

| I know you’re busy and it’s almost the weekend, so I’ll get right to it. **We’re closing in on another fundraising deadline in just a few hours, and we still need to raise $30,000 more if we’re going to meet our April goal.** _**[Can I count on you to pitch in to help us close the gap before our mid-month deadline hits at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187840/340473613/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220415-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220415-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220415&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=72cf6b94-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmNmNmI5NC0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTpklfJKt22d7OUlEhpGgaPHZ40L-clJc-mLHzHQLRg=)**_ Peter, allow me to quickly explain why your support is so crucial right now. I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for equity at every turn, standing up for those who are too often ignored, and closing opportunity gaps so everyone gets a fair shot at success. The mission behind our campaign is no different: I’m proudly running to bring lasting change to Maryland and lead our state toward a brighter, more prosperous future — but I can’t do that if I don’t have a strong grassroots movement behind me. I know my team and I ask for your support often, but if we don’t keep up with our fundraising goals we risk falling behind with our organizing efforts, coalition building, online outreach and more. That’s why **I need your support now to ensure we stay on track to crush our fundraising goals.** _**[Please, before we reach our deadline tonight, help power us across the finish line by chipping in $25 or more right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187841/340473614/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220415-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220415-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220415&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=72cf6b94-0bbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmNmNmI5NC0wYmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTpklfJKt22d7OUlEhpGgaPHZ40L-clJc-mLHzHQLRg=)**_ Your support means the world to me, Peter. Thank you for being a part of our movement to make a difference. John King
---

Peter -- My team hates when I send long emails like this, but I think it's incredibly important to discuss what's happening in Congress. I hope you'll read the whole thing.

**We have to talk about one of the most important issue of our generation:**

**MAGA Republicans’ willingness and desire to DESTROY our elections and democracy for cheap political points.**

I’ve been in Congress for nearly 10 years -- I’m familiar with conservative extremism festering in the halls of Congress.

_But in the past couple years, Congressional Republicans have stooped from low to lower._

My Democratic colleagues and I have had to put everything to the side to pick up the pieces of our democracy and attempt to put them back together.

But while I’m working to pass voter reform, secure LGBTQ+ rights, and fight back against misinformation, MAGA Republicans are hot on our heels, trying to take our House majority away from us!

**They’re doing EVERYTHING they can to attack progressive Democrats like me._And when people with no moral code come after you, it’s scary._**

That’s why hitting our fundraising goals is so important, and why we have to email you so much. But my campaign is behind and we need to raise $4,281 today in order to get back on track.

[**So, Peter, I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 (or more if you can), to help us get back on track to hitting our fundraising goal and defending our essential House majority. Everything we care about as Democrats is at stake. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We’re not caving to their demands
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60141762:JlldHEorN:m:1:3253819041:CC286BB54044D2DC62CCFAC19AFFCC9B:r)
You may have heard about how Disney tried and failed to launch a smear campaign against a piece of legislation that I signed into law that protects 5-, 6-, and 7-year-olds from sexualized lesson plans in school.

Disney is continuing to lie about the bill, and their executives are continuing to smear me for defending the rights of parents and students.

**No one should be surprised. This once family friendly entertainment company that used to make dreams come true for generations of Americans is now little more than a woke corporation fighting to inject radical sexual orientation and gender identity theory into our children 's classrooms. **
_**[FIGHT BACK- ACT NOW >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60141762:JlldHEorN:m:1:3253819041:CC286BB54044D2DC62CCFAC19AFFCC9B:r "FIGHT BACK – ACT NOW >>>")**_
The company that gave us Mickey Mouse and Donald Duck has not only decided that this inappropriate content should be injected into kindergarten through third-grade classrooms, but they also think it should be streamlined into kids' movies and television shows.

I have news for the California executives at Woke Disney: **Florida parents will not stand idly by -** _**and neither will I.**_

As long as I'm governor, I will always fight for Florida families and our kids. I will never cave to the demands of a corporation that tries to inject sexualized lesson plans into Florida classrooms.

**Woke corporations do not run the state of Florida and they never will.**

**_[Help me continue the fight against the liberal machine's anti-parent agenda. Chip in $50, $25, or $15 now >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60141762:JlldHEorN:m:1:3253819041:CC286BB54044D2DC62CCFAC19AFFCC9B:r "Help me continue the fight against the liberal machine’s anti-parent agenda. Chip in $50, $25, or $15 now
>>>")_**

Thank you for your support,
Ron DeSantis

clean_body: You may have heard about how Disney tried and failed to launch a smear campaign against a piece of legislation that I signed into law that protects 5-, 6-, and 7-year-olds from sexualized lesson plans in school. Disney is continuing to lie about the bill, and their executives are continuing to smear me for defending the rights of parents and students. No one should be surprised. This once family friendly entertainment company that used to make dreams come true for generations of Americans is now little more than a woke corporation fighting to inject radical sexual orientation and gender identity theory into our children 's classrooms. "FIGHT BACK – ACT NOW >>>" The company that gave us Mickey Mouse and Donald Duck has not only decided that this inappropriate content should be injected into kindergarten through third-grade classrooms, but they also think it should be streamlined into kids' movies and television shows. I have news for the California executives at Woke Disney: Florida parents will not stand idly by - and neither will I. As long as I'm governor, I will always fight for Florida families and our kids. I will never cave to the demands of a corporation that tries to inject sexualized lesson plans into Florida classrooms. Woke corporations do not run the state of Florida and they never will. "Help me continue the fight against the liberal machine’s anti-parent agenda. Chip in $50, $25, or $15 now >>" Thank you for your support, Ron DeSantis Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-47965784487-echo7-AF027F198452DE06FF0BF08EB0E7BA37@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

Hi Peter Willis,
I hope I am not disrupting you, but I am writing to you from the car. Just now, I have a moment to myself, and needed to reach out to you.
My team informed me how close we are to getting back on track. That is why I am calling on YOU, Peter Willis to become a TOP DIGITAL DONOR by making an urgent donation.
We only have till midnight tonight to reach our goal.
Can you help us meet our goal and make an urgent donation?

clean_body: | | | | Our Deadline | Hi Peter Willis, I hope I am not disrupting you, but I am writing to you from the car. Just now, I have a moment to myself, and needed to reach out to you. My team informed me how close we are to getting back on track. That is why I am calling on YOU, Peter Willis to become a TOP DIGITAL DONOR by making an urgent donation. We only have till midnight tonight to reach our goal. Can you help us meet our goal and make an urgent donation? Use my top supporter link: I appreciate your support, I promise I won’t let you down!! -Lou | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Shaffer?=
subject: Volunteers needed for video shoot on April 20th & 21st!
body:
Hope you're all doing well! We are just 32 days from Primary Day and next Wednesday and Thursday, April 20th and 21st, we'll be recording our first | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremyshaffer/volunteer415?e=32107e7cf1)
---
| | Hi team,

Hope you're all doing well!

We are just 32 days from Primary Day and next Wednesday and Thursday, April 20th and 21st, we'll be recording our first video shoot of the campaign for Jeremy's TV ads.

I am reaching out because we are looking for extras to appear in the ads, e.g. the tv crew might film you talking or walking with Jeremy or sitting around a conference table with him etc.

On Wednesday, April 20th, we are looking for volunteers at the following times/locations:
* 7:30 a.m. - 10:00 a.m. at a business office -- 1501 Reedsdale St, Pittsburgh, PA 15233
* 1:30 p.m. - 4:30 p.m. at Jeremy's house -- Gibsonia address provided upon RSVP

We are still finalizing details for Thursday but please let me know if you could make anytime Wednesday. You won't be required to stay the entire 2-3 hours so if you can just make it for an hour or so that'd work great too.
Wishing you all a blessed Good Friday and a joyous Easter weekend -- see you soon!

Thanks again,
Trevor Naglieri
Campaign Manager
(508) 826-5135
---

| | [Dear friend,

Speaker Pelosi here, reaching out about an important matter: We were already REALLY worried about retirements, but now I’m quite worried that even more Democrats will retire, making our battle to protect the House Majority that much harder.

And it gets worse: **GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy is GLOATING that all these Democratic retirements could signal a Republican takeover. Worst of all, he could be right!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187940/340474115/1570575740?&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=20220415_em_f_4BH_nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEyODQ4OC0wZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDupoXvfLWzE5LAUH2GvUFWz_t6zbk4uy_hF_-vTqvE=) **[_Democrats need to work extra hard to make up for these seats, so I’m reaching out personally to see if you can rush a donation to House Majority PAC to help protect our Democratic Majority._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187941/340474116/1570575740?&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=20220415_em_f_4BH_nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEyODQ4OC0wZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDupoXvfLWzE5LAUH2GvUFWz_t6zbk4uy_hF_-vTqvE=)**

[**There’s no sugarcoating it:** **Democrats are on track to lose the House. Republican fundraising is through the roof, redistricting is going to cause some Democratic districts to disappear, and signs point to it being “nearly impossible for Democrats to retain the House” as some news outlets have said.**

It’s so bad that Democrats are retiring in the face of the odds, which is making it harder for us to keep the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187942/340474117/1570575740?&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=20220415_em_f_4BH_nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEyODQ4OC0wZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDupoXvfLWzE5LAUH2GvUFWz_t6zbk4uy_hF_-vTqvE=) **_[Luckily, we have time to turn it around, but we cannot afford to lose another single day. Please pitch in to House Majority PAC to help keep the House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187943/340474118/1570575740?&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=20220415_em_f_4BH_nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEyODQ4OC0wZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDupoXvfLWzE5LAUH2GvUFWz_t6zbk4uy_hF_-vTqvE=)_** | [Chip in $5 immediately >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44187944/340474119/1570575740?&amount=5&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=20220415_em_f_4BH_nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEyODQ4OC0wZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vDupoXvfLWzE5LAUH2GvUFWz_t6zbk4uy_hF_-vTqvE=)

subject: Records Reveal Multiple Attacks on Secret Service by Biden’s Dog, Agents Upset with Psaki’s Misleading Statements about an Incident
body:
Press coverage of Judicial Watch report on Biden dog biting Secret
Service agents

[NEWSWATCH]

KEY RELEASE

[600x300]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27128&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbXVsdGlwbGUtYXR0YWNrcy1vbi1zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1ieS1iaWRlbnMtZG9nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

Records Reveal Multiple Attacks on Secret Service by Biden’s
Dog, Agents Upset with Psaki’s Misleading Statements About an
Incident
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27128&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbXVsdGlwbGUtYXR0YWNrcy1vbi1zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1ieS1iaWRlbnMtZG9nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

Source: Judicial Watch
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27128&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbXVsdGlwbGUtYXR0YWNrcy1vbi1zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1ieS1iaWRlbnMtZG9nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

Judicial Watch obtained 400 pages of records detailing multiple
attacks and damages caused to Secret Service members by President
Biden’s dog Major at the White House and Biden’s lake home in
Wilmington, DE. The documents reveal that a member of the Secret
Service who was attacked by the dog was displeased that White House
Press Secretary Jen Psaki misled the press about the incident.

[13x13x1]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27128&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbXVsdGlwbGUtYXR0YWNrcy1vbi1zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1ieS1iaWRlbnMtZG9nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
READ MORE
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27128&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbXVsdGlwbGUtYXR0YWNrcy1vbi1zZWNyZXQtc2VydmljZS1ieS1iaWRlbnMtZG9nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

MAJOR MEDIA REPORTS

[180x150x1]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27129&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjIvYXByLzE0L2JpZGVucy1kb2ctbWFqb3ItaW52b2x2ZWQtb3RoZXItYXR0YWNrcy1zZWNyZXQtc2VyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

2022-04-14

Bidens’ dog Major involved in other attacks on Secret Service
agents
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27129&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjIvYXByLzE0L2JpZGVucy1kb2ctbWFqb3ItaW52b2x2ZWQtb3RoZXItYXR0YWNrcy1zZWNyZXQtc2VyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

Source: The Washington Times
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27129&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjIvYXByLzE0L2JpZGVucy1kb2ctbWFqb3ItaW52b2x2ZWQtb3RoZXItYXR0YWNrcy1zZWNyZXQtc2VyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

Secret Service agents were angered by the White House’s
efforts to downplay dog-bite injuries last year from President
Biden’s German shepherd, Major, newly released documents obtained by
the conservative watchdog group Judicial Watch show.

[13x13x1]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27129&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjIvYXByLzE0L2JpZGVucy1kb2ctbWFqb3ItaW52b2x2ZWQtb3RoZXItYXR0YWNrcy1zZWNyZXQtc2VyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
READ MORE
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27129&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjIvYXByLzE0L2JpZGVucy1kb2ctbWFqb3ItaW52b2x2ZWQtb3RoZXItYXR0YWNrcy1zZWNyZXQtc2VyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

[180x150x2]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27130&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjIvMDQvMTMvc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtYWdlbnRzLW91dHJhZ2VkLWJ5LXdoaXRlLWhvdXNlLXNwaW4tb3Zlci1maXJzdC1kb2ctYml0ZXMtcmVwb3J0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

2022-04-13

‘Now I’m pissed’: Secret Service agents outraged by White
House spin over ‘first dog’ bites
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27130&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjIvMDQvMTMvc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtYWdlbnRzLW91dHJhZ2VkLWJ5LXdoaXRlLWhvdXNlLXNwaW4tb3Zlci1maXJzdC1kb2ctYml0ZXMtcmVwb3J0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

Source: New York Post
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58629&L=27130&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjIvMDQvMTMvc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtYWdlbnRzLW91dHJhZ2VkLWJ5LXdoaXRlLWhvdXNlLXNwaW4tb3Zlci1maXJzdC1kb2ctYml0ZXMtcmVwb3J0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3N3YXRjaCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

Secret Service agents were outraged last year by the White
House’s attempt to downplay bite injuries caused by then-first dog
Major — even trying to get President Biden to personally pay for a

attacks and damages caused to Secret Service members by President
Biden’s dog Major at the White House and Biden’s lake home in

Service who was attacked by the dog was displeased that White House
Press Secretary Jen Psaki misled the press about the incident.
