Friend, our mid-month deadline is right around the corner, which means it's more important than ever for our grassroots fundraising to be strong. But I just popped in to ActBlue, and what I saw is NOT good.
**We expected this movement to ramp up its support as the stakes got higher – but the OPPOSITE has happened. We're just hours away from our mid-month deadline, and ActBlue shows our online fundraising is dramatically slowing _down._ Take a look for yourself:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44189642/340491177/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk611-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGY0ZDcwYi0xZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1FvyEp7U7vLRrgiLN3EoFGBI4t9a3CyVHc4pZYlt8lc=)
This is the political fight of our lives, and we cannot go into it halfheartedly. Experts at The Washington Post have made it clear: Replacing GOP extremists with Democratic governors is _the_ way to protect voting rights, education, health care and more. **Marco Lopez (D-AZ)_is_ the governor we need: He's an Obama administration alum, voting rights champion and small business owner – and he's ready to flip Arizona's governorship blue and defend our democracy.**
**But unless we turn our fundraising trends around before our mid-month deadline, we won't have the resources we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win this race. Politico has called this the _most_ competitive open-seat race of 2022, so we can't afford to fall short.**
**[So please, friend, with our deadline rapidly approaching, will you rush a donation to close our budget gap, flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44189643/340491179/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk611-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGY0ZDcwYi0xZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1FvyEp7U7vLRrgiLN3EoFGBI4t9a3CyVHc4pZYlt8lc=)**

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44189648/340491184/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk611-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGY0ZDcwYi0xZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1FvyEp7U7vLRrgiLN3EoFGBI4t9a3CyVHc4pZYlt8lc=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44189649/340491185/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk611-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGY0ZDcwYi0xZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1FvyEp7U7vLRrgiLN3EoFGBI4t9a3CyVHc4pZYlt8lc=)

subject: Offense or Defense?
body:
We are at war for the hearts and minds of independent and moderate voters in November. Do we want to play offense or defense?

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/0af523c04f66/offense-or-defense?e=2f092d4a69)
Karamo speaks on stage for "Patriot Voice", founded by QAnon John, in Vegas. The number 17 stands for Q. Cards, chips, and dice all add up to 17

** Offense or Defense?
------------------------------------------------------------

This year’s general election will be a battle for the hearts and minds of independent and moderate voters. Do we want to play offense or defense?

Playing offense means reminding voters it was Democrat Jocelyn Benson who closed the SOS offices, undermined the integrity of our voting system, and destroyed what was left of customer service. We'll go on offense if I'm the Republican Nominee for Secretary of State.

Playing defense is what we will be forced to do if our nominee is Kristina Karamo. Karamo believes in a conspiracy theory called “QAnon”. Karamo is good texting buddies with this group’s leader, QAnon John. One of QAnon John’s conspiracy theories is that the U.S. Military is about to initiate a coup d'etat, execute the Democrats, and then relinquish control back to Republicans.

The mainstream media is already trying to tie QAnon Karamo to vulnerable Republicans from Seattle to South Palm Beach. If we make her our nominee, we will spend the entire election defending Q’Anon Karamo... an indefensible position.

Do you really want to defend QAnon Karamo in the general election?

What’s our game plan going to be – offense or defense?

I choose offense. Choose Beau LaFave for Secretary of State
QAnon John's social-media account with 20k followers.
Founder of "Patriot Voice"

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: drevil.gif
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Republicans are *literally* trying to buy PA.
#
Derek, can we level with you?
We’d actually love to send you *less* emails asking for money. (Even though, let’s be real, ours are better than most. 😏)
Here’s why we can’t: **This is the MOST expensive Senate race in the country**. Get this — our Republican multi-millionaire opponents + aligned super PACs have spent almost **$80 million and counting** _just on TV ads._
It’s only getting worse. **Donald Trump just endorsed Dr. Oz** , which means there’s a _tidal wave_ of MAGA money flooding PA right now. 🌊
How do we fight back? After all, John doesn’t have super PACs -or- millions in personal wealth to spend.
**The answer, Derek, comes down to you + our grassroots team.**
**[We’re sending this email because it’s pretty much the only way we can reach our critical $35,000 goal before tonight’s mid-month deadline. If you can, contribute $3 — or literally whatever amount you can spare now — because the next few donations could put us over the line.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47303?refcode=em20220415-5402&t=1&akid=5402%2E434096%2ErX40X_)**
**[Contribute »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47303?amount=5&refcode=em20220415-5402&t=20&akid=5402%2E434096%2ErX40X_)**
Flip through the channels anywhere in PA, you’ll see for yourself — our Republican opponents Dr. Oz + David McCormick are absolutely blanketing our state with ads. _They think they can buy Pennsylvania._ 🔴
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47303?refcode=em20220415-5402&t=21&akid=5402%2E434096%2ErX40X_)
_Republicans spending $$$ to buy PA’s Senate seat_ ☝️
**The bad news is** if we don’t fight back, they could succeed.
**The good news is** we’re ready for this. We have the biggest grassroots campaign in Pennsylvania. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign the GOP money machine just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why we’re asking you one more time...
**[Please make a donation if you’re ready to help John win the most expensive Senate race in the country. Whether you can give $5 or $50 or $500, it doesn’t matter. What’s important is that, together with your help, we meet our $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47303?refcode=em20220415-5402&t=22&akid=5402%2E434096%2ErX40X_)**
Let’s win this thing,
Fetterman for U.S. Senate
P.S. Did you read this whole thing but not chip in yet? Well, we 💛 you no matter what, Derek, but here’s one last chance. **[Will you chip in just $1 — yeah, literally one buck — because that’s all it takes to be part of our people-powered movement to flip PA’s Senate seat?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47303?refcode=em20220415-5402&t=23&akid=5402%2E434096%2ErX40X_)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220415-5402-footer&t=24&refcode2=5402_434096_rX40X_&akid=5402%2E434096%2ErX40X_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=5402%2E434096%2ErX40X_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5402%2E434096%2ErX40X_)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

**OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** _Have a blessed Good Friday! Join my family and I in prayer this Holy Day._ _– Katie_ ****Katie’s New Ad: No Balanced Budget, No Paycheck**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=81b0f25bfd814063baf3de8daace0492&_e=CYFS8X05cGYV9ZCKjKMArPAoFwcEISV4MGe_wAcK43fjPv90F5fVwjivwpSt7MM-de4rxOTYAXw0i9x703yp0ps6AwM2koEchX8qdMtA05i-1o9834b6L_JZH5wEwYzi4r9SoQSGEHfU6Wo_PeHDSbaaMJHOgXiHr11VmTmtcg_yo6Aajf9dbb17acyQsaP-Da7N53co-HFJJHFJWg2sHUGI7_qVgEgtAyt-gbvms710Af-q1XdgmBqpVdbw9wtl6s_-YNiQImXuZhHYslir163ulmdeEirWU9aDc-i8DF4%3D) Joe Biden’s radical agenda and bad decisions are costing hardworking Alabamians and retirees every single trip to the grocery store. In the Senate, I’ll fight to make America energy independent again, end the reckless spending that’s fueling inflation, and put more money back in the pockets of Alabama families in every corner of our great state. If Washington politicians don’t balance the budget, they shouldn’t get paid. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Have a blessed Good Friday! Join my family and I in prayer this Holy Day. – Katie **Katie’s New Ad: No Balanced Budget, No Paycheck Joe Biden’s radical agenda and bad decisions are costing hardworking Alabamians and retirees every single trip to the grocery store. In the Senate, I’ll fight to make America energy independent again, end the reckless spending that’s fueling inflation, and put more money back in the pockets of Alabama families in every corner of our great state. If Washington politicians don’t balance the budget, they shouldn’t get paid. Katie Responds to Biden’s Attack Against 2A President Biden is at it again. He wants to use the bureaucracy to enact gun control that he can't pass through Congress. As the next Senator for Alabama, I will fight to defend our Second Amendment rights. Katie on the Campaign Trail It was great visiting with at their convention in Tuscaloosa! Proud of the next generation of conservative leaders who are stepping up to save the country we know and love. Katie on Skyrocketing Inflation as it Hits 40-Year High Skyrocketing inflation is a crushing tax on every Alabama family. As your Senator, I will oppose the reckless spending and radical ‘America Last’ energy agenda that created this mess. Katie Responds to More COVID Theater The Biden Administration plans to scrap Title 42 and declare the pandemic over for immigrants illegally crossing our southern border, while at the same time keeping mandates on hardworking, law-abiding Americans. This clearly isn’t about science — it’s all politics. name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update| | | [](https://)
---
| | Dear Peter, We are less than three weeks away from the Primary and the campaign had another exciting week. Jane crisscrossed the state with former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik, our grassroots army of volunteers continued to pound the pavement, and we released our latest ad of the cycle. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more.
---
| | **Runaway Inflation**
---
As part of the campaign’s seven-figure broadcast TV buy, the campaign launched a new ad this week on Joe Biden’s runaway inflation. It is a hidden tax on every Ohio family and rising costs are the number one issue on Ohioan’s minds.
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=7699f231e324496195310f2f353a5118&_e=7Nz16BVhbaTO12Yt80GXM1iuLcROsFWgXDI-JSvjYc5nQo6U4nKzx-5sNJSEKA7drOAR6c5jLJs68XYub-5TSW2xBEt5wibqwwuDvgxhzcFUr-ripDkgsOGmuqme6ghpFmh26qXt-UwEhnHk3pIW2CfiAt2S8Za3xYCyl97tiiRrO7-t9UNO0Hvrb5jRxuZ59nrJ4pBAgyrF55CLBgjDGGZ145R1VQBXppN_yDC8RXfUwh5ncyRu99xVkCoiNr8q7gnYA8bKoLEDHpGCu14IqTllsQeAB9rYkkVhVPd4Lms%3D)
In the U.S. Senate, Jane will govern like a true fiscal conservative so that your kids aren’t saddled with Washington’s spending mistakes for decades to come.
---
**From the Trail**
---
On Saturday, Jane was thrilled to be joined by former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik for events across the state. Jane knows how important it is to back the blue and show our support for law enforcement!
---
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=7699f231e324496195310f2f353a5118&_e=7Nz16BVhbaTO12Yt80GXM7WCtR9l6C2HS6JM3jsvWGEo1sbyRdgZIQ-IyEpMIKFaFIxtWhaxWZHp9oF6zUvA9Er4Zbn_b0Sp9Bg8QCHu2ewG9-1s4gWuojVd5cKB3ykyW7ddW2sKE1kqyihapQegsSRtd8SYXZNo3049BVGUtlL-DkAmhogBsh86KHnOI6g_7BRIC8xQxTNlPxqy5BfBTWq719_yv5RYheIvZi_fTXmsE7_m_oMbwkDcGHUlYJfFnI6v7cJIccsO5TttMPYKx-JwbdGejyCN8siCwaFmq8TN6ng6PyQqHFtisp_wM-Y8f1uG_3ggPl1SEjsuhNyI1g%3D%3D)
---
The first stop of the day was in Delaware with a great group of Ohio Republicans for a roundtable discussion on the culture of disrespect and disregard for law enforcement promoted by Democrats.
---
---
---
The Bluffton community recently lost Officer Dominic Francis, a hero who paid the ultimate sacrifice. The next stop for Jane and Commissioner Kerik was in nearby Putnam County to show their support for law enforcement and thank them for the incredible work they do each day to keep our communities safe.
---
---
---
Our last stops of the day were in Bowling Green with Rep. Haraz Ghanbari and Lake Township Police Chief Mark Hummer for a roundtable discussion and a visit with the Ohio State Highway Patrol.
---
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=7699f231e324496195310f2f353a5118&_e=7Nz16BVhbaTO12Yt80GXM8maLW7EPLXZH_XTny51tEaQ06J_Ms_l6wtfwwWK0wdT8EDIPhcGF3cgmXrkV1n3q2mA4rbhdsFsARSmBmQc6J6-1JpVEAonAlcKb4Ei6nI2k_eZDsvX7Ipl2pMoL60sTdbtLy5zyP9eNBb5GFZwoEXmxL2cqUasCCqkyPfWnxRPC9VVulXTPHUmfYPYlWqkDw9fXHHvQ7TpH2lyM4hdTKRMDUIqVGg6avonafyssdn9dOqmUnjwIgfRJ2BiLQTzdO-qLgXVz1SIUX2bPME4RUIDtYG1FsliJ6codJaolquxcLthw3W7oTngp2m3Kti0hSS8Nkhl5LQ8Nu_xZ6U2vr5LrevUzTpc5z39WiuRpHFl)
---
---
While Jane and Commissioner Kerik were traveling the state, our grassroots army was working double time. Saturday was a huge voter contact day for our hardworking volunteers and the campaign knocked on over 12,000 doors on Saturday alone. With over 1.4 million voter contacts in the campaign, Jane has the best grassroots team in the country, and they will continue working hard to deliver a win on May 3rd.
---
---
On Tuesday, Jane stopped by the Stark County Republican Party to thank our volunteers who were making calls during their lunch hour and made a few calls herself!
---
---
---
Last night, Jane was excited to be back in Marietta for the Washington County GOP Lincoln Day Dinner. It was a great event with fired up Ohioans ready to take our country back.
---
---
---
| | **Jane Is the Real Deal and the Right Choice for U.S. Senate**
---
Obviously I’ve always known that Jane is the real deal and the only choice to represent Ohio in the U.S. Senate, but don’t take my word for it. This week there were two great op-eds making just that case. On Tuesday, former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik penned an op-ed for [Newsmax](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=7699f231e324496195310f2f353a5118&_e=kn-Eceg1er1tRA_TlqsAaGxXNGNWyVb7UCrZvzV4yiC9YeZIsPoDyE0EnkeVyaP7RtvRyOzDvvkyg4m8JGPnXh6wNeNlykk0ThsqbskheIA2P2rUL99A3OFkFh_vOVz_PZggLY2zE9GuPhMHUGShdbVhBdownwKjwBAm1WZtH6iain77W_hvnQqJQiF1c8wXbHGzfO7Or2ZWINh5J-Xd3wYlwOHVWF8wGtM616ExEqe8tdD6SpDrDEsZ34ZF3fGbyqCBLxklmkiOaiW3h7wBk8MQJB8nAIDKrpwYAjqJPsOh8W4N-KgyfV84L7Q9wwAY4KGhXk-A57Yv4DHFXEVKtQ%3D%3D) about who Ohioans can trust to pursue the America First agenda in the U.S. Senate. "In the Ohio Senate primary, there’s a clash of self-proclaimed MAGA candidates all clamoring for the Trump, America First mantle. However, it only takes a closer look to see who are pretenders, and who's the real deal. Jane Timken is the only true MAGA conservative in Ohio who has been there for President Trump and the America First movement since 2016 and all the way through, to the present day....In Ohio, the choice is clear. Jane Timken has shown the dedication, consistency, and fighter spirit that the MAGA movement is about. She will win against Democrats in November and she will be a fantastic next America First, United States senator." In addition to Commissioner Kerik’s kind words, Rep. Cindy Abrams, Sen. Bill Blessing, Hamilton County Prosecutor Joe Deters, and Rep. Bill Seitz wrote an op-ed for the [Cincinnati Enquirer](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=7699f231e324496195310f2f353a5118&_e=kn-Eceg1er1tRA_TlqsAaD5mae6cSZMaWuIpevXhSdg3d25_i9qI_GRl2y1PYb3cAWWJ0HLRZDr2_cx-duo3nev_2-6LRR1vLNssHjzXxmICT9Sg-bUUH5yHqUpqlEIo0Oo2ls3QLgHh-3CuRrz3ZZnrdHF3q4GOJ5Hs_8jJw_1uAu074JuTFTDpMbwUnqyMK1lVYtPfCUFZxgrQkRIGRp8dnsoZxQfR83LjlaFltWUFbljEwxJ983BKE7u3JxIGv4xKJIUvx8HntFK3xmqC6b-ALUPuu_juf5xFELzq8dteh3UF50sdPYRkCok6MyztIEdNCyq2QlWo_t5Ky7GLQRlgUVQpP_js2dSOcyEaxRnHJGd-zBQZCkRub95B8qmU) about why they are supporting Jane for U.S. Senate. "As your elected representatives in the Ohio House, Ohio Senate and Hamilton County Prosecutor’s Office, we fully endorse Jane Timken to be Ohio’s next United States senator. In a crowded field of candidates, Timken stands out – not only for her values, work ethic and integrity, but also because she is the hometown choice. Timken is a born and bred Cincinnati dynamo...Timken’s Cincinnati blood runs deep and has shaped her into the smart, honest and hardworking conservative she is today. You have a lot of choices in the upcoming May 3 primary for U.S. Senate, but we urge you to support Jane Timken. She will be an unrelenting America First senator. She will fight to secure the border, stem Ohio’s opioid epidemic, bring American manufacturing jobs home from China, and make sure our schools are educating children, not indoctrinating them. Timken didn’t just show up on the scene like some candidates in this race who like the idea of becoming senator, nor has she been trying and failing for this seat two or three times over. She, more than any other candidate, has been fighting for conservative values for years because it’s what she believes in and is what worked for Ohio.” I hope everyone has a great Easter.
---
Sincerely, Rob SecaurCampaign ManagerJane Timken for Ohio
---

clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update| | | https:// | | Dear Peter, We are less than three weeks away from the Primary and the campaign had another exciting week. Jane crisscrossed the state with former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik, our grassroots army of volunteers continued to pound the pavement, and we released our latest ad of the cycle. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. | | Runaway Inflation As part of the campaign’s seven-figure broadcast TV buy, the campaign launched a new ad this week on Joe Biden’s runaway inflation. It is a hidden tax on every Ohio family and rising costs are the number one issue on Ohioan’s minds. In the U.S. Senate, Jane will govern like a true fiscal conservative so that your kids aren’t saddled with Washington’s spending mistakes for decades to come. From the Trail On Saturday, Jane was thrilled to be joined by former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik for events across the state. Jane knows how important it is to back the blue and show our support for law enforcement! The first stop of the day was in Delaware with a great group of Ohio Republicans for a roundtable discussion on the culture of disrespect and disregard for law enforcement promoted by Democrats. The Bluffton community recently lost Officer Dominic Francis, a hero who paid the ultimate sacrifice. The next stop for Jane and Commissioner Kerik was in nearby Putnam County to show their support for law enforcement and thank them for the incredible work they do each day to keep our communities safe. Our last stops of the day were in Bowling Green with Rep. Haraz Ghanbari and Lake Township Police Chief Mark Hummer for a roundtable discussion and a visit with the Ohio State Highway Patrol. While Jane and Commissioner Kerik were traveling the state, our grassroots army was working double time. Saturday was a huge voter contact day for our hardworking volunteers and the campaign knocked on over 12,000 doors on Saturday alone. With over 1.4 million voter contacts in the campaign, Jane has the best grassroots team in the country, and they will continue working hard to deliver a win on May 3rd. On Tuesday, Jane stopped by the Stark County Republican Party to thank our volunteers who were making calls during their lunch hour and made a few calls herself! Last night, Jane was excited to be back in Marietta for the Washington County GOP Lincoln Day Dinner. It was a great event with fired up Ohioans ready to take our country back. | | Jane Is the Real Deal and the Right Choice for U.S. Senate Obviously I’ve always known that Jane is the real deal and the only choice to represent Ohio in the U.S. Senate, but don’t take my word for it. This week there were two great op-eds making just that case. On Tuesday, former NYPD Commissioner Bernie Kerik penned an op-ed for about who Ohioans can trust to pursue the America First agenda in the U.S. Senate. "In the Ohio Senate primary, there’s a clash of self-proclaimed MAGA candidates all clamoring for the Trump, America First mantle. However, it only takes a closer look to see who are pretenders, and who's the real deal. Jane Timken is the only true MAGA conservative in Ohio who has been there for President Trump and the America First movement since 2016 and all the way through, to the present day....In Ohio, the choice is clear. Jane Timken has shown the dedication, consistency, and fighter spirit that the MAGA movement is about. She will win against Democrats in November and she will be a fantastic next America First, United States senator." In addition to Commissioner Kerik’s kind words, Rep. Cindy Abrams, Sen. Bill Blessing, Hamilton County Prosecutor Joe Deters, and Rep. Bill Seitz wrote an op-ed for the about why they are supporting Jane for U.S. Senate. "As your elected representatives in the Ohio House, Ohio Senate and Hamilton County Prosecutor’s Office, we fully endorse Jane Timken to be Ohio’s next United States senator. In a crowded field of candidates, Timken stands out – not only for her values, work ethic and integrity, but also because she is the hometown choice. Timken is a born and bred Cincinnati dynamo...Timken’s Cincinnati blood runs deep and has shaped her into the smart, honest and hardworking conservative she is today. You have a lot of choices in the upcoming May 3 primary for U.S. Senate, but we urge you to support Jane Timken. She will be an unrelenting America First senator. She will fight to secure the border, stem Ohio’s opioid epidemic, bring American manufacturing jobs home from China, and make sure our schools are educating children, not indoctrinating them. Timken didn’t just show up on the scene like some candidates in this race who like the idea of becoming senator, nor has she been trying and failing for this seat two or three times over. She, more than any other candidate, has been fighting for conservative values for years because it’s what she believes in and is what worked for Ohio.” I hope everyone has a great Easter. Sincerely, Rob SecaurCampaign ManagerJane Timken for Ohio | | Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | | | ---|---

body:
The toughest reelection challenge he’s had in decades:
| | |
---
Hi Peter –

Washington Republicans have waged a weeks-long partisan attack to dismantle our campaign – **but they failed.**
**We took this fight all the way to the Iowa Supreme Court, which ruled unanimously that our campaign should be on the ballot. They saw right through the GOP's desperate, anti-democratic attempts to stop our movement.**
You all have been working hard for months: gathering petition signatures, showing up to campaign events across the state, helping us hit fundraising goals and talking to your friends about this race!**It’s ridiculous that the GOP just tried to delegitimize all of your hard work to keep their pal in office so that he can continue doling out handouts to wealthy, corporate elites. **
It’s more important than ever that we show them how strong we are. [**Can you rush $5 or whatever you can spare today to remind Washington Republicans that we’re in this fight, and we’re in it to win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44189779/340500087/805649176?amp;amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk946-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmJjYTczYS0yMWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IRvxqKkDyzaNQXBiEyjcBnDbnOOg_Rs1D-PibKIbAFQ=)
We’ve been building a movement, and we’re going to make sure that Chuck Grassley faces the toughest reelection challenge he’s had in decades. **His approval numbers are at a historic low – and the contrast between me and him is SO stark.**
We’re going to keep talking to Iowans in every corner of the state and building our coalition to beat Chuck Grassley. We beat Washington Republicans, and we're going to make sure we beat them again in November.
But I need you with me in this fight. **[The GOP has $41 million in their war chest to take on candidates like me – and their attacks are going to just keep coming. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Happy Passover!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I hope you have a meaningful and safe holiday.

| Friend,

Tonight marks the first night of Passover. I am so grateful to be able to celebrate seder in person with my family and loved ones this year.
---
During this holiday, the Jewish people are instructed to recall that we were once strangers, and to reflect on ways to welcome the stranger in our own lives. This feels especially poignant today as we see conflict, economic hardship, COVID, and climate change disrupt lives around the world, and as we continue to work to make sure this is a country that welcomes those fleeing from oppression.

Whether you are celebrating Passover, Easter, or Ramadan this weekend, I hope you have a meaningful and safe holiday.

All my best,
Sara

name: John Lira
subject: Dear Gov. Abbott, our district is not your photo op
body:
Hello, Peter, once again, Republicans have used our district for a failed election stunt.

Gov. Greg Abbott’s orders that require extra inspections of commercial trucks along the border have caused back-ups, slowdowns, and disruptions across our district, the state, and the country.

Our ports of entry along the Texas-Mexico border are vital — to the nation and to our local economies.

This disastrous policy was just the latest example of Texas republicans like Abbott using our district as a prop to further their own political agenda and leaving ordinary Texans like us to pay the price.

It’s time we hold the GOP accountable for these kinds of pointless stunts by demanding real, meaningful change, and voting Republicans, from Greg Abbott to Tony Gonzales, out of office this year.

Can you make a donation right now to power our fight to kick Gonzales and other Texas Republicans out of office so I can take the fight for our communities in TX-23 to Congress?

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220415?refcode=em20220415]

It’s way past time that Texas had some real leadership from our elected officials. Leadership who will look out for the interests of the people, not just their own bank accounts and re-election prospects.

Texas Republicans have shown us time and time again who they are — this latest stunt at the border is only the latest piece in a mountain of evidence that politicians like Abbott and Gonzales do not have our communities’ best interests at heart.

If you’re as tired as I am of seeing our district used in Republican photo ops, make a donation right now to help power this campaign so I can get to Washington and do what they won’t — fight for change that would actually benefit the people of TX-23.

Let’s get to work,
John Lira

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220415?refcode=em20220415]

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States

| | Folks, Before I log off to celebrate Passover with my family, I want to tell you a story – and by the end, I hope you’ll consider **[chipping in $5 or whatever you can to get me back on track for my April fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44186279/340467358/1980268870?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220415_FR_MM2Passover_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDhkNDQzMy0wM2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DOWqX4kWgHCcuAa1i-B1WcBJYRD_AcoCXrqHeTvUlBU=)** My faith is very important to me – during the Iraq war while serving as commander aboard the USS Enterprise, I organized a Seder to feel closer to home, my family, and my friends. During a holiday we were all used to celebrating with our families, only three inches of steel separated those of us in the chapel of the ship from the jets being deployed above. And when the servicemembers on the deck are launching and recovering jets three inches above your head, you don’t just hear it, you feel it. But despite the circumstances, I wanted to create a sense of family and community for my crew on such a sacred day. About a dozen of us managed to establish that. We read the Haggadah and received care packages of matzo and gefilte fish. It certainly wasn’t a traditional Seder, but we prepared the meal as closely as possible to what would be served back home. Nearly 16 years later, I still think about that Seder. Servicemembers of all faiths and backgrounds coming together to find a moment of celebration during an incredibly difficult time. And I hope your Seder this year feels like a respite from the chaos of the last few years. But unfortunately, I can’t take a break from campaigning. VA-02 is the most competitive House district in the country, and my opponent just received an endorsement that will lead to a huge influx of contributions for her. clean_body: | = | | Folks, Before I log off to celebrate Passover with my family, I want to tell you a story – and by the end, I hope you’ll consider = My faith is very important to me – during the Iraq war while serving as commander aboard the USS Enterprise, I organized a Seder to feel closer to home, my family, and my friends. During a holiday we were all used to celebrating with our families, only three inches of steel separated those of us in the chapel of the ship from the jets being deployed above. And when the servicemembers on the deck are launching and recovering jets three inches above your head, you don’t just hear it, you feel it. But despite the circumstances, I wanted to create a sense of family and community for my crew on such a sacred day. About a dozen of us managed to establish that. We read the Haggadah and received care packages of matzo and gefilte fish. It certainly wasn’t a traditional Seder, but we prepared the meal as closely as possible to what would be served back home. Nearly 16 years later, I still think about that Seder. Servicemembers of all faiths and backgrounds coming together to find a moment of celebration during an incredibly difficult time. And I hope your Seder this year feels like a respite from the chaos of the last few years. But unfortunately, I can’t take a break from campaigning. VA-02 is the most competitive House district in the country, and my opponent just received an endorsement that will lead to a huge influx of contributions for her. So, team, before you log off for your much-deserved celebration, = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Chag Pesach samech, Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . Peter,

What if we told you:

**The mainstream media (NBC, CBS, ABC, etc.) refused to say the name ‘Hunter Biden’ for 259 days.

51 so called “intelligence officials” told the American people that Hunter Biden’s laptop and the emails on it were “Russian disinformation”.

In October 2020, right before the Presidential election, Twitter and Facebook heavily censored a New York Post story on the laptop.**

And then, when the New York Times finally decides to run the story, they run it on page 20 of the paper, on St. Patrick’s Day, with the title “Biden’s Son Pays a Tax Bill”.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**CONTACT** : PRESS@NICKFORNJ.COM
---
| |
# ** ****De Gregorio Raises $309,000 in Q1, ****Bringing Election Cycle Total to Over $700,000**
_Marine Veteran boasts 10,000 unique donors in first bid to unseat Gottheimer_

---
| **FAIR LAWN** – Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran - who served in Iraq and Afghanistan - and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, announced that he will report $309,503.29 on his April Quarterly Report with $454,466.25 cash on hand. De Gregorio’s strong numbers follow a critical late-March win at the Bergen County Republican Convention that earned him the coveted party line in a county that now makes up 81% of the new district. The first-time candidate has now raised in total over $700,000 from 10,000 unique donors, highlighting De Gregorio’s local appeal and unique ability in the Republican field to attract national investment.

“I could not be more grateful for the supporters who have put their faith in us to take on a Congressman who votes with Nancy Pelosi for the disastrous Biden Agenda over 90% of the time. Our fundraising strength and national endorsements, coupled with our decisive win at the Bergen County Republican Convention this quarter demonstrate the unparalleled organization of our team in both resourcing the campaign and winning voters. We will continue to build an effort that holds Gottheimer accountable for the inflation that is crushing New Jersey families and an out-of-control southern border that threatens our communities with rising crime and illegal drugs.” – **Nick De Gregorio**
---

Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: . Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Please make a today to help our campaign do our part to take back America. Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
Just a few dollars will help ur organize and win this critical primary election.
#
It’s crunch time: There are only _32 days_ until our primary election on May 17th, and _13 days_ until voters start heading to the polls to vote early in person.
**Team Erica Smith is pushing harder than ever to win this race** **— that’s why we’ve set a goal of raising $25,000 towards our Finish Line Fund by midnight.** The Finish Line Fund is absolutely critical to our organizing efforts over the next week.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49564?refcode=em20220415-1099&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1099%2E3698%2EWg1Rhc)
**It’s no small task, but we’re 90% of the way there! And if we can close the gap, we can reach more voters and push our campaign to victory. Can you donate before midnight tonight to help Erica win her primary?**
[**→ Yes, I will donate right now to help Erica Smith win her primary election and send a champion for working people to Congress.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49564?refcode=em20220415-1099&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1099%2E3698%2EWg1Rhc)
Erica can win this race — but here’s the thing: the data shows that nearly 90% of U.S. House races were won by the top-spending candidate, and Black Democratic women candidates, like Erica, receive significantly less money than other candidates. _Trust us, funding will make or break this open-seat race._
**These final weeks of an election are so important, and we can’t be out-spent.** Every contribution counts — no matter how big or small. Just a few dollars will help us organize and win this critical primary election.
[**So before you log off for the weekend: Will you chip in anything you can to our people-powered campaign to help keep our fundraising on track? We need to raise $25,000 before midnight to train volunteers, run ads, and reach voters next week.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49564?refcode=em20220415-1099&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1099%2E3698%2EWg1Rhc)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49564?refcode=em20220415-1099&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1099%2E3698%2EWg1Rhc)**
Thank you and have a great weekend!
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220415-1099-footer&t=23&refcode2=1099_3698_Wg1Rhc&akid=1099%2E3698%2EWg1Rhc)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=1099%2E3698%2EWg1Rhc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1099%2E3698%2EWg1Rhc)

subject: Last Chance: Chip in $3 before midnight >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We’re running out of time to reach our goals.
#

Friends —
We’ve sent a number of emails before this midnight deadline. We hope you’ll take it not as an annoyance, but as a sign of how important this moment is — both for Mark, and for this campaign.
We’re running out of time to reach our goals. So far, we’ve received 10,583 donations. That’s not bad, but we still have some work to do.
But if you chip in, and so does the next person reading this, and the person after that, we’ll close the gap in time for our midnight deadline. That’s really all it takes.
So, please. This is the last chance. If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make your first donation, it’s now — before midnight.
**Please use the link below to contribute $3 or anything you can afford to Mark Kelly’s re-election before the clock strikes midnight.**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/Mid-Month-Goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220415-2-7&t=1&refcode2=2580_6688874_UFdady&akid=2580%2E6688874%2EUFdady)
Thank you for all you do,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2580%2E6688874%2EUFdady).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Morgan Harper
subject: [BREAKING] Trump endorses in Ohio Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Donald Trump just endorsed our extremist opponent J.D. Vance. We have to fight back.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220415-951-footer-ak&t=2&akid=951%2E90090%2E3X6wOF)
Hi,
I’ll be honest, I did not plan to email you today. But I just got some big news and wanted to reach out and make sure you heard – **Donald Trump just endorsed J.D. Vance in this race for U.S. Senate.**
Vance is going to get a WAVE of dark, Trump-affiliated money today because of this endorsement, and we cannot afford to fall behind. [**_Can you make a contribution right now to help us secure more literature, signs, and resources to win this race?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31743?t=3&akid=951%2E90090%2E3X6wOF)
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31743?t=4&akid=951%2E90090%2E3X6wOF)
J.D. Vance has spent his time on the campaign trail spewing horrible, attention grabbing things – like saying he doesn’t care about Ukraine or its people, saying the whole state of New York is “disgusting and violent,” and frequently attacking minority and LGBTQ groups. **Meanwhile, I’m working to build coalitions by bringing people together, not bullying or tearing us apart.**
**The truth is that with Donald Trump’s endorsement, J.D. Vance is going to raise a lot of money today. Fortunately we have built an incredible grassroots movement to stand with us in moments just like this.[_Will you chip in right now to support our campaign?_](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31743?t=5&akid=951%2E90090%2E3X6wOF)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31908?refcode=em20220415-951&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=951%2E90090%2E3X6wOF)**
With only 17 days until the primary, let’s do this and win this seat for the people.
Thank you,
Morgan
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220415-951-footer&t=25&refcode2=951_90090_3X6wOF&akid=951%2E90090%2E3X6wOF)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

subject: National Rubber Eraser Day
body:

| | | | Dear Friends,

In recognition of today being _National Rubber Eraser_ day and knowing the past two terms of Kate Brown have been a dismal failure, we are taking the day to look forward to erasing those years into the abyss of Oregon leadership failures. Very soon we will have the pleasure of scrubbing the Brown years of poor leadership and ushering in a new, brighter future and we will recall April 15th as the "Erase Brown" day.

**That's one of the many reasons I'm running for governor.** But that only can occur with the financial support that you can provide. As we approach the final month of the primary, your donations are even more critical and will be vital to our work now and on into the general election.

So, join me today on April 15th in our "Erase Brown" day and make your voice heard by supporting our campaign with your generous contribution along with all the other grassroots financial supporters throughout the state

---
| [Donate Today!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=e76886c010&e=7e91be8cad "Donate Today!")
---
| | | Again, our work doesn't exist without you and your vital financial and grassroots support.

Thank you for you donation.

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

body:
I just checked our numbers... | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQTMJu9IZWurr0e1V7f1n0sODZ2FHKYLElcio5SYG9KhC0HwSvqXqszuJYgUL11SpTK6VktCdCO1xgr1ibVaks4FQOhe_ZptZY2Pt5T_OnLUIVFX-E7F_ZUJ72TvpSo_8UztbXWwO1UtbIoP0djnJJj9XMcFAh0LTnAV0WpD4K2kAUiVfpKEyExovIKI5blapbD1zqLxnlUc5wab1a1RDek5PCFXYs_Bpo_3QMca0t7QABRiv3udNRC3bpKWQBf0VuP18rx1yJR8UGJEQ8pjgLk6bAAY6DuVfqHELCLcd8g1GGGL8nJEYOPh8-ZKtNv3yRjWY-oGCAhl3nl8TVseYn0FMYxpTx1RZEVcdaIve_Lg/3l8/RWie-0VlQUm5-y_rQ9DEVw/h0/yX6UFvdjykHndIE_323KrE7ln608iCDyQK0MMGJpNW8)
First off, we want to say thank you for the tremendous support we have received over the past year. As you probably know by now, our one year anniversary is coming up and we have a lot to celebrate. Barrier To Entry PAC has gone further than we could have imagined and we can’t wait to see what is in store for the future.

With that being said, there won’t be a future if we don’t keep up the momentum on the fundraising side. Sorry to be harsh friends, but this is the reality. We rely solely on small dollar donations from individuals like you to keep our PAC going. When we don’t hit our goals, we can’t give our candidates the resources they need to break barriers.

We only have a few hours left until our mid-month deadline ends and we still have over $1,000 to raise. We know that seems like a high amount to reach before midnight, but if 100 people on our email list can donate just $10, we will be so much closer to our goal.

Here is what your donation of $10 would contribute towards:

* Provide mentorship and training to endorsed candidates
* Provide candidates and staff from working class backgrounds with direct cash assistance for items like phones, laptops, moving stipends, and more
* Produce high-quality videos, logos, and graphics for scrappy campaigns

[**In the next 5 hours, can you PLEASE consider contributing $10 to BTE so we can continue our mission of supporting candidates and staff from all backgrounds? Your support is crucial.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wG78Ij5HBeK7_vav6LE6CXGDsjBBce8Ed_jOS_QDHDO_IsD5OoRxdaPthTur8dyRJoxopU1r6YrBXkWRhMmfghV8kA8q7VUo2AFahcE0QF1xug-FxAk7D3DlwrThk7noaMLouK6e1mKL5188XUMivjvBkA_KqcZh15tFc2I0kJ6Qd2SkFxEGBWlSwPZWL_rP0fYHvNZACwejCK3yEdXGOlMkie1c58gNWQbuugm-5up2sweYjzT51HzWigL7-GpyAnUpRvE4ElYjNmN8sdan3VHQ_2W8ufIVdkAb4KpwEpo1HWFVgseeTsyPd196GrQLw/3l8/RWie-0VlQUm5-y_rQ9DEVw/h1/kGTLm3XkR-2ceBW8V-G3SwfGTYcLrOMlmbU1xT_iiAg)

clean_body: I just checked our numbers... | | | First off, we want to say thank you for the tremendous support we have received over the past year. As you probably know by now, our one year anniversary is coming up and we have a lot to celebrate. Barrier To Entry PAC has gone further than we could have imagined and we can’t wait to see what is in store for the future. With that being said, there won’t be a future if we don’t keep up the momentum on the fundraising side. Sorry to be harsh friends, but this is the reality. We rely solely on small dollar donations from individuals like you to keep our PAC going. When we don’t hit our goals, we can’t give our candidates the resources they need to break barriers. We only have a few hours left until our mid-month deadline ends and we still have over $1,000 to raise. We know that seems like a high amount to reach before midnight, but if 100 people on our email list can donate just $10, we will be so much closer to our goal. name: Tim Ryan
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3312%2E3611125%2EORfip7 ][IMG]

It’s official, folks. Donald Trump just called me “dangerous” to
Republicans “in a tough race” and threw his support behind my GOP
opponent, JD Vance.

We’re beating Vance in the polls by a single percentage point. But Trump’s
endorsement will bring a new wave of outside money and vicious attacks. We
have to fight back today.

Ohio will determine Senate control, and we cannot let this seat fall into
the hands of an out-of-touch millionaire and Silicon Valley hack. That’s
why I’m depending on you to step up right now, if you can.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10818?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3312%2E3611125%2EORfip7 ]Make a donation to my campaign for Senate so we can flip Ohio blue,
expand our Democratic Senate majority, and cut workers in on the deal.
There has never been a more important time for you to give.

JD Vance already has the backing of billionaire Peter Thiel and

Tim Ryan

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: I need some assistance this evening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress 1317 W Frontage Rd, Suite A, Alamo, TX 78516
body:
Monica nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for you to help my friend make it to the top of the hill this time around | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6113d73b47af44828e4c2b19ab601f4f&_e=qhD623ut7phjXRH0-lgIaND1eCzs_HVVoHvJKber00UPKI43GDjBx9fTGodTu3alVIE2m515rjaG3kIIBXmVmYWrnUugUORn9ZtoR-m4p3ATiKSusgEqJCPTOMxaf5_I45FdH4nB4-_HOr_LHzbDH2pE3XGIjqhOseFUIS8z6-AxiMAA3KG_tX6ahQspbHD4kuEBF7PxPlLoGO6HlRRvSKumjrumQAuLBSSVnIhNx04N6tSkGiwvGn85w4lrFSCYDQIPDojEQh1ypLHxvqzHuhpNGbhM-OBVGiOd9La74pZP2-FRiQfIEYvAXyyFaDKBlxH9joJAAVBrM8SgHFpW53CJFScdAVVOqwpTIefYOztAg45szh9I1_Ig2vuMTYskcbIQOd8oQlsEPzlD7swIRzGp0buBurKi0lZitPIcaaXUI1-ZkU3gvOjhhTKLr7jMsCKiC2uoQSjb3rUxVHe1lZgHmHjonP_ef5_hFtE2Bj7h4r1aYjYwB6wZCbgXl6xSynZiSjcUCo7a7f-qwJuq6A%3D%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in this year's midterm elections** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6113d73b47af44828e4c2b19ab601f4f&_e=qhD623ut7phjXRH0-lgIaND1eCzs_HVVoHvJKber00UPKI43GDjBx9fTGodTu3alVIE2m515rjaG3kIIBXmVmYWrnUugUORn9ZtoR-m4p3ATiKSusgEqJCPTOMxaf5_I45FdH4nB4-_HOr_LHzbDH2pE3XGIjqhOseFUIS8z6-AxiMAA3KG_tX6ahQspbHD4kuEBF7PxPlLoGO6HlRRvSKumjrumQAuLBSSVnIhNx04N6tSkGiwvGn85w4lrFSCYDQIPDojEQh1ypLHxvqzHuhpNGbhM-OBVGiOd9La74pZP2-FRiQfIEYvAXyyFaDKBp46MLyBDNHgtypvchRS60aZJzKqZpCL4noKxzs1GRabVzVB9uQk0zxiOcu92yVa9VEOq4shGw2NFza82JTLXRAQokz4McFAcqn27XqaI-XpKu0krHnVp7qcoEO_MtbuqfItxcVaIVnt2RSKSLJCtPwplZpXue1KBlX7KtHmy3APRQwaPegaO1VR_ey5p9vMyWoMkYtpvsHAxCGR5a2BLlw%3D%3D)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Hispanic woman elected to Congress from her district_!

When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast - and my team and I believe she has a very solid chance of winning this time around.**

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Happy Passover!
body:
Friend,I want to wish you a peaceful and blessed Passover!This blessed season is a time of rebirth, reconnecting with family, and reminding ourselves of what's truly important in life. For many, this is the first time in a long time that we have been able to celebrate with our friends and family in person! I'm working hard in Congress, fighting to defend our religious liberty and make our country a better place to live and worship in. _While I've done so much already, I know there is still work to be done in Washington._ Your support and guidance have meant the world to me as we fight for a better, stronger, and safer America.Chag Sameach! -Glenn [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdujo-yddjllujiu-r/) [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdujo-yddjllujiu-j/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-qjdujo-yddjllujiu-t/)
---
